    function fSearchDN(
        aDN in varchar2
    ) return t_ldap_table;   
    
    function fLdapSearch(
        aSurname in varchar2,
        aGivenname in varchar2 default null,
        aSubdept in varchar2 default null,
        aMail in varchar2 default null,
        aGid in varchar2 default null
    ) return t_ldap_table;       
    
    procedure pLoadSRAData;
    
    procedure pApplySRAData;    
    
    procedure pSRAMain;   
    
    procedure pSyncKoala;

END KOALA_UTIL;
/


create or replace PACKAGE BODY KOALA_UTIL AS

    cLdapHost constant varchar2(250) := 'koala.in.audi.vwg';
    cLdapPort constant number := 636;
    cWalletPath constant varchar2(250) := 'file:/u00/app/oracle/admin/TC1805/wallet/VORSCHRIFTEN';
    cWalletPwd constant varchar2(250) := 'pw4+wallet+VORS+T'; 
    cLDAPBindUser constant varchar2(250) := 'uid=S2SUDCR,cn=Users,ou=K-UMS,DC=VWG';
    --cLDAPBindPass constant varchar2(250) := '!OMSmt$aB}67Ws12e3(t'; -- altes Passwort bis 20.08.2024
    --cLDAPBindPass constant varchar2(250) := ',ZL5u71j%MwmxQpXJ.4x'; -- neues Passwort ab 20.08.2024 
    cLDAPBindPass constant varchar2(250) := '$dh1!ZlXZDq3k2,qu?BU';
    
    
    
    function fLdapSearch(
        aSurname in varchar2,
        aGivenname in varchar2 default null,
        aSubdept in varchar2 default null,
        aMail in varchar2 default null,
        aGid in varchar2 default null
    ) return t_ldap_table is
    
        lLdapFilter varchar2(250);
        lReturnValue number;
        lUserCount number;
        lLdapSession DBMS_LDAP.session;
        lLdapMessage DBMS_LDAP.message;
        lAttributeName varchar2(250);
        lLdapEntry DBMS_LDAP.message;
        lLdapElement DBMS_LDAP.ber_element;
        lAttributes DBMS_LDAP.string_collection;
        lValues DBMS_LDAP.STRING_COLLECTION;
        lLdapRow t_ldap_col;
        lLdapTable t_ldap_table := t_ldap_table(); 
        
        lLdapBase varchar2(250) := 'DC=VWG';
    
    
    begin
    
        lLdapFilter := '(&(sn=' || aSurname || '*)(givenname=' || aGivenname || '*)(subDepartment=' || aSubdept || '*)';
        if (aMail is not null) then
            lLdapFilter := lLdapFilter || '(mail=' || aMail || '*)';
        end if;
        lLdapFilter := lLdapFilter || '(uniqueidentifier=' || aGid || '*))';
        
        --lLdapFilter := '(sn=Niedermeier)';        


        dbms_ldap.use_exception := true;
    
        lLdapSession := dbms_ldap.init(cLdapHost,cLdapPort);
    
        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.open_ssl(
                ld              => lLdapSession,
                sslwrl          => cWalletPath,
                sslwalletpasswd => cWalletPwd,
                sslauth         => 2 );

        lReturnValue := dbms_ldap.simple_bind_s(lLdapSession, cLDAPBindUser, cLDAPBindPass); 

        lAttributes(1) := 'telephoneNumber';
        lAttributes(2) := 'subDepartment';
        lAttributes(3) := 'mail';
        lAttributes(4) := 'givenName';
        lAttributes(5) := 'sn';
        lAttributes(6) := 'employeeNumber';
        lAttributes(7) := 'costCenter';
        lAttributes(8) := 'ntPrimaryUserAccount';
        lAttributes(9) := 'l';
        lAttributes(10):= 'uniqueidentifier';

        lAttributes(11) := 'roomNumber';
        lAttributes(12) := 'subDepartmentLong';
        lAttributes(13) := 'cn';

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.search_s(lLdapSession, lLdapBase, DBMS_LDAP.SCOPE_SUBTREE, lLdapFilter, lAttributes, 0, lLdapMessage);
        lUserCount := DBMS_LDAP.count_entries(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);

        lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.first_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);

        while lLdapEntry IS NOT NULL
        loop

            lAttributeName := DBMS_LDAP.first_attribute(lLdapSession,lLdapEntry,lLdapElement);
            lLdapRow := t_ldap_col(null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null);

            WHILE lAttributeName IS NOT NULL
            LOOP

                lValues := DBMS_LDAP.get_values (lLdapSession, lLdapEntry, lAttributeName);

                IF (lValues.count > 0) THEN

                    case lAttributeName
                        when 'uniqueidentifier' then lLdapRow.GID:= lValues(0);
                        when 'sn' then lLdapRow.surname := lValues(0);
                        when 'givenName' then lLdapRow.givenName := lValues(0);
                        when 'subDepartment' then lLdapRow.SUBDEPARTMENT := lValues(0);
                        when 'mail' then lLdapRow.mail := lValues(0);
                        when 'telephoneNumber' then lLdapRow.phone := lValues(0);
                        else null;
                    end case;

                end if;

                lAttributeName := DBMS_LDAP.next_attribute(lLdapSession,lLdapEntry,lLdapElement);

            end loop;

            lLdapTable.extend();
            lLdapTable(lLdapTable.count) := lLdapRow;

            lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.next_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapEntry);

        end loop;

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.unbind_s(lLdapSession);

        return lLdapTable;
        
        
    end fLdapSearch;

    function fGetGroupmembers(aGroup in varchar2) return apex_t_varchar2 AS
        lLdapAttCollection DBMS_LDAP.string_collection;   
        lLdapMessage DBMS_LDAP.message; 
        lLdapSession DBMS_LDAP.session;    
        lReturnValue number;      
        lLdapEntry DBMS_LDAP.message;  
        lAttValuesCollection DBMS_LDAP.STRING_COLLECTION;     
        lResult apex_t_varchar2;
    BEGIN

        dbms_ldap.use_exception := true;
        lLdapSession := dbms_ldap.init(cLdapHost,cLdapPort);
    
        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.open_ssl(
                ld              => lLdapSession,
                sslwrl          => cWalletPath,
                sslwalletpasswd => cWalletPWD,
                sslauth         => 2 );

        lReturnValue := dbms_ldap.simple_bind_s(lLdapSession, cLDAPBindUser, cLDAPBindPass); 
        
        lLdapAttCollection(1) := 'uniquemember';        
        
        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.search_s(
            ld       => lLdapSession,
            base     => 'DC=VWG',
            scope    => DBMS_LDAP.SCOPE_SUBTREE,
            filter   => '(&(cn=' || aGroup || '))',
            attrs    => lLdapAttCollection,
            attronly => 0,
            res      => lLdapMessage
        );        
        
        lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.first_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);  
        
           while lLdapEntry IS NOT NULL loop

                lAttValuesCollection := DBMS_LDAP.get_values (lLdapSession, lLdapEntry,'uniquemember');

                if (lAttValuesCollection.count > 0) then

                    for i in lAttValuesCollection.first .. lAttValuesCollection.last loop

                        apex_string.push(lResult,lAttValuesCollection(i));

                    end loop;
                end if;

                lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.next_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapEntry);

            end loop;

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.unbind_s(lLdapSession);        
        return lResult;
 
    END fGetGroupmembers;
    
    function fSearchDN(
        aDN in varchar2
    ) return t_ldap_table as
    
        lLdapFilter varchar2(250);
        lReturnValue number;
        lUserCount number;
        lLdapSession DBMS_LDAP.session;
        lLdapMessage DBMS_LDAP.message;
        lAttributeName varchar2(250);
        lLdapEntry DBMS_LDAP.message;
        lLdapElement DBMS_LDAP.ber_element;
        lAttributes DBMS_LDAP.string_collection;
        lValues DBMS_LDAP.STRING_COLLECTION;
        lLdapRow t_ldap_col;
        lLdapTable t_ldap_table := t_ldap_table();    
        
    begin  

        lLdapFilter := '(objectclass=*)';

        dbms_ldap.use_exception := true;
    
        lLdapSession := dbms_ldap.init(cLdapHost,cLdapPort);
    
        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.open_ssl(
                ld              => lLdapSession,
                sslwrl          => cWalletPath,
                sslwalletpasswd => cWalletPWD,
                sslauth         => 2 );

        lReturnValue := dbms_ldap.simple_bind_s(lLdapSession, cLDAPBindUser, cLDAPBindPass); 

        lAttributes(1) := 'telephoneNumber';
        lAttributes(2) := 'subDepartment';
        lAttributes(3) := 'mail';
        lAttributes(4) := 'givenName';
        lAttributes(5) := 'sn';
        lAttributes(6) := 'employeeNumber';
        lAttributes(7) := 'costCenter';
        lAttributes(8) := 'ntPrimaryUserAccount';
        lAttributes(9) := 'l';
        lAttributes(10):= 'uniqueidentifier';

        lAttributes(11) := 'roomNumber';
        lAttributes(12) := 'subDepartmentLong';
        lAttributes(13) := 'cn';

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.search_s(lLdapSession, aDN, DBMS_LDAP.SCOPE_SUBTREE, lLdapFilter, lAttributes, 0, lLdapMessage);
        lUserCount := DBMS_LDAP.count_entries(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);

        lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.first_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);

        while lLdapEntry IS NOT NULL
        loop

            lAttributeName := DBMS_LDAP.first_attribute(lLdapSession,lLdapEntry,lLdapElement);
            lLdapRow := t_ldap_col(null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null);

            WHILE lAttributeName IS NOT NULL
            LOOP

                lValues := DBMS_LDAP.get_values (lLdapSession, lLdapEntry, lAttributeName);

                IF (lValues.count > 0) THEN

                    case lAttributeName
                        when 'uniqueidentifier' then lLdapRow.GID:= lValues(0);
                        when 'sn' then lLdapRow.surname := lValues(0);
                        when 'givenName' then lLdapRow.givenName := lValues(0);
                        when 'subDepartment' then lLdapRow.SUBDEPARTMENT := lValues(0);
                        when 'mail' then lLdapRow.mail := lValues(0);
                        when 'telephoneNumber' then lLdapRow.phone := lValues(0);
                        else null;
                    end case;

                end if;

                lAttributeName := DBMS_LDAP.next_attribute(lLdapSession,lLdapEntry,lLdapElement);

            end loop;

            lLdapTable.extend();
            lLdapTable(lLdapTable.count) := lLdapRow;

            lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.next_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapEntry);

        end loop;

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.unbind_s(lLdapSession);

        return lLdapTable; 
        
    end fSearchDN;
    
    /* Lädt die Daten aus den Koala Gruppen in die Tabelle T_SRA_BENUTZER */
    procedure pLoadSRAData is
    begin    
    
        delete from t_sra_benutzer;        
        
        -- VKO
        insert into t_sra_benutzer (nachname,  vorname,  abteilung,  gid, email, telefon, SRA_GROUP, sra_liste )
        with cte1 as (
            select /* materialize */ column_value as dn from koala_util.fGetGroupmembers('AUDI_SRA_42067')
        ), cte2 as (
            select * from cte1  where dn != 'cn=dummy'  
        )
        select k.surname , k.givenname , k.subdepartment ,  k.gid , k.mail, k.phone, 'VKO', 'AUDI_SRA_42067' 
        from cte2, koala_util.fSearchDN(cte2.dn) k ;  
        
        -- VEX
        insert into t_sra_benutzer (nachname,  vorname,  abteilung,  gid, email, telefon, SRA_GROUP, sra_liste)
        with cte1 as (
            select column_value as sra
            from apex_string.split('AUDI_SRA_44360:AUDI_SRA_45063:AUDI_SRA_46440:AUDI_SRA_46461:AUDI_SRA_47789:AUDI_SRA_46491:AUDI_SRA_50511:AUDI_SRA_47955',':')
        ), cte2 as (
            select column_value as dn, listagg(sra,', ') within group (order by sra) sra_liste
            from cte1,
            koala_util.fGetGroupmembers(cte1.sra)
            where column_value != 'cn=dummy'
            group by column_value
        
        )
        select k.surname , k.givenname , k.subdepartment ,  k.gid , k.mail, k.phone, 'VEX', sra_liste 
        from cte2, koala_util.fSearchDN(cte2.dn) k ; 
        
        -- FBEX
        insert into t_sra_benutzer (nachname,  vorname,  abteilung,  gid, email, telefon, SRA_GROUP, sra_liste)
        with cte1 as (
            select /* materialize */ column_value as dn from koala_util.fGetGroupmembers('AUDI_SRA_44030') 
        ), cte2 as (
            select * from cte1  where dn != 'cn=dummy'  
        )
        select k.surname , k.givenname , k.subdepartment ,  k.gid , k.mail, k.phone, 'FBEX', 'AUDI_SRA_44030' 
        from cte2, koala_util.fSearchDN(cte2.dn) k ;     
    
    
    end pLoadSRAData;
    
    /* Die SRA Sync Funktionen können nicht in das Package gepackt werden */
    procedure pApplySRAData is
        lCount number;
        eNoSraData exception;
        pragma exception_init(eNoSraData,-20001);
    begin
    
        select count(*) into lCount
        from t_sra_benutzer
        where sra_group = 'VKO';
        
        if (lCount = 0) then
            raise_application_error(-20001,'Keine SRA Daten für VKO!');
        end if;
        
        select count(*) into lCount
        from t_sra_benutzer
        where sra_group = 'VEX';
        
        if (lCount = 0) then
            raise_application_error(-20001,'Keine SRA Daten für VEX!');
        end if;    
        
        select count(*) into lCount
        from t_sra_benutzer
        where sra_group = 'FBEX';
        
        if (lCount = 0) then
            raise_application_error(-20001,'Keine SRA Daten für FBEX!');
        end if;          
     
        -- VKO die hinzugefügt werden müssen
        insert into t_benutzer (nachname, vorname, abteilung, gid, email, status)
        select nachname, vorname, abteilung, gid, email, 10
        from srasync('VKO',1000)
        where benutzerid is null;
        
        insert into t_benutzer_ref_rolle (benutzerid, rolleid)
        select benutzerid, 1000
        from srasync('VKO',1000);
        
        
        -- VEX die hinzugefügt werden müssen
        insert into t_benutzer (nachname, vorname, abteilung, gid, email, status)
        select nachname, vorname, abteilung, gid, email, 10
        from srasync('VEX',1002)
        where benutzerid is null;
        
        insert into t_benutzer_ref_rolle (benutzerid, rolleid)
        select benutzerid, 1002
        from srasync('VEX',1002);      
        
        -- FBEX die hinzugefügt werden müssen
        insert into t_benutzer (nachname, vorname, abteilung, gid, email, status)
        select nachname, vorname, abteilung, gid, email, 10
        from srasync('FBEX',1006)
        where benutzerid is null;
        
        insert into t_benutzer_ref_rolle (benutzerid, rolleid)
        select benutzerid, 1006
        from srasync('FBEX',1006);       
        
        -- VKO die entzogen werden müssen
        delete from t_benutzer_ref_rolle where benutzer_ref_rolleid in (
        select benutzer_ref_rolleid from (
            select * from srasync2('VKO',1000)
        )
        );
        
        
        -- VEX die entzogen werden müssen, abzüglich der die im VKO/VEX-Register stehen
        delete from t_benutzer_ref_rolle where benutzer_ref_rolleid in (
        select benutzer_ref_rolleid from (
            select * from srasync2('VEX',1002)
        )
        )
        and benutzer_ref_rolleid not in (
            select benutzer_ref_rolleid from t_et_b_ak_ref_thema_benutzer where benutzer_ref_rolleid is not null
        );
        
        
        -- FBEX die entzogen werden müssen, abzüglich der die im VKO/VEX-Register stehen
        delete from t_benutzer_ref_rolle where benutzer_ref_rolleid in (
        select benutzer_ref_rolleid from (
            select * from srasync2('FBEX',1006)
        )
        )
        and benutzer_ref_rolleid not in (
            select benutzer_ref_rolleid from t_et_b_ak_ref_thema_benutzer where benutzer_ref_rolleid is not null
        );        
            
    end pApplySRAData;
    
    
    procedure pSRAMain is
    begin
    
    
        pSyncKoala;
    
        koala_util.pLoadSRAData;
        koala_util.pApplySRAData;   
        
    exception
        when others then
            rollback;
            apex_mail.send(
                p_to => 'extern.thomas.tschernich@audi.de,extern.dominik.braunbeck@audi.de,werner1.niedermeier@audi.de',
                p_from => 'extern.thomas.tschernich@audi.de',
                p_subj => 'RegIndex: Fehler bei SRA Synchronisation',
                p_body => 'Die SRA Synchronisation konnte nicht durchgeführt werden.'
            );
            apex_mail.push_queue;
            commit;
    
    end pSRAMain;
    
    
    procedure pSyncKoala is
    begin
    
        MERGE INTO t_benutzer b
        USING (
            WITH cte1 AS (
                SELECT b.benutzerid, b.gid
                FROM t_benutzer b
                WHERE gid IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(gid) = 16
            )
            SELECT cte1.benutzerid, t.*
            FROM cte1,
            TABLE(koala_util.fLdapSearch(aSurname => NULL, aGid => cte1.gid)) t
        ) u
        ON (b.benutzerid = u.benutzerid)
        WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET 
            b.abteilung = u.subdepartment,
            b.email = u.mail,
            b.vorname = u.givenname,
            b.nachname = u.surname;
        commit;
        
        -- Update T_VERANTWORTLICHER table
        MERGE INTO t_verantwortlicher v
        USING (
            WITH cte1 AS (
                SELECT v.verantwortlicherid, v.gid
                FROM t_verantwortlicher v
                WHERE gid IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(gid) = 16
            )
            SELECT cte1.verantwortlicherid, t.*
            FROM cte1,
            TABLE(koala_util.fLdapSearch(aSurname => NULL, aGid => cte1.gid)) t
        ) u
        ON (v.verantwortlicherid = u.verantwortlicherid)
        WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET 
            v.abteilung = u.subdepartment,
            v.email = u.mail,
            v.vorname = u.givenname,
            v.nachname = u.surname;
    
        -- Update T_ANSPRECHPARTNER table
        MERGE INTO t_ansprechpartner a
        USING (
            WITH cte1 AS (
                SELECT a.ansprechpartnerid, a.gid
                FROM t_ansprechpartner a
                WHERE gid IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(gid) = 16
            )
            SELECT cte1.ansprechpartnerid, t.*
            FROM cte1,
            TABLE(koala_util.fLdapSearch(aSurname => NULL, aGid => cte1.gid)) t
        ) u
        ON (a.ansprechpartnerid = u.ansprechpartnerid)
        WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET 
            a.email_adresse = u.mail,
            a.vorname = u.givenname,
            a.nachname = u.surname,
            a.telefon = u.phone;
    
        COMMIT;    
    
    
    end pSyncKoala;

    
    

        
    
    
    

END KOALA_UTIL;
/












create or replace PACKAGE                      "LDAP_UTIL" 
AS

    function fLdapSearchAlt(
        aSurname in varchar2,
        aGivenname in varchar2 default null,
        aSubdept in varchar2 default null,
        aMail in varchar2 default null,
        aGid in varchar2 default null
    ) return t_ldap_table;
    
    function fLdapSearch(
        aSurname in varchar2,
        aGivenname in varchar2 default null,
        aSubdept in varchar2 default null,
        aMail in varchar2 default null,
        aGid in varchar2 default null
    ) return t_ldap_table;    
    
      procedure syncronizeUserDatawithLDAP;

END LDAP_UTIL;
/





create or replace PACKAGE BODY                      "LDAP_UTIL" AS

 --******************************************************************************
 --LDAP-Infos in Tabelle liefern
 --******************************************************************************

    function fLdapSearch(
        aSurname in varchar2,
        aGivenname in varchar2 default null,
        aSubdept in varchar2 default null,
        aMail in varchar2 default null,
        aGid in varchar2 default null
    ) return t_ldap_table as
    
        cLdapHost constant varchar2(250) := 'zebra.in.audi.vwg';
        cLdapPort constant number := 1636;
        cLdapBase constant varchar2(250) := 'DC=vwg,DC=com';
        cWallet constant varchar2(250) := 'file:/u00/app/oracle/admin/P181/wallet/VORSCHRIFTEN';
        cWalletPWD constant varchar2(250) := 'pw4+wallet+VORS+P';
        cLDAPBindUser constant varchar2(250) := 'cn=regulation_index,o=Adm,dc=Audi,dc=vwg,dc=com';
        cLDAPBindPass constant varchar2(250) := '02m5&trrpotvA2F9';
        lLdapFilter varchar2(250);
        lReturnValue number;
        lUserCount number;
        lLdapSession DBMS_LDAP.session;
        lLdapMessage DBMS_LDAP.message;
        lAttributeName varchar2(250);
        lLdapEntry DBMS_LDAP.message;
        lLdapElement DBMS_LDAP.ber_element;
        lAttributes DBMS_LDAP.string_collection;
        lValues DBMS_LDAP.STRING_COLLECTION;
        lLdapRow t_ldap_col;
        lLdapTable t_ldap_table := t_ldap_table();    
        
    begin

        lLdapFilter := '(&(sn=' || aSurname || '*)(givenname=' || aGivenname || '*)(subdepartment=' || aSubdept || '*)';
        if (aMail is not null) then
            lLdapFilter := lLdapFilter || '(mail=' || aMail || '*)';
        end if;
        lLdapFilter := lLdapFilter || '(gid=' || aGid || '*))';


        dbms_ldap.use_exception := true;
    
        lLdapSession := dbms_ldap.init(cLdapHost,cLdapPort);
    
        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.open_ssl(
                ld              => lLdapSession,
                sslwrl          => cWallet,
                sslwalletpasswd => cWalletPWD,
                sslauth         => 2 );

        lReturnValue := dbms_ldap.simple_bind_s(lLdapSession, cLDAPBindUser, cLDAPBindPass); 

        lAttributes(1) := 'telephoneNumber';
        lAttributes(2) := 'subdepartment';
        lAttributes(3) := 'mail';
        lAttributes(4) := 'givenName';
        lAttributes(5) := 'sn';
        lAttributes(6) := 'employeeNumber';
        lAttributes(7) := 'costCenter';
        lAttributes(8) := 'ntPrimaryUserAccount';
        lAttributes(9) := 'l';
        lAttributes(10):= 'gid';

        lAttributes(11) := 'roomNumber';
        lAttributes(12) := 'subDepartmentLong';
        lAttributes(13) := 'cn';

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.search_s(lLdapSession, cLdapBase, DBMS_LDAP.SCOPE_SUBTREE, lLdapFilter, lAttributes, 0, lLdapMessage);
        lUserCount := DBMS_LDAP.count_entries(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);

        lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.first_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);

        while lLdapEntry IS NOT NULL
        loop

            lAttributeName := DBMS_LDAP.first_attribute(lLdapSession,lLdapEntry,lLdapElement);
            lLdapRow := t_ldap_col(null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null);

            WHILE lAttributeName IS NOT NULL
            LOOP

                lValues := DBMS_LDAP.get_values (lLdapSession, lLdapEntry, lAttributeName);

                IF (lValues.count > 0) THEN

                    case lAttributeName
                        when 'gid' then lLdapRow.GID:= lValues(0);
                        when 'sn' then lLdapRow.surname := lValues(0);
                        when 'givenName' then lLdapRow.givenName := lValues(0);
                        when 'subDepartment' then lLdapRow.SUBDEPARTMENT := lValues(0);
                        when 'mail' then lLdapRow.mail := lValues(0);
                        when 'telephoneNumber' then lLdapRow.phone := lValues(0);
                        else null;
                    end case;

                end if;

                lAttributeName := DBMS_LDAP.next_attribute(lLdapSession,lLdapEntry,lLdapElement);

            end loop;

            lLdapTable.extend();
            lLdapTable(lLdapTable.count) := lLdapRow;

            lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.next_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapEntry);

        end loop;

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.unbind_s(lLdapSession);

        return lLdapTable;

    exception
        when others then
            lLdapRow := t_ldap_col(GID           => 'XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX',
                                   SURNAME       => 'ACL',
                                   GIVENNAME     => 'Freischaltung',
                                   SUBDEPARTMENT => 'Zebra',
                                   MAIL          => 'fehlt',
                                   PHONE         => '',
                                   COSTCENTER    => '',
                                   EN            => '');
            lLdapTable := t_ldap_table();
            lLdapTable.extend();
            lLdapTable(1) := lLdapRow;
            return lLdapTable;

    end fLdapSearch;        


    function fLdapSearchAlt(
        aSurname in varchar2,
        aGivenname in varchar2 default null,
        aSubdept in varchar2 default null,
        aMail in varchar2 default null,
        aGid in varchar2 default null
    ) return t_ldap_table as

        cLdapHost constant varchar2(250) := 'zebra.in.audi.vwg';
        cLdapPort constant number := 1389;
        cLdapBase constant varchar2(250) := 'DC=Audi,DC=vwg,DC=com';
        lLdapFilter varchar2(250);
        lReturnValue number;
        lUserCount number;
        lLdapSession DBMS_LDAP.session;
        lLdapMessage DBMS_LDAP.message;
        lAttributeName varchar2(250);
        lLdapEntry DBMS_LDAP.message;
        lLdapElement DBMS_LDAP.ber_element;
        lAttributes DBMS_LDAP.string_collection;
        lValues DBMS_LDAP.STRING_COLLECTION;
        lLdapRow t_ldap_col;
        lLdapTable t_ldap_table := t_ldap_table();

    begin

        lLdapFilter := '(&(sn=' || aSurname || '*)(givenname=' || aGivenname || '*)(subdepartment=' || aSubdept || '*)';
        if (aMail is not null) then
            lLdapFilter := lLdapFilter || '(mail=' || aMail || '*)';
        end if;
        lLdapFilter := lLdapFilter || '(gid=' || aGid || '*))';

        DBMS_LDAP.USE_EXCEPTION := TRUE;
        lLdapSession := DBMS_LDAP.init(cLdapHost,cLdapPort);
        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.simple_bind_s(lLdapSession,null, null);

        lAttributes(1) := 'telephoneNumber';
        lAttributes(2) := 'subdepartment';
        lAttributes(3) := 'mail';
        lAttributes(4) := 'givenName';
        lAttributes(5) := 'sn';
        lAttributes(6) := 'employeeNumber';
        lAttributes(7) := 'costCenter';
        lAttributes(8) := 'ntPrimaryUserAccount';
        lAttributes(9) := 'l';
        lAttributes(10):= 'gid';

        lAttributes(11) := 'roomNumber';
        lAttributes(12) := 'subDepartmentLong';
        lAttributes(13) := 'cn';

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.search_s(lLdapSession, cLdapBase, DBMS_LDAP.SCOPE_SUBTREE, lLdapFilter, lAttributes, 0, lLdapMessage);
        lUserCount := DBMS_LDAP.count_entries(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);

        lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.first_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapMessage);

        while lLdapEntry IS NOT NULL
        loop

            lAttributeName := DBMS_LDAP.first_attribute(lLdapSession,lLdapEntry,lLdapElement);
            lLdapRow := t_ldap_col(null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null);

            WHILE lAttributeName IS NOT NULL
            LOOP

                lValues := DBMS_LDAP.get_values (lLdapSession, lLdapEntry, lAttributeName);

                IF (lValues.count > 0) THEN

                    case lAttributeName
                        when 'gid' then lLdapRow.GID:= lValues(0);
                        when 'sn' then lLdapRow.surname := lValues(0);
                        when 'givenName' then lLdapRow.givenName := lValues(0);
                        when 'subDepartment' then lLdapRow.SUBDEPARTMENT := lValues(0);
                        when 'mail' then lLdapRow.mail := lValues(0);
                        when 'telephoneNumber' then lLdapRow.phone := lValues(0);
                        else null;
                    end case;

                end if;

                lAttributeName := DBMS_LDAP.next_attribute(lLdapSession,lLdapEntry,lLdapElement);

            end loop;

            lLdapTable.extend();
            lLdapTable(lLdapTable.count) := lLdapRow;

            lLdapEntry := DBMS_LDAP.next_entry(lLdapSession, lLdapEntry);

        end loop;

        lReturnValue := DBMS_LDAP.unbind_s(lLdapSession);

        return lLdapTable;

    exception
        when others then
            lLdapRow := t_ldap_col(GID           => 'XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX',
                                   SURNAME       => 'ACL',
                                   GIVENNAME     => 'Freischaltung',
                                   SUBDEPARTMENT => 'Zebra',
                                   MAIL          => 'fehlt',
                                   PHONE         => '',
                                   COSTCENTER    => '',
                                   EN            => '');
            lLdapTable := t_ldap_table();
            lLdapTable.extend();
            lLdapTable(1) := lLdapRow;
            return lLdapTable;

    end fLdapSearchAlt;
   procedure syncronizeUserDatawithLDAP is

  snachname T_Benutzer.nachname%type;
  svorname T_Benutzer.vorname%type;
  sabteilung T_Benutzer.abteilung%type;
  semail T_Benutzer.email%type;
  sphone T_Benutzer.telefon%type;
  icounter number :=0;
 BEGIN
  FOR cu IN (select gid, letzte_aenderung_datum from T_Benutzer where gid is not null and gid != '5' and status = 10 for update) Loop
    if (cu.gid is null) then 
       continue;
    end if;
    begin
      select surname, givenname, subdepartment, mail, phone 
      into snachname, svorname, sabteilung, semail, sphone
      from Table(ldap_util.fLdapSearch( aSurname => null, aGid => cu.gid));

      EXCEPTION
       WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
       --dbms_output.put_line('no data found for ' || cu.gid ||  ', changed ' || to_char(cu.letzte_aenderung_datum, 'dd.mm.yyyy hh24:mi:ss'));
        continue;
    end;

    UPDATE T_Benutzer SET --nachname = snachname, vorname = svorname,  
    abteilung = sabteilung /*,
         email = semail, telefon = sphone  */
    WHERE gid = cu.gid 
      AND ( /*nvl(nachname,'#') != nvl(snachname,'#') OR nvl(vorname,'#') != nvl(svorname,'#') OR */
      nvl(abteilung,'#') != nvl(sabteilung,'#') /*OR
         nvl(email,'#') != nvl(semail,'#') OR nvl(telefon,'#') != nvl(sphone,'#')*/
         );
    --dbms_output.put_line(' found ' || snachname || ', ' || svorname || ' for ' || cu.gid ||  ', changed ' || to_char(cu.letzte_aenderung_datum, 'dd.mm.yyyy hh24:mi:ss'));
   icounter := icounter+1;
  END LOOP;
  commit;
  dbms_output.put_line(' syncronized: ' || to_char(icounter) );
END syncronizeUserDatawithLDAP;

END LDAP_UTIL;
/





create or replace PACKAGE "PCK_AK" AS 

    function fValidateDeleteVKO(aETB_AK_REF_BENUTZERID in number) return varchar2;


END PCK_AK;
/


create or replace PACKAGE BODY "PCK_AK" AS

    function fValidateDeleteVKO(aETB_AK_REF_BENUTZERID in number) return varchar2 AS
        lAKID number;
        lBenutzerid number;
        lAnzahl number;
        lArbeitskreise varchar2(250);
    BEGIN
        select et_b_akid, benutzerid into lAKID, lBenutzerid
        from t_et_b_ak_ref_benutzer
        where et_b_ak_ref_benutzerid = aETB_AK_REF_BENUTZERID;

        -- Je Vorschrift, in denen der VKO Lead ist:
        for v in (select vorschriftid, vorschrift_nummer from t_vorschrift where lead_vko_benutzerid = lBenutzerid) loop

            with cte1 as (
                -- Arbeitskreise der Vorschrift
                select et_b_akid
                from t_vorschrift_ref_et_b_ak r
                where r.vorschriftid = v.vorschriftid and geloescht = 0

                intersect

                -- Arbeitskreise die beim Benutzer nach dem Löschvorgang übrig sind
                select et_b_akid
                from t_et_b_ak_ref_benutzer
                where benutzerid = lBenutzerid and et_b_akid != lAKID
            )
            select count(*) into lAnzahl
            from cte1;

            if (lAnzahl = 0) then
                -- Es bleibt nach dem Löschvorgang keine Schnittmenge übrig, Löschvorgang ist daher nicht erlaubt
                select listagg(ak.kurz, ', ') within group (order by ak.kurz) into lArbeitskreise
                from t_et_b_ak_ref_benutzer r
                join t_et_b_ak ak on (r.et_b_akid = ak.et_b_akid)
                where r.benutzerid = lBenutzerid;
                return 'Der Anwender ist den Arbeitskreisen ' || lArbeitskreise || ' als VKO zugeordnet. Der Löschvorgang ist daher wegen der Vorschrift ' || v.vorschrift_nummer || ' nicht erlaubt!';
            end if;

        end loop;

        RETURN null;
    END fValidateDeleteVKO;

END PCK_AK;
/

    -- Update individual MfV ticket
    PROCEDURE pUpdateMfVTicket(
        p_mfvid NUMBER
    );

    -- Auto-update open tickets - end















  
END PCK_CIP_JIRA;
/




create or replace PACKAGE BODY "PCK_CIP_JIRA" AS
gENVIRONMENT constant varchar2(250) := 'TVET';
gENVIRONMENT_KEY constant varchar2(50) := '28202';--24805 für P
 
procedure postNewTicketinQueue(aVorschriftId NUMBER, aMFV_TEILID NUMBER,aAKIDS VARCHAR2 default null,aSchlagwörter VARCHAR2 default null, aZusVorschriften  VARCHAR2 default null, aMFVID VARCHAR2 default null, aprevMFVid number default null,aCocoaTicket VARCHAR2 default null) as
begin 
 insert into t_jira_post(POST_CLOB,COCOA_TICKET)
 select fCreateJiraUrlAssistent(aVorschriftId, aMFV_TEILID ,aAKIDS ,aSchlagwörter , aZusVorschriften  , aMFVID , aprevMFVid , aCocoaTicket),aCocoaTicket
 from dual;
end postNewTicketinQueue ;
 procedure pUpdateNummer as
begin  null;
 end  pUpdateNummer;
procedure pUpdateJira
as
 begin null;
end pUpdateJira;
procedure pUpdateUrl
as
begin  null;
end pUpdateUrl;
procedure pUpdateRXSWIN
as
begin  null;
end pUpdateRXSWIN;
procedure pUpdateThema as
begin null;
end pUpdateThema;
 
procedure pCheckChanges (aVorschriftId NUMBER) as
VNummerAktuell number;
VNummerHistory number;
VTitelAktuell number;
VTitelHistory number;
VUrlAktuell number;
VUrlHistory number;
VRXSWINAktuell number;
VRXSWINHistory number;
--VThemaAktuell varchar2(4000 char);
 
begin
 
  /*  select VORSCHRIFT_NUMMER into VNummerAktuell
    from T_VORSCHRIFT
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId;
 
 
    select VORSCHRIFT_NUMMER into VNummerHistory
    from T_H_VORSCHRIFT
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId
    order by LETZTE_AENDERUNG_DATUM desc
    fetch first 1 row only;
 
    if VNummerAktuell != VNummerHistory then pUpdateNummer;
    end if;
 
    select VORSCHRIFT_BEZEICHNUNG into VTitelAktuell
    from T_VORSCHRIFT
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId;
 
 
    select VORSCHRIFT_BEZEICHNUNG into VTitelHistory
    from T_H_VORSCHRIFT
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId
    order by LETZTE_AENDERUNG_DATUM desc
    fetch first 1 row only;
 
    if VTitelAktuell != VTitelHistory then pUpdateJira;
    end if;
 
    select URL_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT into VUrlAktuell
    from T_VORSCHRIFT
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId
    order by LETZTE_AENDERUNG_DATUM desc
    fetch first 1 row only;
 
 
    select URL_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT into VUrlHistory
    from T_H_VORSCHRIFT
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId
    order by LETZTE_AENDERUNG_DATUM desc
    fetch first 1 row only;
 
    if VUrlAktuell != VUrlHistory then pUpdateUrl;
    end if;
 
    select RXSWIN into VRXSWINAktuell
    from T_VORSCHRIFT
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId;
 
 
    select RXSWIN into VRXSWINHistory
    from T_H_VORSCHRIFT
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId
    order by LETZTE_AENDERUNG_DATUM desc
    fetch first 1 row only;
 
    if VRXSWINAktuell != VRXSWINHistory then pUpdateRXSWIN;
    end if;*/
/*    
    select listagg(LANDID,', ')within group (order by LANDID)  VLANDAktuell
    from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_LAND
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId;
 
    select listagg(LANDID,', ')within group (order by LANDID) VLandHistory
    from T_H_VORSCHRIFT_REF_LAND
    where VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId;*/
 
-- Themen
/*with cte1 as (  
    Select VORSCHRIFTID, listagg(THEMAID,':') within group (order by THEMAID) VThemaAktuell
    from t_vorschrift_ref_thema 
    where letzte_aenderung_datum >= sysdate - 1000
    and VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId
    group by VORSCHRIFTID
),
 
cte2 as (   
    select ROW_NUMBER() OVER(
            PARTITION BY themaid
            ORDER BY
                letzte_aenderung_datum DESC) xrow, th.geloescht, themaid
        from T_H_VORSCHRIFT_REF_THEMA th
        left join cte1 on cte1.VORSCHRIFTID =  th.VORSCHRIFTID
        where th.VORSCHRIFTID = aVorschriftId
        and THEMAID in (select column_value from apex_string.split(VThemaAktuell,':'))
    )
 
    select * from cte2 t2
    left join cte2 t3 on (t2.themaid = t3.themaid and t3.xrow = 2)
    where t2.xrow = 1;
 
if t2.geloescht != t3.geloescht 
    then pUpdateThema;
end if;*/
 
 
 
    null;
end pCheckChanges;
 
 
 
  procedure ploadCIPJira AS
  BEGIN
  debug('MFV-Beladung','Start MFV-Beladung');
  
for c in (Select mfv_cip_tmpid from t_x_mfv_cip_tmp)
loop  
MERGE INTO t_x_mfv_cip tm
USING (
 
              SELECT
                  x.*,t.*
 
 
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip_tmp t, 
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$.issues[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              restjson CLOB FORMAT JSON PATH '$',
                               jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id',
                             lastupdate date path '$.fields.updated'
                          )
                      )
                  x
 
 
                  where t.mfv_cip_tmpid = c.mfv_cip_tmpid
                  ) u
 on (tm.jira_key =u.jirakey)   
 when matched then update set tm.LAST_CHECKED =u.LAST_CHECKED, mfv_data_clob =u.restjson, tm.LAST_UPDATE = u.lastupdate
when not matched then insert (mfv_data_clob,ZEITPUNKT,JIRA_KEY,LAST_CHECKED,LAST_UPDATE)
values(u.restjson,sysdate,u.jirakey,sysdate,sysdate); 
commit;
 
 
delete from t_x_mfv_cip_tmp t where t.mfv_cip_tmpid = c.mfv_cip_tmpid ;
end loop;
 
 
 
-- Einfügen neuer MFVs
MERGE INTO t_mfv tm
USING (
          WITH cte1 AS (
              SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
 
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              json VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$',
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id', issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
                       --cf19470 varchar2(250) path '$.fields.customfield_19470',
                       --cf10288 varchar2(250) path '$.fields.customfield_10288',
                              NESTED PATH '$.fields.customfield_16813[*]'
                                  COLUMNS (
                                      mfv_teil VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.value'
                                  ),--  Teil
                     /*  nested path '$.fields.customfield_18109[*]'  columns(
                       AKTIVITAET varchar2(250) path '$.value' ),*/
                              thema VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.summary'            -- Thema der MfV
                              ,
                              beteiligte_oes VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_17002'   -- abteilung OE
                              ,
                              status_umgebung VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.environment'        -- Umgebung-status
                              ,
                              linksammelordner VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_17321'
                      /* ,  nested path '$.fields.components[*]' columns(
                       AK_kurz   varchar2(250) path '$.name')*/,
                              vorschriftnummer_klar VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_18301',
                              vorschriftid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_18411',
                              erstelldatum_jira VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.created',
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              status VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.status.name',
                              environment VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.environment'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE
                  substr(jirakey, 0, 4) = gENVIRONMENT and issuetypeid in (3,13733,14201) and mfv_teil not in ('Konzernweite Abstimmung')
          )
          SELECT DISTINCT
              t1.beteiligte_oes,
              t1.jirakey,
              t1.thema mfv_thema,
              t1.mfv_name,
              t1.environment,
       --       aktivitaet,
         /*     CASE
                  WHEN aktivitaet = 'Ohne MfV beendet' THEN
                      20
                  WHEN t1.status IN (
                      'Geschlossen',
                      'Geprüft',
                      'Freigabe'
                  ) THEN
                      10
                  ELSE
                      0
              END AS status_closed,*/
              tm.mfvid,
             trim( linksammelordner) linksammelordner
          FROM
              cte1    t1
              LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv   tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
        /*  WHERE 
          NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT
                      1
                  FROM
                      cte1 t
                  WHERE
                      t1.jirakey = t.jirakey
                      AND t.mfv_teil IN (
                         'Konzernweite Abstimmung'
                      )
             )
*/
            /*  AND NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT
                      1
                  FROM
                      cte1 t
                  WHERE
                      t1.jirakey = t.jirakey
                      AND t.ak_kurz IN (
                          'Testticket'
                      )
              )*/
-- and not exists (Select 1 from cte1 ta where t1.jiraid = ta.jiraid and ta.aktivitaet ='Ohne MfV beendet')
      )
u ON ( tm.mfvid = u.mfvid )
/*when matched then update set
 mf.mfv_teilid = u.mfv_teilid,
 mf.mfv_thema = u.mfv_thema,
mf.beteiligte_oes =u.beteiligte_oes,
mf.jira_ticket =u.jira_key,
mf.mfv_name = u.mfv_name, 
    mf.link_mfv_dms = u.linksammelordner,
  dms_dokumentenstatus =20  */
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT (
    beteiligte_oes,
    jira_ticket,
    mfv_thema,
    mfv_name,
    ksuid,
    dms_dokumentenstatus,
   -- jira_status,
    umgebungsstatus,
    link_mfv_dms)
VALUES
    ( u.beteiligte_oes,
      u.jirakey,
      u.mfv_thema,
      u.mfv_name,
    1020,
    20,
 --     u.status_closed,
      u.environment,
    TRIM(u.linksammelordner)
     );
 
--update alter MFVs
 
MERGE INTO t_mfv tm
USING ( with cte1 as (
         SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
                    --case when status in ('Geschlossen','Geprüft','Freigabe')then 10 else 0 end as status_closed
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              json VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$',
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id', issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
                       --cf19470 varchar2(250) path '$.fields.customfield_19470',
                       --cf10288 varchar2(250) path '$.fields.customfield_10288',
                              NESTED PATH '$.fields.customfield_16813[*]'
                                  COLUMNS (
                                      mfv_teil VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.value'
                                  ),--  Teil
                     /*  nested path '$.fields.customfield_18109[*]'  columns(
                       AKTIVITAET varchar2(250) path '$.value' ),*/
                              thema VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.summary'            -- Thema der MfV
                              ,
                              beteiligte_oes VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_17002'   -- abteilung OE
                              ,
                              status_umgebung VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.environment'        -- Umgebung-status
                              ,
                              linksammelordner VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_17321'
                      /* ,  nested path '$.fields.components[*]' columns(
                       AK_kurz   varchar2(250) path '$.name')*/,
                              vorschriftnummer_klar VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_18301',
                              vorschriftid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_18411',
                              erstelldatum_jira VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.created',
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              status VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.status.name',
                              environment VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.environment'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE
                  substr(jirakey, 0, 4) = gENVIRONMENT and issuetypeid in (3,13733,14201) --and mfv_teil not in ('Konzernweite Abstimmung')
          ), cte_old AS (
              SELECT DISTINCT
                  t1.beteiligte_oes,
                  t1.jirakey,
                  t1.thema mfv_thema,
                  t1.mfv_name,
                  t1.environment,
                 /* CASE
                      WHEN aktivitaet = 'Ohne MfV beendet' THEN
                          20
                      WHEN t1.status IN (
                          'Geschlossen',
                          'Geprüft',
                          'Freigabe'
                      ) THEN
                          10
                      ELSE
                          0
                  END AS status_closed,*/
                  tm.mfvid,
                  linksammelordner
              FROM
                  cte1    t1
                  LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv   tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
 
 
          )
          SELECT DISTINCT
              t1.beteiligte_oes,
              t1.jirakey,
              t1.mfv_thema, --tm.mfv_thema thema_old,
              t1.mfv_name,-- tm.mfv_name name_old,
              t1.environment,-- tm.UMGEBUNGSSTATUS UMGEBUNGSSTATUS_old,
            --  t1.status_closed, --tm. jira_status  status_closed_old
              t1.mfvid,
              t1.linksammelordner --, LINK_MFV_DMS
          FROM
              cte_old   t1
              LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv     tm ON ( t1.mfvid = tm.mfvid )
          WHERE
              nvl(t1.mfv_thema, 'A') != nvl(tm.mfv_thema, 'A')
              OR nvl(t1.mfv_name, 'A') != nvl(tm.mfv_name, 'A')
              OR t1.environment != tm.umgebungsstatus
            --  OR t1.status_closed != tm.jira_status
              OR TRIM(t1.linksammelordner) != tm.link_mfv_dms
      )
u ON ( tm.mfvid = u.mfvid )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
SET tm.umgebungsstatus = u.environment,
    tm.mfv_thema = u.mfv_thema,
  --  tm.jira_status = u.status_closed,
    tm.link_mfv_dms = TRIM(u.linksammelordner),
    tm.mfv_name = u.mfv_name;
 
--Ermitteln des Dokumentenstatus
MERGE INTO t_mfv tm
USING (  with cte1 as (
         SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
                    --case when status in ('Geschlossen','Geprüft','Freigabe')then 10 else 0 end as status_closed
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              json VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$',
 
                             nested path '$.fields.customfield_18109[*]'  columns(
                                 AKTIVITAET varchar2(250) path '$.value' ),
                              status_umgebung VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.environment'        -- Umgebung-status
                              ,
                              linksammelordner VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_17321',
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              status VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.status.name'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE issuetypeid in (13733,14201)
 
 
 
), cte2 as (
Select jirakey, case when AKTIVITAET = 'Ohne MfV beendet' then 40 when linksammelordner is not null and substr(trim(linksammelordner),0,5) = 'https'  and status in ('Geschlossen','Geprüft','Freigabe') then 20 else 10 end as status,
row_number() over (partition by jirakey order by case when AKTIVITAET = 'Ohne MfV beendet' then 1 else 999 end asc) xrow 
from cte1)
Select t2.jirakey, t2.status, tm.mfvid
from cte2  t2
LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv    tm ON ( t2.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket   )
where xrow = 1 and NVL(tm.dms_dokumentenstatus,10) != nvl(t2.status,10)
)
u ON ( tm.mfvid = u.mfvid )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
tm.dms_dokumentenstatus = u.status;
 
-- Einfügen der Labels
MERGE INTO t_mfv tm
USING ( with cte1 as (
         SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
                    --case when status in ('Geschlossen','Geprüft','Freigabe')then 10 else 0 end as status_closed
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
 
                       nested path '$.fields.labels[*]'  columns(
                       labels varchar2(250) path '$'  ),
 
 
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key'
 
                          )
                      )
                  x
 
          ), cte2 as (
          Select jirakey, listagg(labels,', ') within group (order by labels) schlagworte
          from cte1 t1
          group by jirakey
          )
          Select t2.jirakey, t2.schlagworte , tm.mfvid
          from cte2 t2
          LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv    tm ON ( t2.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket  )
          where nvl(t2.schlagworte,'1') != nvl(tm.schlagworte,'1')
          )
u ON ( tm.mfvid = u.mfvid )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
SET  tm.schlagworte = u.schlagworte;
-- Einfügen des Jira Status
  debug('MFV-Beladung','Jira-Status');
MERGE INTO t_mfv tm
USING ( with cte1 as (
         SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
                    --case when status in ('Geschlossen','Geprüft','Freigabe')then 10 else 0 end as status_closed
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
  mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
                       nested path '$.fields.customfield_18109[*]'  columns(
                       AKTIVITAET varchar2(250) path '$.value' ),
 
 
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              status VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.status.name'
                          )
                      )
                  x
                  --where jirakey = 'TVRB-25767'
               --and mfv_teil not in ('Konzernweite Abstimmung')
          ), cte_res as (
              SELECT DISTINCT
            CASE 
                        WHEN aktivitaet = 'Ohne MfV beendet' and t1.mfv_name = 'ohne MfV' THEN
                          20
                      WHEN t1.status IN (
                          'Geschlossen',
                          'Geprüft',
                          'Freigabe'
                      ) THEN
                          10
                      ELSE
                          0
                  END AS status_closed,
                  tm.mfvid
              FROM
                  cte1    t1
                  LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv   tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
            where nvl(tm.jira_status,-1) != case WHEN aktivitaet = 'Ohne MfV beendet' THEN
                          20
                      WHEN t1.status IN (
                          'Geschlossen',
                          'Geprüft',
                          'Freigabe'
                      ) THEN
                          10
                      ELSE
                          0 end
)
Select mfvid, max(status_closed) status_closed
from cte_res
group by mfvid
 
 
      )
u ON ( tm.mfvid = u.mfvid )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
SET 
  tm.jira_status = u.status_closed
    ;
 
--Einfügen der Teile
 
MERGE INTO t_mfv_ref_mfv_teil tr
USING (
          WITH cte1 AS (
              SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
                    --case when status in ('Geschlossen','Geprüft','Freigabe')then 10 else 0 end as status_closed
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id', issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
                       --cf19470 varchar2(250) path '$.fields.customfield_19470',
                       --cf10288 varchar2(250) path '$.fields.customfield_10288',
                              NESTED PATH '$.fields.customfield_16813[*]'
                                  COLUMNS (
                                      mfv_teil VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.value',
                                      mf_teilid NUMBER PATH '$.id'
                                  ),--  Teil
 
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE
                  substr(jirakey, 0, 4) = gENVIRONMENT and issuetypeid in (3,13733,14201) and mfv_teil not in ('Konzernweite Abstimmung')
          )
          SELECT
              tm.mfvid,
              tmt.mfv_teilid,
              t1.mfv_teil
          FROM
              cte1         t1
              JOIN t_mfv        tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
              LEFT JOIN t_mfv_teil   tmt ON (( t1.mfv_teil = 'MfV Teil ' || tmt.teil and t1.issuetypeid = 3)or (tmt.teil = 1 and t1.issuetypeid = 13733) or (tmt.teil = 2 and t1.issuetypeid = 14201))
          WHERE
              t1.mfv_teil IS NOT NULL and tmt.mfv_teilid is not null
 
--and t1.mfv_name is not null --and t1.ak_kurz != 'Testticket' 
      )
u ON ( tr.mfvid = u.mfvid
       AND tr.mfv_teilid = u.mfv_teilid )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT (
    mfvid,
    mfv_teilid )
VALUES
    ( u.mfvid,
      u.mfv_teilid );
-- löschen der nicht mehr vorhandenen Teile
 
delete from t_mfv_ref_mfv_teil tr
where mfv_ref_mfv_teilid in  (
          WITH cte1 AS (
              SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id', issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
 
                              NESTED PATH '$.fields.customfield_16813[*]'
                                  COLUMNS (
                                      mfv_teil VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.value',
                                      mf_teilid NUMBER PATH '$.id'
                                  ),--  Teil
 
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE
                  substr(jirakey, 0, 4) = gENVIRONMENT and issuetypeid in (3,13733,14201) and mfv_teil not in ('Konzernweite Abstimmung')
          ),cte_list as (
          SELECT
              tm.mfvid,
              tmt.mfv_teilid,
              t1.mfv_teil
          FROM
              cte1         t1
              JOIN t_mfv        tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
              LEFT JOIN t_mfv_teil   tmt ON (( t1.mfv_teil = 'MfV Teil ' || tmt.teil and t1.issuetypeid = 3)or (tmt.teil = 1 and t1.issuetypeid = 13733) or (tmt.teil = 2 and t1.issuetypeid = 14201))
          WHERE
              t1.mfv_teil IS NOT NULL and tmt.mfv_teilid is not null
            )
            Select trt.mfv_ref_mfv_teilid 
            from t_mfv_ref_mfv_teil trt
            where exists (Select 1 from cte_list ctl where trt.mfvid = ctl.mfvid ) and not exists (Select 1 from  cte_list ctl where trt.mfvid = ctl.mfvid and trt.mfv_teilid= ctl.mfv_teilid ) 
 
      );
---Einfügen der einzelnen Arbeitskreise
 
MERGE INTO t_mfv_ref_et_b_ak tm
USING (
          WITH cte1 AS (
              SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
                    --case when status in ('Geschlossen','Geprüft','Freigabe')then 10 else 0 end as status_closed
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id', issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
                              NESTED PATH '$.fields.components[*]'
                                  COLUMNS (
                                      ak_kurz VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.name'
                                  ),
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE
                  substr(jirakey, 0, 4) = gENVIRONMENT and issuetypeid in (3,13733,14201)
          )
          SELECT
              teak.et_b_akid,
              tm.mfvid,
              mfv_ref_et_b_akid
          FROM
              cte1                t1
              JOIN t_mfv               tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
              JOIN t_et_b_ak           teak ON ( t1.ak_kurz = teak.kurz )
              LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv_ref_et_b_ak   tmr ON ( tm.mfvid = tmr.mfvid
                                                         AND teak.et_b_akid = tmr.et_b_akid )
      )
u ON ( tm.mfv_ref_et_b_akid = u.mfv_ref_et_b_akid )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT (
    mfvid,
    et_b_akid )
VALUES
    ( u.mfvid,
      u.et_b_akid );
--Löschen der überzähligen AK auf test ausdokumentiert Aufgrund der falschen Nummern aus TVET
 /*
delete from t_mfv_ref_et_b_ak tm
where mfv_ref_et_b_akid in (
          WITH cte1 AS (
              SELECT 
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
                    --case when status in ('Geschlossen','Geprüft','Freigabe')then 10 else 0 end as status_closed
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id', issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
                              NESTED PATH '$.fields.components[*]'
                                  COLUMNS (
                                      ak_kurz VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.name'
                                  ),
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE
                  substr(jirakey, 0, 4) = gENVIRONMENT and issuetypeid in (3,13733,14201)
          ), cte_list as (
          SELECT
              teak.et_b_akid,
              tm.mfvid,
              mfv_ref_et_b_akid
          FROM
              cte1                t1
              JOIN t_mfv               tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
              JOIN t_et_b_ak           teak ON ( t1.ak_kurz = teak.kurz )
              LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv_ref_et_b_ak   tmr ON ( tm.mfvid = tmr.mfvid
                                                         AND teak.et_b_akid = tmr.et_b_akid )
             )
              Select tmra.mfv_ref_et_b_akid
              from t_mfv_ref_et_b_ak  tmra
              where exists (Select 1 from  cte_list ctl where ctl.mfvid = tmra.mfvid) 
              and not exists (Select 1 from  cte_list ctl where ctl.mfvid = tmra.mfvid and ctl.et_b_akid = tmra.et_b_akid)  
      );

-- nach nummer
 
MERGE INTO t_mfv_ref_vorschrift tmr
USING (
          WITH cte1 AS (
              SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              ak_kurz VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.components.name',
                              vorschriftid VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_18411',
                              vorschriftnummer_klar VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_18301'
                          )
                      )
                  x
                    --where jirakey = 'TVRB-25171'
                        --,'TVRB-21716' and mfv_teil not in ('Konzernweite Abstimmung')
          ), cte2_lb AS (
              SELECT
                  mfv_name,
                  jirakey,
                  ak_kurz,
                  TRIM(regexp_substr(t.vorschriftid, '[^('
                                                     || CHR(13)
                                                     || CHR(10)
                                                     || ')]+', 1, levels.column_value)) AS vorschriftlink_einzeln,
                  levels.column_value
              FROM
                  cte1 t,
                  TABLE ( CAST(MULTISET(
                      SELECT
                          level
                      FROM
                          dual
                      CONNECT BY
                          level <= regexp_count(t.vorschriftid, '[^('
                                                                || CHR(13)
                                                                || CHR(10)
                                                                || ')]') + 1
                  ) AS sys.odcinumberlist) ) levels
              WHERE
                  instr(t.vorschriftid, ',') = 0
          ), cte2_comma AS (
              SELECT
                  mfv_name,
                  jirakey,
                  ak_kurz,
                  TRIM(regexp_substr(t.vorschriftid, '[^,]+', 1, levels.column_value)) AS vorschriftlink_einzeln
              FROM
                  cte1 t,
                  TABLE ( CAST(MULTISET(
                      SELECT
                          level
                      FROM
                          dual
                      CONNECT BY
                          level <= regexp_count(t.vorschriftid, ',') + 1
                  ) AS sys.odcinumberlist) ) levels
              WHERE
                  instr(t.vorschriftid, ',') > 0
          ), cte2 AS (
              SELECT
                  mfv_name,
                  jirakey,
                  ak_kurz,
                  vorschriftlink_einzeln
              FROM
                  cte2_lb
                   where   vorschriftlink_einzeln is not null
              UNION
              SELECT
                  mfv_name,
                  jirakey,
                  ak_kurz,
                  vorschriftlink_einzeln
              FROM
                  cte2_comma
                  where   vorschriftlink_einzeln is not null
          ), cte3 AS (
              SELECT
                  tm.mfvid,
                 /* TRIM(regexp_replace(replace(vorschriftlink_einzeln, 'https://apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-sp/apex-sp/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:'
                  , ''), '[[:space:]]', '')) */
                   TRIM(regexp_replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(vorschriftlink_einzeln, 'https://apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-sp/apex-sp/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:',''),
                  'https://pre-apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-vt/apex-carmahvt/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:'
                  , ''),'https://pre-apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-tv/apex-carmahvt/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:',''),'https://apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-vp/apex-carmahvp/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:',''), '[[:space:]]', '')) AS vorschriftid,
                  t1.jirakey
              FROM
                  cte2    t1
                  JOIN t_mfv   tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
 
                                    --where t1.mfv_name is not null  
              WHERE
                  t1.jirakey != 'TVRB-19195'
          )
          SELECT
              t1.*,
              mfv_ref_vorschriftid
          FROM
              cte3                   t1
              LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv_ref_vorschrift   tm ON ( regexp_replace(TRIM(t1.vorschriftid),'\(.*\)' ) = tm.vorschriftid
                                                           AND t1.mfvid = tm.mfvid )
          WHERE
              t1.vorschriftid IS NOT NULL and   validate_conversion(t1.vorschriftid as NUMBER)=1
      )
u ON ( tmr.mfv_ref_vorschriftid = u.mfv_ref_vorschriftid )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT (
    tmr.mfvid,
    tmr.vorschriftid )
VALUES
    ( u.mfvid,
      u.vorschriftid );
 --löschen alter nummern
 
delete from  t_mfv_ref_vorschrift tmr
where mfv_ref_vorschriftid in(
          WITH cte1 AS (
              SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]'
                          COLUMNS (
                              mfv_name VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_11635',
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              ak_kurz VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.components.name',
                              vorschriftid VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_18411',
                              vorschriftnummer_klar VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_18301'
                          )
                      )
                  x
                    --where jirakey = 'TVRB-25171'
                        --,'TVRB-21716' and mfv_teil not in ('Konzernweite Abstimmung')
          ), cte2_lb AS (
              SELECT
                  mfv_name,
                  jirakey,
                  ak_kurz,
                  TRIM(regexp_substr(t.vorschriftid, '[^('
                                                     || CHR(13)
                                                     || CHR(10)
                                                     || ')]+', 1, levels.column_value)) AS vorschriftlink_einzeln,
                  levels.column_value
              FROM
                  cte1 t,
                  TABLE ( CAST(MULTISET(
                      SELECT
                          level
                      FROM
                          dual
                      CONNECT BY
                          level <= regexp_count(t.vorschriftid, '[^('
                                                                || CHR(13)
                                                                || CHR(10)
                                                                || ')]') + 1
                  ) AS sys.odcinumberlist) ) levels
              WHERE
                  instr(t.vorschriftid, ',') = 0
          ), cte2_comma AS (
              SELECT
                  mfv_name,
                  jirakey,
                  ak_kurz,
                  TRIM(regexp_substr(t.vorschriftid, '[^,]+', 1, levels.column_value)) AS vorschriftlink_einzeln
              FROM
                  cte1 t,
                  TABLE ( CAST(MULTISET(
                      SELECT
                          level
                      FROM
                          dual
                      CONNECT BY
                          level <= regexp_count(t.vorschriftid, ',') + 1
                  ) AS sys.odcinumberlist) ) levels
              WHERE
                  instr(t.vorschriftid, ',') > 0
          ), cte2 AS (
              SELECT
                  mfv_name,
                  jirakey,
                  ak_kurz,
                  vorschriftlink_einzeln
              FROM
                  cte2_lb
                   where   vorschriftlink_einzeln is not null
              UNION
              SELECT
                  mfv_name,
                  jirakey,
                  ak_kurz,
                  vorschriftlink_einzeln
              FROM
                  cte2_comma
                  where   vorschriftlink_einzeln is not null
          ), cte3 AS (
              SELECT
                  tm.mfvid,
                 /* TRIM(regexp_replace(replace(vorschriftlink_einzeln, 'https://apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-sp/apex-sp/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:'
                  , ''), '[[:space:]]', '')) */
                   TRIM(regexp_replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(vorschriftlink_einzeln, 'https://apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-sp/apex-sp/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:',''),
                  'https://pre-apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-vt/apex-carmahvt/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:'
                  , ''),'https://pre-apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-tv/apex-carmahvt/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:',''),'https://apps1.web.audi.vwg/apexaudi-vp/apex-carmahvp/f?p=REGINDEX:VORSCHRIFT::::25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:',''), '[[:space:]]', '')) AS vorschriftid,
                  t1.jirakey
              FROM
                  cte2    t1
                  JOIN t_mfv   tm ON ( ( t1.jirakey = tm.jira_ticket ) )
 
                                    --where t1.mfv_name is not null  
              WHERE
                  t1.jirakey != 'TVRB-19195'
          ), cte_list as (
          SELECT
              t1.*,
              mfv_ref_vorschriftid
          FROM
              cte3                   t1
              LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mfv_ref_vorschrift   tm ON ( regexp_replace(TRIM(t1.vorschriftid),'\(.*\)' ) = tm.vorschriftid
                                                           AND t1.mfvid = tm.mfvid )
          WHERE
              t1.vorschriftid IS NOT NULL and   validate_conversion(t1.vorschriftid as NUMBER)=1
 
              ) select tmrv.mfv_ref_vorschriftid
              from t_mfv_ref_vorschrift tmrv
               where exists (Select 1 from  cte_list ctl where ctl.mfvid = tmrv.mfvid) 
              and not exists (Select 1 from  cte_list ctl where ctl.mfvid = tmrv.mfvid and ctl.vorschriftid = tmrv.vorschriftid)  
 
      );
 
 
 
 
 -- Berechnen der SUMS-Relevante Tickets    
 --Berechnen der Automatischen fälle
 /*
 von Nicht geprüft auf:
 Vorschrift hat nur NEIN Länder => Ignorieren
 Vorschrift-Land nur Ja und nur Ticket JA => automatisch auf JA
 Vorschrift-Land nur Ja und Tickets Nein => nein
 
 Vorschrift-Land gemsicht und nur Tickets = Ja => Ja
 Vorschrift-Land gemsicht und nur Tickets = nein => nein
 
 Alle Ja => customfield_17002 "OE2 des REVs"
 WIedersprechende Tickets => eintrag T_MFV_sums
 */
 /* Deaktiviert auf T aufgrund der Testtickets
 merge into t_vorschrift tv
 using  (
 with cte1 as (             SELECT 
                  x.*,
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
 
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]?(@.fields.issuetype.id ==13732)'
                          COLUMNS (
                              json VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$',
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id',
                              issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              sums_relevant VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_19317.value',  
                              jira_key_parent VARCHAR2(250) path '$.fields.issuelinks[0].outwardIssue.key',
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              last_updated date path '$.fields.updated',
                               status VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.status.name'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE
                  substr(jirakey, 0, 4) = gENVIRONMENT and issuetypeid not in (3,13733,14201) and status in  (
                      'Geschlossen',
                      'Geprüft',
                      'Freigabe','Abgeschlossen'
                  )
 
                  ),cte_vorschrift as (
                  
                  Select tv.vorschriftid, sums_relevant
                  from t_vorschrift tv
                  left outer join  t_vorschrift_ref_land tvrl on (tv.vorschriftid = tvrl.vorschriftid and tvrl.geloescht = 0)
                  left outer join t_land tl on (tvrl.landid = tl.landid )
                  
                  ),cte_mfv_sums as (
                  Select case  t1.Sums_relevant when 'Not rated' then 20 when 'Yes' then 10 when 'No' then 0 else null end as mfv_RXSWIN,tmrv.vorschriftid
                  
                  from cte1 t1
                  join t_mfv tm on ( t1.jira_key_parent = tm.jira_ticket and tm.jira_status in ( 10,40) --and LETZTE_AENDERUNG_DATUM >= sysdate-50
                  )
                  join t_mfv_ref_vorschrift tmrv on (tm.mfvid = tmrv.mfvid)
                  
                  
                  ),cte_mfv_sums_eindeutig as (
                  Select distinct vorschriftid, mfv_RXSWIN
                  from cte_mfv_sums t1
                  where not exists (Select 1 from cte_mfv_sums t2 where t1.vorschriftid = t2.vorschriftid and t1.mfv_RXSWIN != t2.mfv_RXSWIN)
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  ), cte2 as (
 
                  Select Sums_relevant,jira_key_parent, jirakey,tv.vorschriftid, tv.vorschrift_nummer, 
                  case tv.RXSWIN when 10 then 'ja' when 20 then 'Nicht geprüft' when 0 then 'nein' else 'n.n' end as Vorschriftsums
                  from cte1 t1
                  join t_mfv tm on ( t1.jira_key_parent = tm.jira_ticket and tm.jira_status in ( 10,40) --and LETZTE_AENDERUNG_DATUM >= sysdate-50
                  )
                  join t_mfv_ref_vorschrift tmrv on (tm.mfvid = tmrv.mfvid)
                  join t_vorschrift tv on (tmrv.vorschriftid = tv.vorschriftid )
                  where not ('Not rated' =Sums_relevant and tv.RXSWIN = 20) and 
                  not ('Yes' =Sums_relevant and tv.RXSWIN = 10) and 
                  not ('No' =Sums_relevant and tv.RXSWIN = 0)
                  )
                  
                  Select vorschriftid, sums_relevant RXSWIN from cte_vorschrift
 
 ) u on (tv.vorschriftid = u.vorschriftid)
 when matched then update set
 tv.RXSWIN  = u.RXSWIN ;
 */
 -- Berechnung der Arbeitaufgaben
 /* deaktiviet auf T Aufgrund der testtickets
 merge into t_mfv_sums tms
 using (
 
 with cte1 as (             SELECT 
                  t_x_mfv_cip.mfv_cipid
 
 
              FROM
                  t_x_mfv_cip,
                  JSON_TABLE ( mfv_data_clob, '$[*]?(@.fields.issuetype.id ==13732)'
                          COLUMNS (
                              json VARCHAR2 ( 4000 ) PATH '$',
                              jiraid VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.id',
                              issuetypeid number path '$.fields.issuetype.id',
                              sums_relevant VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.customfield_19317.value',  
                              jira_key_parent VARCHAR2(250) path '$.fields.issuelinks[0].outwardIssue.key',
                              jirakey VARCHAR2 ( 32 ) PATH '$.key',
                              last_updated date path '$.fields.updated',
                               status VARCHAR2 ( 250 ) PATH '$.fields.status.name'
                          )
                      )
                  x
              WHERE
                  substr(jirakey, 0, 4) = gENVIRONMENT and issuetypeid not in (3,13733,14201) and status in  (
                      'Geschlossen',
                      'Geprüft',
                      'Freigabe','Abgeschlossen'
                  )
 
                  ), cte2 as (
 
                  Select Sums_relevant,jira_key_parent, jirakey,tv.vorschriftid, tv.vorschrift_nummer, 
                  case tv.RXSWIN when 10 then 'ja' when 20 then 'Nicht geprüft' when 0 then 'nein' else 'n.n' end as Vorschriftsums
                  from cte1 t1
                  join t_mfv tm on ( t1.jira_key_parent = tm.jira_ticket and tm.jira_status in ( 10,40) and LETZTE_AENDERUNG_DATUM >= sysdate-50)
                  left outer join t_mfv_ref_vorschrift tmrv on (tm.mfvid = tmrv.mfvid)
                  left outer join t_vorschrift tv on (tmrv.vorschriftid = tv.vorschriftid )
                  where not ('Not rated' =Sums_relevant and tv.RXSWIN = 20) and 
                  not ('Yes' =Sums_relevant and tv.RXSWIN = 10) and 
                  not ('No' =Sums_relevant and tv.RXSWIN = 0)
                  )
 
                  Select * from cte2
) u on (tms.JIRA_KEY = u.JIRAKEY and tms.vorschriftid = u.vorschriftid)
when not matched then insert (JIRA_KEY,SUMS_STATUS,VORSCHRIFTID)
values (u.JIRAKEY,u.SUMS_RELEVANT, u.vorschriftid) ;

        commit;  */ 
--beenden alter DMS
/*merge into t_mfv tm 
using (
 
with cte1 as (
Select vorschriftid,tmrv.mfvid, mfv_name, dms_dokumentenstatus, tmrt.mfv_teilid, 
reverse(REGEXP_SUBSTR(reverse(mfv_name),'[0-9]{2}[V]')) as mfv_version
from t_mfv_ref_vorschrift tmrv
join t_mfv tm on (tmrv.mfvid = tm.mfvid)
join t_mfv_ref_mfv_teil tmrt on (tm.mfvid = tmrt.mfvid)
where tm.dms_dokumentenstatus = 20 and
JIRA_TICKET is not null
), cte2 as (
Select mfvid,mfv_name,vorschriftid, mfv_teilid, to_number(substr(mfv_version,2)) as v_nummer
 
from cte1
), cte3 as (
 
Select mfvid,mfv_name,vorschriftid, mfv_teilid,v_nummer, row_number() over (partition by vorschriftid, mfv_teilid order by nvl(v_nummer,-1) desc) xrow
 
from cte2)
 
Select distinct mfvid
from cte3 where xrow > 1)u
on (tm.mfvid = u.mfvid)
when matched then update set tm.dms_dokumentenstatus = 30;
commit;
*/
 
 
 
       debug('MFV-Beladung','Start mviews');  
/*DBMS_MVIEW.REFRESH('MV_MFV_ERROR_MFV');
