        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'STELLVERTRETER_REV_MAIL',
            p_heading => 'Stellvertreter REV E-Mail',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );          

        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'STELLVERTRETER_REV_ABTEILUNG',
            p_heading => 'Stellvertreter REV Abteilung',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );           

        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'RXSWIN',
            p_heading => 'Potentiell SUMS relevant',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );

        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'REV_NOTWENDIG',
            p_heading => 'Attribut REV notwendig',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );

        lExport := apex_data_export.export (
                            p_context   => lContext,
                            p_columns => lColumns,
                            p_column_groups => lColumnGroups,
                            p_format    => apex_data_export.c_format_xlsx );

        apex_exec.close( lContext );

        return lExport.content_blob;    

    end fGenRevVorschriftenExport;

    function fGetSQLRevVerantwortliche(aFilter in clob default null) return clob AS
        lSql clob;
    BEGIN
        lSql := q'[
        with cte1 as (
            select verantwortlicherid,
                    LISTAGG(distinct case when vrv.ist_hauptverantwortlicher = 10 then vor.vorschrift_nummer end, ', ') within group (order by vrv.VORSCHRIFT_REF_VERANTWORTLICHERID)as VORSCHRIFTEN_MIT_HAUPTVERANTWORTUNG,
                    LISTAGG(distinct case when vrv.ist_hauptverantwortlicher = 10 then vor.swr_hauptumsetzende_oe end, '; ') within group (order by vrv.VORSCHRIFT_REF_VERANTWORTLICHERID)as HAUPTUMSETZENDE_OE,
                    LISTAGG(distinct case when vrv.ist_hauptverantwortlicher = 10 then decode(vor.rev_notwendig,10,'Nicht bewertet',20,'Ja',30,'Nein') end, ', ') within group (order by vrv.VORSCHRIFT_REF_VERANTWORTLICHERID)as REV_NOTWENDIG,
                    LISTAGG(distinct case when vrv.ist_hauptverantwortlicher = 20 then vor.vorschrift_nummer end, ', ') within group (order by vrv.VORSCHRIFT_REF_VERANTWORTLICHERID)as VORSCHRIFTEN_MIT_Stellvertreterverantwortung,
                    LISTAGG(distinct case when vrv.ist_hauptverantwortlicher = 20 then vor.swr_hauptumsetzende_oe end, '; ') within group (order by vrv.VORSCHRIFT_REF_VERANTWORTLICHERID)as HAUPTUMSETZENDE_OE_Stellvertreterverantwortung,
                    LISTAGG(distinct case when vrv.ist_hauptverantwortlicher = 20 then decode(vor.rev_notwendig,10,'Nicht bewertet',20,'Ja',30,'Nein') end, ', ') within group (order by vrv.VORSCHRIFT_REF_VERANTWORTLICHERID)as REV_NOTWENDIG_Stellvertreterverantwortung
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_verantwortlicher vrv
            left outer join t_vorschrift       vor ON vor.vorschriftid = vrv.vorschriftid
            group by vrv.verantwortlicherid 
        )  
        SELECT distinct (v.nachname  || ', ' || v.vorname) as REV,
                v.abteilung,
                v.email,
                verant.VORSCHRIFTEN_MIT_HAUPTVERANTWORTUNG,
                verant.HAUPTUMSETZENDE_OE,
                verant.REV_NOTWENDIG,
                verant.VORSCHRIFTEN_MIT_STELLVERTRETERVERANTWORTUNG,
                verant.HAUPTUMSETZENDE_OE_STELLVERTRETERVERANTWORTUNG,
                verant.REV_NOTWENDIG_STELLVERTRETERVERANTWORTUNG
                from T_VERANTWORTLICHER v
                left outer join cte1 verant ON verant.verantwortlicherid = v.verantwortlicherid
                ORDER BY REV;
        ]';
        return lSql;
    END fGetSQLRevVerantwortliche;

   function fGenRevVerantwortlicheExport(aFilter in clob default null) return blob as
        lContext apex_exec.t_context; 
        lExport  apex_data_export.t_export; 
        lColumns apex_data_export.t_columns; 
        lColumnGroups apex_data_export.t_column_groups;
        lGroup1 number;
    begin
        lContext := apex_exec.open_query_context(
            p_location    => apex_exec.c_location_local_db,
            p_sql_query   => fGetSQLRevVerantwortliche(aFilter)
        );
       apex_data_export.add_column_group(
            p_column_groups => lColumnGroups,
            p_idx => lGroup1,
            p_name => 'VORSCHRIFTEN Liste Regulierungsverantwortliche ' || to_char(sysdate,'dd.mm.yyyy') || ' - intern',
            p_alignment => apex_data_export.c_align_start
        );
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'REV',
            p_heading => 'Regulierungsverantwortlicher',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        ); 
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'ABTEILUNG',
            p_heading => 'REV Abteilung',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );   
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'EMAIL',
            p_heading => 'REV E-Mail',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'VORSCHRIFTEN_MIT_HAUPTVERANTWORTUNG',
            p_heading => 'Vorschriften mit Hauptverantwortung',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );   
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'HAUPTUMSETZENDE_OE',
            p_heading => 'Hauptumsetzende OE2 ',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );   
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'REV_NOTWENDIG',
            p_heading => 'REV notwendig',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );   
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'VORSCHRIFTEN_MIT_STELLVERTRETERVERANTWORTUNG',
            p_heading => 'Vorschriften mit Stellvertreterverantwortung',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );   
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'HAUPTUMSETZENDE_OE_STELLVERTRETERVERANTWORTUNG',
            p_heading => 'Hauptumsetzende OE2 ',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );   
        apex_data_export.add_column(
            p_columns => lColumns,
            p_name => 'REV_NOTWENDIG_STELLVERTRETERVERANTWORTUNG',
            p_heading => 'REV notwendig',
            p_column_group_idx => lGroup1
        );   
        lExport := apex_data_export.export (
                            p_context   => lContext,
                            p_columns => lColumns,
                            p_column_groups => lColumnGroups,
                            p_format    => apex_data_export.c_format_xlsx );

        apex_exec.close( lContext );

        return lExport.content_blob;    

    end fGenRevVerantwortlicheExport;


END PCK_RI_EXPORT_REVS;
/










create or replace PACKAGE PCK_RI_FILTERED_SUCHE AS
    
    -- Card detail function for filtered searches
    FUNCTION country_vorschrift_card_detail(
        p_search_id NUMBER, 
        p_milestone NUMBER, 
        p_landid VARCHAR2,
        p_format VARCHAR2 DEFAULT 'DISPLAY' 
    ) RETURN CLOB;
    
    -- Excel export function for page 461 filtered searches
    FUNCTION page_461_excel_export(
        p_search_id NUMBER, 
        p_milestone NUMBER, 
        p_landids VARCHAR2,
        p_card_num NUMBER,
        p_publisher_filter VARCHAR2 DEFAULT NULL,
        p_benutzerid NUMBER
    ) RETURN CLOB;
    
END PCK_RI_FILTERED_SUCHE;
/





create or replace PACKAGE BODY PCK_RI_FILTERED_SUCHE AS
 
 
 
    
 
    
    
   
    FUNCTION country_vorschrift_card_detail(
        p_search_id NUMBER, 
        p_milestone NUMBER, 
        p_landid VARCHAR2,
        p_format VARCHAR2 DEFAULT 'DISPLAY' 
    ) RETURN CLOB
    AS
        l_body_html_table CLOB;
        l_row_num NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
        IF p_format = 'DISPLAY' THEN
            l_body_html_table := '';
                            
            FOR i IN (
                WITH search_countries AS (
                    SELECT 
                        sucheid,
                        to_number(COLUMN_VALUE) as landid
                    FROM t_suche_json,
                    TABLE(apex_string.split(
                        json_value(suchdaten FORMAT JSON, '$[0].LAENDER'),
                        ':'
                    ))
                    WHERE sucheid = p_search_id
                )
                SELECT 
                    ms.themabezeichnung AS thema,
                    
                    -- MAIN REGULATION: Keep individual (no LISTAGG)
 
                    -- No clickable Link
                    
                    CASE 
                        WHEN NVL(tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                             AND tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                        THEN COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) || '_' || 
                             TO_CHAR(tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                        ELSE COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) 
                    END AS r,
                    
 
 
                    -- clickable Link
 
 
                    -- '<a href="f?p=120:25:' || V('APP_SESSION') || '::NO:RP,25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:' || ms.vorschriftid || '" target="_blank">' ||
                    -- CASE 
                    --     WHEN NVL(tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                    --          AND tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                    --     THEN COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) || '_' || 
                    --          TO_CHAR(tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                    --     ELSE COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) 
                    -- END || '</a>' AS r,
 
 
 
                    -- ALTERNATIVE REGULATION: LISTAGG
                    LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                        CASE 
                            WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL AND tv.vorschrift_nummer IS NOT NULL THEN
                                CASE 
                                    WHEN NVL(tp_alt.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                                         AND tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                                    THEN tv.vorschrift_nummer || '_' || TO_CHAR(tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                                    ELSE tv.vorschrift_nummer 
                                END
                            ELSE NULL
                        END, ', ') 
                    WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY tv.vorschrift_nummer) AS alternative_r
 
                FROM search_countries sc
                LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS ms ON (
                    ms.sucheid = sc.sucheid 
                    AND ms.landid = sc.landid
                    AND sc.landid IN (
                        SELECT column_value 
                        FROM table(apex_string.split_numbers(p_landid, ':'))
                    )
                )
                
                LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv ON (tv.vorschriftid = ms.alternative_vorschriftid)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv_main ON (tv_main.vorschriftid = ms.vorschriftid)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_alt ON (tv.publisherid = tp_alt.publisherid)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_main ON (tv_main.publisherid = tp_main.publisherid)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER mp ON (mp.MS_PARAMETERID = ms.MS_PARAMETERID)
                WHERE ms.vorschriftnummer IS NOT NULL
                AND ms.MEILENSTEIN = p_milestone
                AND (mp.AUSGABE_DER_VORSCHRIFT_BEI_REPORT_BAUREIHE = 1 OR ms.MANUELLER_EINTRAG = 10)
                
                -- GROUP BY main regulation to combine alternatives
                GROUP BY 
                    ms.themabezeichnung,
                    ms.vorschriftnummer,
                    ms.vorschriftid,
                    tv_main.vorschrift_nummer,
                    tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                    tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM
                ORDER BY ms.themabezeichnung, r
            ) LOOP
                l_row_num := l_row_num + 1;
                l_body_html_table := l_body_html_table || 
                    '<tr>' ||
                    '<td class="t-Report-cell" headers="THEMA" style="padding: 8px 12px; height: 32px; text-align: left;' ||
                    CASE 
                        WHEN MOD(l_row_num, 2) = 1 THEN ' background-color: #E0E0E0;'
                        ELSE ' background-color: #FFFFFF;'
                    END || '">' || 
                    NVL(i.thema, ' ') || 
                    '</td>' ||
                    '<td class="t-Report-cell" headers="VORSCHRIFT" style="padding: 8px 12px; height: 32px; text-align: left;' ||
                    CASE 
                        WHEN MOD(l_row_num, 2) = 1 THEN ' background-color: #E0E0E0;'
                        ELSE ' background-color: #FFFFFF;'
                    END || '">' || 
                    NVL(i.r, '') || 
                    '</td>' ||
                    '<td class="t-Report-cell" headers="ALT_VORSCHRIFT" style="padding: 8px 12px; height: 32px; text-align: left;' ||
                    CASE 
                        WHEN MOD(l_row_num, 2) = 1 THEN ' background-color: #E0E0E0;'
                        ELSE ' background-color: #FFFFFF;'
                    END || '">' || 
                    NVL(i.alternative_r, '') || 
                    '</td></tr>';
            END LOOP;
            
            RETURN l_body_html_table;
            
        ELSIF p_format = 'EXCEL' THEN
            RETURN q'[
                WITH search_countries AS (
                    SELECT 
                        sucheid,
                        to_number(COLUMN_VALUE) as landid
                    FROM t_suche_json,
                    TABLE(apex_string.split(
                        json_value(suchdaten FORMAT JSON, '$[0].LAENDER'),
                        ':'
                    ))
                    WHERE sucheid = ]' || p_search_id || q'[
                )
                SELECT 
                    ms.landnummer||' - '||ms.landbezeichnung AS Landbezeichnung,
                    ms.themabezeichnung AS Themabezeichnung,
                    
                    -- MAIN REGULATION: Keep individual
                    CASE 
                        WHEN NVL(tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                             AND tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                        THEN COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) || '_' || 
                             TO_CHAR(tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                        ELSE COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) 
                    END AS Vorschriftennummer,
 
                    -- ALTERNATIVE REGULATION: LISTAGG for
                    LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                        CASE 
                            WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL AND tv.vorschrift_nummer IS NOT NULL THEN
                                CASE 
                                    WHEN NVL(tp_alt.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                                         AND tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                                    THEN tv.vorschrift_nummer || '_' || TO_CHAR(tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                                    ELSE tv.vorschrift_nummer 
                                END
                            ELSE NULL
                        END, ', ') 
                    WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY tv.vorschrift_nummer) AS Alternative_Vorschriftennummer
                        
                FROM search_countries sc
                LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS ms ON (
                    ms.sucheid = sc.sucheid 
                    AND ms.landid = sc.landid
                    AND ms.meilenstein = ]' || p_milestone || q'[
                    AND ms.landid IN (
                        SELECT TO_NUMBER(COLUMN_VALUE)
                        FROM TABLE(apex_string.split(']' || p_landid || q'[', ':'))
                    )
                )
               
                LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv ON (tv.vorschriftid = ms.alternative_vorschriftid)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv_main ON (tv_main.vorschriftid = ms.vorschriftid)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_alt ON (tv.publisherid = tp_alt.publisherid)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_main ON (tv_main.publisherid = tp_main.publisherid)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER mp ON (mp.MS_PARAMETERID = ms.MS_PARAMETERID)
                WHERE mp.AUSGABE_DER_VORSCHRIFT_BEI_REPORT_BAUREIHE = 1
                
                -- GROUP BY 
                GROUP BY 
                    ms.landnummer,
                    ms.landbezeichnung,
                    ms.themabezeichnung,
                    ms.vorschriftnummer,
                    tv_main.vorschrift_nummer,
                    tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                    tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM
                ORDER BY 
                    Landbezeichnung,
                    Themabezeichnung,
                    Vorschriftennummer]';
        END IF;
    END country_vorschrift_card_detail;
 
 
   
 
 
 
 
 
 
 /*
   -- clickable
    
    FUNCTION country_vorschrift_card_detail(
        p_search_id NUMBER, 
        p_milestone NUMBER, 
        p_landid VARCHAR2,
        p_format VARCHAR2 DEFAULT 'DISPLAY' 
    ) RETURN CLOB
    AS
        l_body_html_table CLOB;
        l_row_num NUMBER := 0;
        l_total_countries NUMBER;
    BEGIN
        -- get the total number of countries for this card
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(column_value)))
        INTO l_total_countries
        FROM TABLE(apex_string.split(p_landid, ':'))
        WHERE TRIM(column_value) IS NOT NULL;
 
        IF p_format = 'DISPLAY' THEN
            l_body_html_table := '';
                            
            FOR i IN (
                WITH search_countries AS (
                    SELECT 
                        sucheid,
                        to_number(COLUMN_VALUE) as landid
                    FROM t_suche_json,
                    TABLE(apex_string.split(
                        json_value(suchdaten FORMAT JSON, '$[0].LAENDER'),
                        ':'
                    ))
                    WHERE sucheid = p_search_id
                ),
                -- country coverage check
                country_coverage AS (
                    SELECT 
                        ms.themabezeichnung,
                        ms.vorschriftnummer,
                        ms.vorschriftid,
                        tv_main.vorschrift_nummer,
                        tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                        tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                        COUNT(DISTINCT ms.landid) as countries_for_this_reg
                    FROM search_countries sc
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS ms ON (
                        ms.sucheid = sc.sucheid 
                        AND ms.landid = sc.landid
                        AND sc.landid IN (
                            SELECT column_value 
                            FROM table(apex_string.split_numbers(p_landid, ':'))
                        )
                    )
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv_main ON (tv_main.vorschriftid = ms.vorschriftid)
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_main ON (tv_main.publisherid = tp_main.publisherid)
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER mp ON (mp.MS_PARAMETERID = ms.MS_PARAMETERID)
                    WHERE ms.vorschriftnummer IS NOT NULL
                    AND ms.MEILENSTEIN = p_milestone
                    AND mp.AUSGABE_DER_VORSCHRIFT_BEI_REPORT_BAUREIHE = 1
                    GROUP BY 
                        ms.themabezeichnung,
                        ms.vorschriftnummer,
                        ms.vorschriftid,
                        tv_main.vorschrift_nummer,
                        tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                        tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM
                ),
                -- Check if regulation has been evaluated
                evaluation_check AS (
                    SELECT 
                        cc.vorschriftid,
                        CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG != 'nicht bewertet' OR bew.FB_VERWENDUNG != 'nicht bewertet' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 
                             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_evaluated
                    FROM country_coverage cc
                    LEFT JOIN T_MS_BEWERTUNG bew ON (
                        bew.SUCHEID = p_search_id
                        AND bew.MEILENSTEIN = p_milestone
                        AND bew.VORSCHRIFTID = cc.vorschriftid
                        AND (bew.BENUTZERID = V('G_BENUTZERID')
                             OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_benutzer_ref_rolle brr 
                                        WHERE brr.benutzerid = V('G_BENUTZERID')
                                        AND brr.rolleid = 1001))
                    )
                    GROUP BY cc.vorschriftid
                )
                SELECT 
                    -- warning icon for theme if not all countries covered
                    CASE 
                        WHEN cc.countries_for_this_reg < l_total_countries
                        THEN '<span class="fa fa-exclamation-triangle warning-icon" 
                                  style="color: #ff6600; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px;" 
                                  title="Nicht alle Themengebiete gelten in allen Ländern!"></span> '
                        ELSE ''
                    END || cc.themabezeichnung AS thema,
                    
                    -- Both warning AND checkmark icons for vorschrift
                    CASE 
                        WHEN cc.countries_for_this_reg < l_total_countries
                        THEN '<span class="fa fa-exclamation-triangle warning-icon" 
                                  style="color: #ff6600; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px;" 
                                  title="Diese Vorschrift gilt nicht für alle Länder in dieser Karte!"></span> '
                        ELSE ''
                    END ||
                    CASE 
                        WHEN NVL(ec.is_evaluated, 0) = 1
                        THEN '<span class="fa fa-check-circle checkmark-icon" 
                                  style="color: #27ae60; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px;" 
                                  title="Diese Vorschrift wurde bereits bewertet!"></span> '
                        ELSE ''
                    END ||
                    '<a href="f?p=120:25:' || V('APP_SESSION') || '::NO:RP,25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:' || cc.vorschriftid || '" target="_blank">' ||
                    CASE 
                        WHEN NVL(cc.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                             AND cc.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                        THEN COALESCE(cc.vorschrift_nummer, cc.vorschriftnummer) || '_' || 
                             TO_CHAR(cc.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                        ELSE COALESCE(cc.vorschrift_nummer, cc.vorschriftnummer) 
                    END || '</a>' AS r,
 
                    -- Alternative regulations with warnings
                    (SELECT 
                    LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                        CASE 
                            WHEN ms2.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL AND tv.vorschrift_nummer IS NOT NULL THEN
                                CASE 
                                    WHEN NVL(tp_alt.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                                         AND tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                                    THEN tv.vorschrift_nummer || '_' || TO_CHAR(tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                                    ELSE tv.vorschrift_nummer 
                                END
                            ELSE NULL
                        END, ', ') 
                    WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY tv.vorschrift_nummer)
                 FROM search_countries sc2
                 LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS ms2 ON (
                     ms2.sucheid = sc2.sucheid 
                     AND ms2.landid = sc2.landid
                     AND sc2.landid IN (
                         SELECT column_value 
                         FROM table(apex_string.split_numbers(p_landid, ':'))
                     )
                     AND ms2.vorschriftid = cc.vorschriftid
                 )
                 LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv ON (tv.vorschriftid = ms2.alternative_vorschriftid)
                 LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_alt ON (tv.publisherid = tp_alt.publisherid)
                 WHERE ms2.MEILENSTEIN = p_milestone
                   AND ms2.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL
                ) AS alternative_r
 
                FROM country_coverage cc
                LEFT JOIN evaluation_check ec ON ec.vorschriftid = cc.vorschriftid 
                ORDER BY cc.themabezeichnung, cc.vorschriftid
            ) LOOP
                l_row_num := l_row_num + 1;
                l_body_html_table := l_body_html_table || 
                    '<tr>' ||
                    '<td class="t-Report-cell" headers="THEMA" style="padding: 8px 12px; height: 32px; text-align: left;' ||
                    CASE 
                        WHEN MOD(l_row_num, 2) = 1 THEN ' background-color: #E0E0E0;'
                        ELSE ' background-color: #FFFFFF;'
                    END || '">' || 
                    NVL(i.thema, ' ') || 
                    '</td>' ||
                    '<td class="t-Report-cell" headers="VORSCHRIFT" style="padding: 8px 12px; height: 32px; text-align: left;' ||
                    CASE 
                        WHEN MOD(l_row_num, 2) = 1 THEN ' background-color: #E0E0E0;'
                        ELSE ' background-color: #FFFFFF;'
                    END || '">' || 
                    NVL(i.r, '') || 
                    '</td>' ||
                    '<td class="t-Report-cell" headers="ALT_VORSCHRIFT" style="padding: 8px 12px; height: 32px; text-align: left;' ||
                    CASE 
                        WHEN MOD(l_row_num, 2) = 1 THEN ' background-color: #E0E0E0;'
                        ELSE ' background-color: #FFFFFF;'
                    END || '">' || 
                    NVL(i.alternative_r, '') || 
                    '</td></tr>';
            END LOOP;
            
            RETURN l_body_html_table;
            
        ELSIF p_format = 'EXCEL' THEN
                RETURN q'[
                    WITH search_countries AS (
                        SELECT 
                            sucheid,
                            to_number(COLUMN_VALUE) as landid
                        FROM t_suche_json,
                        TABLE(apex_string.split(
                            json_value(suchdaten FORMAT JSON, '$[0].LAENDER'),
                            ':'
                        ))
                        WHERE sucheid = ]' || p_search_id || q'[
                    )
                    SELECT 
                        ms.landnummer||' - '||ms.landbezeichnung AS Landbezeichnung,
                        ms.themabezeichnung AS Themabezeichnung,
                        
                        -- MAIN REGULATION: Keep individual
                        CASE 
                            WHEN NVL(tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                                 AND tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                            THEN COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) || '_' || 
                                 TO_CHAR(tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                            ELSE COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) 
                        END AS Vorschriftennummer,
     
                        -- ALTERNATIVE REGULATION: LISTAGG for
                        LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                            CASE 
                                WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL AND tv.vorschrift_nummer IS NOT NULL THEN
                                    CASE 
                                        WHEN NVL(tp_alt.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                                             AND tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                                        THEN tv.vorschrift_nummer || '_' || TO_CHAR(tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                                        ELSE tv.vorschrift_nummer 
                                    END
                                ELSE NULL
                            END, ', ') 
                        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY tv.vorschrift_nummer) AS Alternative_Vorschriftennummer
                            
                    FROM search_countries sc
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS ms ON (
                        ms.sucheid = sc.sucheid 
                        AND ms.landid = sc.landid
                        AND ms.meilenstein = ]' || p_milestone || q'[
                        AND ms.landid IN (
                            SELECT TO_NUMBER(COLUMN_VALUE)
                            FROM TABLE(apex_string.split(']' || p_landid || q'[', ':'))
                        )
                    )
                   
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv ON (tv.vorschriftid = ms.alternative_vorschriftid)
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv_main ON (tv_main.vorschriftid = ms.vorschriftid)
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_alt ON (tv.publisherid = tp_alt.publisherid)
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_main ON (tv_main.publisherid = tp_main.publisherid)
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER mp ON (mp.MS_PARAMETERID = ms.MS_PARAMETERID)
                    WHERE mp.AUSGABE_DER_VORSCHRIFT_BEI_REPORT_BAUREIHE = 1
                    
                    -- GROUP BY 
                    GROUP BY 
                        ms.landnummer,
                        ms.landbezeichnung,
                        ms.themabezeichnung,
                        ms.vorschriftnummer,
                        tv_main.vorschrift_nummer,
                        tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                        tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM
                    ORDER BY 
                        Landbezeichnung,
                        Themabezeichnung,
                        Vorschriftennummer]';
            END IF;
        END country_vorschrift_card_detail;
 
 
 
 
 */
  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
    
 
 
 
 
    
 
    
 
 
 
 
 
 
    FUNCTION page_461_excel_export(
        p_search_id NUMBER, 
        p_milestone NUMBER, 
        p_landids VARCHAR2,
        p_card_num NUMBER,
        p_publisher_filter VARCHAR2 DEFAULT NULL,
        p_benutzerid NUMBER
    ) RETURN CLOB
    AS
    BEGIN
        RETURN q'[
            WITH cte_lrsa AS (
                SELECT vrt.vorschriftid,
                       LISTAGG(l.lrsa_nummer || ' - ' || l.bezeichnung, ', ') 
                       WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY l.bezeichnung ASC) AS lrsa
                FROM t_vorschrift_ref_thema vrt
                JOIN T_THEMA_REF_LRSA ref ON (vrt.themaid = ref.themaid)
                JOIN T_LRSA l ON (l.LRSA_ID = ref.LRSAID)
                WHERE vrt.geloescht = 0
                GROUP BY vrt.vorschriftid
            ),
            cte_homologationseigenschaften AS (   
                SELECT vrt.vorschriftid, 
                       REPLACE(
                           LISTAGG(e.EIGENSCHAFT_KENNUNG || '-' || et.kuerzel || '-' || e.eigenschaft, ', ') 
                           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.eigenschaft), 
                           ', ', 
                           chr(10)
                       ) AS homologationseigenschaften
                FROM t_vorschrift_ref_thema vrt
                JOIN carmah2_admin.t_eigenschaft_ref_regindexthemen err ON (vrt.themaid = err.regindex_themen_id)
                JOIN carmah2_admin.t_eigenschaft e ON (err.eigenschaft_id = e.eigenschaft_id)
                JOIN carmah2_admin.t_eigenschaft_typ et ON (e.eigenschaft_typ_id = et.eigenschaft_typ_id)
                WHERE vrt.geloescht = 0
                GROUP BY vrt.vorschriftid
            ),
            cte_regelnummer_kritikalitaet AS (
                SELECT 
                    ms.sucheid,
                    ms.meilenstein,
                    ms.landid,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL THEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID
                        ELSE ms.VORSCHRIFTID
                    END as specific_vorschrift_id,
                    LISTAGG(DISTINCT TO_CHAR(ms.regelnummer), '; ') 
                    WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ms.regelnummer) AS regelnummer_list,
                    LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                        CASE 
                            WHEN mat.KRITIKALITAET IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(mat.KRITIKALITAET)
                            ELSE NULL 
                        END, '; ') 
                    WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mat.KRITIKALITAET) AS kritikalitaet_von_regelnummer,
                    LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                        CASE 
                            WHEN mat.AUSGABE_TEXT IS NOT NULL THEN mat.AUSGABE_TEXT
                            ELSE NULL 
                        END, chr(10)) 
                    WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mat.AUSGABE_TEXT) AS ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer
                FROM T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS ms
                LEFT JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER p ON ms.regelnummer = p.nummer
                LEFT JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER_REF_AUSGABE pra ON p.MS_PARAMETERID = pra.MS_PARAMETERID
                LEFT JOIN T_MS_AUSGABE_TEXT mat ON pra.MS_AUSGABE_TEXTID = mat.MS_AUSGABE_TEXTID
                GROUP BY ms.sucheid, ms.meilenstein, ms.landid,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL THEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID
                        ELSE ms.VORSCHRIFTID
                    END
            )
            SELECT
                split.CARD_NUMBER AS "Card Number",
                CASE 
                    WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL THEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID
                    ELSE ms.VORSCHRIFTID
                END as "Specific Reg Id",
                LISTAGG(DISTINCT ms.landnummer, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ms.landnummer) AS "B Nummer Liste",
                LISTAGG(DISTINCT ms.landbezeichnung, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ms.landnummer) AS "Land Namen Liste",
                ms.themabezeichnung AS "Themabezeichnung",
                CASE 
                    WHEN NVL(tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                         AND tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) || '_' || 
                         TO_CHAR(tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                    ELSE COALESCE(tv_main.vorschrift_nummer, ms.vorschriftnummer) 
                END AS "Vorschriftennummer",
                CASE 
                    WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL AND tv.vorschrift_nummer IS NOT NULL THEN
                        CASE 
                            WHEN NVL(tp_alt.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM, 0) = 20 
                                 AND tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM IS NOT NULL 
                            THEN tv.vorschrift_nummer || '_' || TO_CHAR(tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                            ELSE tv.vorschrift_nummer 
                        END
                    ELSE NULL
                END AS "Alternative Vorschriftennummer",
                NVL(tv.publisher, tv_main.publisher) AS "Publisher",
                NVL(lrsa_main.lrsa, lrsa_alt.lrsa) AS "LRSA",
                NVL(homo_main.homologationseigenschaften, homo_alt.homologationseigenschaften) AS "Homologationseigenschaft",
                regel_krit.regelnummer_list AS "Regelnummer",
                regel_krit.kritikalitaet_von_regelnummer AS "Kritikalitaet Von Regelnummer",
                regel_krit.ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer AS "Ausgabe Text Von Regelnummer",
                CASE WHEN tv_main.rxswin = 10 THEN 'Ja' ELSE 'Nein' END AS "potentiell SUMS-Relevant",
                CASE 
                    WHEN MAX(ms.MANUELLER_EINTRAG) = 10 THEN 'Manueller Eintrag'
                    ELSE 'Automatischer Eintrag'
                END AS "Eintrag Typ",
                bew.ET_KOMMENTAR AS "ET Kommentar",
                CASE 
                    WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG = 'nicht bewertet' THEN 'nicht bewertet'
                    WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG = 'ja' THEN 'ja'
                    WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG = 'nein' THEN 'nein'
                    ELSE 'nicht bewertet'
                END AS "ET Verwendung",
                bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT AS "ET Vorschlag Vorschrift",
                bew.FB_KOMMENTAR AS "FB Kommentar",
                CASE 
                    WHEN bew.FB_VERWENDUNG = 'nicht bewertet' THEN 'nicht bewertet'
                    WHEN bew.FB_VERWENDUNG = 'ja' THEN 'ja'
                    WHEN bew.FB_VERWENDUNG = 'nein' THEN 'nein'
                    ELSE 'nicht bewertet'
                END AS "FB Verwendung",
                bew.FB_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT AS "FB Vorschlag Vorschrift"
            FROM T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS ms
            LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv ON (tv.vorschriftid = ms.alternative_vorschriftid)
            LEFT OUTER JOIN t_vorschrift tv_main ON (tv_main.vorschriftid = ms.vorschriftid)
            LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_alt ON (tv.publisherid = tp_alt.publisherid)
            LEFT OUTER JOIN t_publisher tp_main ON (tv_main.publisherid = tp_main.publisherid)
            LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_SUCHE_SPLIT split ON (
                split.SUCHEID = ms.sucheid 
                AND split.MEILENSTEIN = ms.meilenstein 
                AND split.LANDID = ms.landid
            )
            LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_lrsa lrsa_main ON (lrsa_main.vorschriftid = ms.vorschriftid)
            LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_lrsa lrsa_alt ON (lrsa_alt.vorschriftid = ms.alternative_vorschriftid)
            LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_homologationseigenschaften homo_main ON (homo_main.vorschriftid = ms.vorschriftid)
            LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_homologationseigenschaften homo_alt ON (homo_alt.vorschriftid = ms.alternative_vorschriftid)
            LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_regelnummer_kritikalitaet regel_krit ON (
                regel_krit.sucheid = ms.sucheid 
                AND regel_krit.meilenstein = ms.meilenstein
                AND regel_krit.landid = ms.landid
                AND regel_krit.specific_vorschrift_id = CASE 
                    WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL THEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID
                    ELSE ms.VORSCHRIFTID
                END
            )
            LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_BEWERTUNG bew ON (
                bew.SUCHEID = ms.sucheid 
                AND bew.MEILENSTEIN = ms.meilenstein
                AND bew.CARD_NUMBER = split.CARD_NUMBER
                AND bew.VORSCHRIFTID = CASE 
                    WHEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID IS NOT NULL THEN ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID
                    ELSE ms.VORSCHRIFTID
                END
                AND bew.BENUTZERID = ]' || p_benutzerid || q'[
            )
 
            LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER mp ON (ms.regelnummer = mp.nummer)
            WHERE ms.sucheid = ]' || p_search_id || q'[
            AND ms.meilenstein = ]' || p_milestone || q'[
            AND ms.landid IN (
                SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(column_value))
                FROM TABLE(apex_string.split(']' || p_landids || q'[', ';'))
            )
            AND ms.vorschriftnummer IS NOT NULL]' ||
            CASE 
                WHEN p_publisher_filter IS NOT NULL THEN 
                    q'[
            AND NVL(tv.publisher, tv_main.publisher) IN (
                SELECT TRIM(column_value) 
                FROM TABLE(apex_string.split(']' || p_publisher_filter || q'[', ':'))
            )]'
                ELSE ''
            END || q'[
            AND split.CARD_NUMBER = ]' || p_card_num || q'[
            AND (mp.AUSGABE_DER_VORSCHRIFT_BEI_REPORT_BAUREIHE = 1 OR ms.MANUELLER_EINTRAG = 10);
 
            GROUP BY 
                split.CARD_NUMBER,
                split.BENUTZERID,
                ms.ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTID,
                ms.VORSCHRIFTID,
                ms.themabezeichnung,
                ms.vorschriftnummer,
                tv.vorschrift_nummer,
                tv_main.vorschrift_nummer,
                tv.publisher,
                tv_main.publisher,
                tv_main.rxswin,
                ms.sucheid,
                ms.meilenstein,
                tp_alt.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                tp_main.ANZEIGE_MIT_DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                tv.DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                tv_main.DOKUMENTENDATUM,
                lrsa_main.lrsa,
                lrsa_alt.lrsa,
                homo_main.homologationseigenschaften,
                homo_alt.homologationseigenschaften,
                regel_krit.regelnummer_list,
                regel_krit.kritikalitaet_von_regelnummer,
                regel_krit.ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer,
                bew.ET_VERWENDUNG,
                bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,
                bew.ET_KOMMENTAR,
                bew.FB_VERWENDUNG,
                bew.FB_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,
                bew.FB_KOMMENTAR
            ORDER BY 
                MAX(ms.MANUELLER_EINTRAG) DESC,
                "B Nummer Liste",
                "Themabezeichnung",
                "Vorschriftennummer"]';
    END page_461_excel_export;
END PCK_RI_FILTERED_SUCHE;
/

create or replace PACKAGE BODY "PCK_RI_GETEX" AS
 
    function fAdjust_Equi_Demands return number
    as
    begin
        return ADJUST_GETEX_EQUI_DEMANDS;
    end;

    function fUse_Getex_Subcountries return number
    as
    begin
        return USE_GETEX_SUBCOUNTRY;
    end;
    /*  Berechnet den Soll-Vorschrifttyp für eine GETEX-Vorschrift
        Regel: Wenn "UN-R" UND "Supplement" in Vorschriftnummer enthalten, dann Supplement (20)
               Wenn mindestens eine Relation des Typs DEMANDS oder DEMANDS MULTI, dann Rahmenrichtlinie (30)
               Sonst Vorschrift (10) */


    function fCalcVorschriftTypID(aGetexKey in T_VORSCHRIFT.REGINDEXID%type) return number is
    lCountDemandsRelations number;
    lVorschriftNummerGetex MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT.reg_num%type;
    lDocumenttype MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT.rev_documenttype%type;
    lMatchFound number := 0;
begin

    select count(*) into lCountDemandsRelations        
    from mv_getex_vorschrift_relation mgr
    where mgr.v_id = aGetexKey 
    and mgr.relationtype in ('DEMANDS','DEMANDS_MULTI');    


    select mg.reg_num, rev_documenttype into lVorschriftNummerGetex, lDocumenttype
    from mv_getex_vorschrift mg
    where mg.reg_id = aGetexKey
    and rev_current = 'true';


    select count(*) into lMatchFound
    from T_GETEX_MAPPING_NORM gmn
    where instr(lVorschriftNummerGetex, gmn.PREFIX) = 1;


    if (lMatchFound > 0) then
        return 40; -- Norm zwingend
    elsif (instr(lVorschriftNummerGetex,'UN-R') > 0 
          and instr(lVorschriftNummerGetex,'Supplement') > 0 
          and lDocumenttype ='CHANGE_REGULATION') then
        return 20; -- Supplement
    elsif (lCountDemandsRelations > 0) then
        return 30; -- Rahmenrichtlinie
    else
        return 10; -- Vorschrift
    end if;        
end fCalcVorschriftTypID;








 /**
*  ermittelt einsatzdatum_Modellid für Getex- Vorschrift anhand der timelinedatetype
*/
function fEinsatzdatum_ModellId(aVorschriftID in number ) return number is
     lEinsatzdatumModel_typ varchar2(32);
     lEinsatzdatumModellId number := 0;
     l_publisher varchar2(300) := 0;
  begin
       -- vorschrift publisher aus Getex     
       select gv.publ_name  INTO l_publisher
        from t_vorschrift v
        join mv_getex_vorschrift gv on (v.regindexid = gv.reg_id)
        where v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID 
        and rev_current = 'true';

       -- ermittle Einsatzdatummodel aus Getex
       select  timelinedatetype  INTO lEinsatzdatumModel_typ
        from t_vorschrift v
        join mv_getex_vorschrift gv on (v.regindexid = gv.reg_id)
        where v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID 
        and rev_current = 'true';

        if( lEinsatzdatumModel_typ is null) then
            -- wenn kein timelinedatetype in Getex benutze T_publisher Zuordnung
             begin
                select einsatzdatum_modellid into lEinsatzdatumModellId
                from t_publisher where name = l_publisher;
             EXCEPTION
             when NO_DATA_FOUND then
                 lEinsatzdatumModellId :=10; -- 'EU'
             end;

        else
           select  einsatzdatum_modellid into lEinsatzdatumModellId
           from T_EINSATZDATUM_MODELL 
           where Mapping_GETEX = lEinsatzdatumModel_typ;
        end if;
      return lEinsatzdatumModellId;

  end fEinsatzdatum_Modellid;

    /**
    *  
    */
 function fCompareEinsatzdaten(aVorschriftID in number) return number is
        lResult number;
        l_diff_phaseinIncl number :=0;
        --lEinsatzdatumModel_typ varchar2(32);
        lEinsatzdatum_ModellID number :=0;
        l_co number :=0;
        l_co_ri number :=0;
    begin
        /*select nvl(timelinedatetype,'EU')  INTO lEinsatzdatumModel_typ
        from mv_getex_vorschrift where rev_current = 'true' and  rev_regindexid = aVorschriftID;*/

        /*select nvl(timelinedatetype,'EU')  INTO lEinsatzdatumModel_typ
        from t_vorschrift v
        join mv_getex_vorschrift gv on (v.regindexid = gv.reg_id)
        where v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID and rev_current = 'true';*/

        lEinsatzdatum_ModellID := fEinsatzdatum_ModellId(aVorschriftID);
        --- check if DS exists in MV_GETEX_THEMA_SCENARIO
        select count(v.regindexid)  into l_co
           from t_vorschrift v  --MV_GETEX_vorschrift gtv
          where v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID
        and v.regindexid  in (select v_id from MV_GETEX_THEMA_SCENARIO);

        --if (l_co = 0 and lEinsatzdatumModel_typ !='MODELYEAR') 
         if (l_co = 0 and lEinsatzdatum_ModellID != 30)  then  -- != 'MODELYEAR'
            -- check if  any Einsatzdaten in Regindex
            select count(*) into l_co_ri
            from  t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ 
            where vorschriftid = aVorschriftID and Einsatzdatum_typid not in (1000, 1041, 1060, 1063); --inKraft, Außerkraft
            if (l_co_ri = 0 and lEinsatzdatum_ModellID in (10, 20) ) then 
            -- nichts zu vergleichen auf beiden seiten
                return 0;
            else
                return 1;
            end if;
        end if;
        if (lEinsatzdatum_ModellID = 30) then

            with cte_daten_regindex as (
                /* Einsatzdatumsangaben aus RegIndex */
                select vret.vorschriftid, vret.einsatzdatum_typid, einsatzdatum, modeljahr,
                 et.mapping_getex, et.einsatzdatum_typ
                from t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ vret
                join t_einsatzdatum_typ et on (vret.einsatzdatum_typid = et.einsatzdatum_typid )
                where  vret.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID 
                 and et.mapping_getex is not null
            ), cte_daten_getex as (
                /* Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 1: Minimum über alle Themen holen */
                select v.vorschriftid, sc_type,  --sc_datum , --trunc(min(sc_datum)) as sc_datum,
                 min(to_date(sc_year, 'yyyy')) as sc_year, trunc(min(sc_datum)) as sc_datum, sc_fahrzeug_typ
                from MV_GETEX_THEMA_SCENARIO g
                 join t_vorschrift v on (g.v_id = v.regindexid)
                where (sc_datum is not null or sc_year is not null) and v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID 
                group by v.vorschriftid, sc_type, sc_fahrzeug_typ
            ), cte_daten_getex2 as (
                /* Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 2: Sortorder über Fahrzeugarten definieren */
                select c.*, case sc_fahrzeug_typ when 'PCV' then 1 when 'INDEPENDENT' then 2 else 3 end as sortorder
                from cte_daten_getex c
            ), cte_daten_getex3 as (
                /* Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 3: Auf Fahrzeugart mit höchster Priorität limitieren */
                select distinct vorschriftid, sc_type, first_value(sc_year) over (partition by sc_type order by sortorder) getex_einsatzjahr, 
                                                      first_value(sc_datum) over (partition by sc_type order by sortorder) getex_einsatzdatum, 
                                                    first_value(sc_fahrzeug_typ) over (partition by sc_type order by sortorder) as fahrzeugtyp
                from cte_daten_getex2
            ), cte_vergleich as (
                select g.fahrzeugtyp as getex_fahrzeugtyp, 
                    case when (g.getex_einsatzjahr is not null) then to_char(g.getex_einsatzjahr, 'yyyy')
                        else to_char(g.getex_einsatzdatum, 'dd.mm.yyyy') end as getex_einsatzdatum, 
                    g.sc_type as getex_einsatzdatum_typ, 
                    case when (g.getex_einsatzjahr is not null) then to_char(r.modeljahr, 'yyyy') 
                        else to_char(r.einsatzdatum, 'dd.mm.yyyy')  end as regindex_einsatzdatum ,
                    r.einsatzdatum_typ regindex_einsatzdatum_typ,
                    case when (g.getex_einsatzjahr is not null) then
                       emano_util.fIsUnequal(to_char(g.getex_einsatzjahr, 'yyyy'), to_char(r.modeljahr, 'yyyy'))
                       else 
                       emano_util.fIsUnequal(g.getex_einsatzdatum, trunc(r.einsatzdatum)) end as diff
                from cte_daten_regindex r
                full outer join cte_daten_getex3 g on (r.mapping_getex = g.sc_type)
                where g.fahrzeugtyp in ('PCV', 'INDEPENDENT')  
            )
            select max(diff) into lResult
            from cte_vergleich;

            if (lResult is null ) then
              lResult := 0;
            end if;
            -- PhaseIns Included  story 1228/////---
            select count(*) into l_co
            from MV_GETEX_THEMA_SCENARIO gt
            join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid is not null and v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID and  v.regindexid = gt.v_id  )  --1797
            where v.EINSATZDATUM_MODELLID = 30;  -- Modeljahr
            if (l_co = 0) then 
             -- return 1;  
             l_diff_phaseinIncl :=0;
            end if;
            begin
                select distinct  case when (nvl(gt.SC_PHASEINSINCLUDED, 'false')= 'false' and  nvl(v.phasein_enthalten, 0) =0 
                       or nvl(gt.SC_PHASEINSINCLUDED, 'false')= 'true' and  nvl(v.phasein_enthalten, 0) =1 )
                        then  0  
                         else 1 end  into l_diff_phaseinIncl 
                from MV_GETEX_THEMA_SCENARIO gt
                join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid is not null and v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID and  v.regindexid = gt.v_id  )  --1797
                where v.EINSATZDATUM_MODELLID = 30
                order by 1 asc
                fetch first 1 rows only;

                if lResult = 0 then 
                   lResult := l_diff_phaseinIncl;
                end if;
            exception when NO_DATA_FOUND then
              null; -- lResult :=0;
            end;    
            -- \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\
        else
            with cte_daten_regindex as (
                /* Einsatzdatumsangaben aus RegIndex */
                select vorschriftid, vret.einsatzdatum_typid, einsatzdatum, et.mapping_getex, et.einsatzdatum_typ
                from t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ vret
                join t_einsatzdatum_typ et on (vret.einsatzdatum_typid = et.einsatzdatum_typid)
                where vret.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID 
                and et.mapping_getex is not null
            ), cte_daten_getex as (
                /* Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 1: Minimum über alle Themen holen */
                select v.vorschriftid, sc_type, trunc(min(sc_datum)) as sc_datum, sc_fahrzeug_typ
                from MV_GETEX_THEMA_SCENARIO g
                join t_vorschrift v on (g.v_id = v.regindexid)
                where sc_datum is not null and v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID 
                group by v.vorschriftid, sc_type, sc_fahrzeug_typ
            ), cte_daten_getex2 as (
                /* Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 2: Sortorder über Fahrzeugarten definieren */
                select c.*, case sc_fahrzeug_typ when 'PCV' then 1 when 'INDEPENDENT' then 2 else 3 end as sortorder
                from cte_daten_getex c
            ), cte_daten_getex3 as (
                /* Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 3: Auf Fahrzeugart mit höchster Priorität limitieren */
                select distinct vorschriftid, sc_type, first_value(sc_datum) over (partition by sc_type order by sortorder) getex_einsatzdatum, 
                                                    first_value(sc_fahrzeug_typ) over (partition by sc_type order by sortorder) as fahrzeugtyp
                from cte_daten_getex2
            ), cte_vergleich as (    
                select g.fahrzeugtyp as getex_fahrzeugtyp, g.getex_einsatzdatum, g.sc_type as getex_einsatzdatum_typ,
                    r.einsatzdatum regindex_einsatzdatum, r.einsatzdatum_typ regindex_einsatzdatum_typ,
                    emano_util.fIsUnequal(trunc(g.getex_einsatzdatum), trunc(r.einsatzdatum)) as diff
                from cte_daten_regindex r
                full outer join cte_daten_getex3 g on (r.mapping_getex = g.sc_type)
                where g.fahrzeugtyp in ('PCV', 'INDEPENDENT')  
            )
            select max(diff) into lResult
            from cte_vergleich;

        end if; 

        if (lResult is null) then
            lResult := 0;
        end if;

        return lResult;

    exception
        when others then
            debug('exception fCompareEinsatzdaten',aVorschriftid);
            raise;

    end fCompareEinsatzdaten;


  procedure pCompareVorschrift(aVorschriftID in number) is
        lBitMask number := 0;
        lGetexKey T_VORSCHRIFT.REGINDEXID%type;
        lAnzahlGetexKey number;
        lCompareVorschriftNummer number;
        lCompareDocumentDate number;
        lCompareDocumentType number;
        lCompareTitleLong number;
        lCompareTitleShort number;
        lCompareStatus number;
        lCompareEinsatzdatumModell number;
        lCompareInkraftsetzungsdatum number;
        lRegIndexVorschriftTypID number;

        lDiffAntriebsart number;
        lDiffFzTyp number;   
        lDiffLand number;
        lDiffThema number; 

        lStatusUpdateGetex number;
        lVorschriftTypID number :=0;
        l_are_co number :=0;
        lEinsatzdatum_ModellID number :=0;
    begin

        select regindexid into lGetexKey
        from t_vorschrift
        where vorschriftid = aVorschriftID;

        if (lGetexKey is null) then
            update t_vorschrift
            set getex_vergleich_bitmaske = -1, status_update_getex = 30
            where vorschriftid = aVorschriftID;
            return;
        end if;

        select count(*) into lAnzahlGetexKey
        from mv_getex_vorschrift
        where reg_id = lGetexKey
        and rev_current = 'true';    

        if (lAnzahlGetexKey != 1) then
            update t_vorschrift
            set getex_vergleich_bitmaske = -2, status_update_getex = 30
            where vorschriftid = aVorschriftID;
            return;
        end if;

        lVorschriftTypID := fCalcVorschriftTypID(lGetexKey);

        lEinsatzdatum_ModellID := fEinsatzdatum_ModellId(aVorschriftID);
        select
            emano_util.fIsUnequal(trim(v.vorschrift_nummer), trim(mg.reg_num)), emano_util.fIsUnequal(v.dokumentendatum, trunc(mg.rev_doc_datum)), 
            emano_util.fIsUnequal(dt.document_typeid,gdt.document_typeid),
            emano_util.fIsUnequal(v.vorschrift_bezeichnung, mg.rev_title), emano_util.fIsUnequal(v.titel_kurz, mg.rev_shorttitle), 
            emano_util.fIsUnequal(vs.mapping_getex,mg.rev_v_status), --emano_util.fIsUnequal(em.mapping_getex,nvl(mg.timelinedatetype,'EU')),
            emano_util.fIsUnequal(em.einsatzdatum_modellid, lEinsatzdatum_ModellID ),
            v.vorschrift_typid
            into
            lCompareVorschriftNummer, lCompareDocumentDate, lCompareDocumentType, 
            lCompareTitleLong, lCompareTitleShort,
            lCompareStatus, lCompareEinsatzdatumModell,
            lRegIndexVorschriftTypID
        from t_vorschrift v
        left outer join t_document_type dt on (v.document_typeid = dt.document_typeid)
        left outer join t_vorschrift_status vs on (v.vorschrift_statusid = vs.vorschrift_statusid)
        left outer join t_einsatzdatum_modell em on (v.einsatzdatum_modellid = em.einsatzdatum_modellid)
        join mv_getex_vorschrift mg on (v.regindexid = mg.reg_id)
        join mv_getex_vorschrift_document_type gdt on (gdt.reg_id = mg.reg_id)
        where v.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID;

        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,0,lCompareVorschriftNummer);
        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,1,lCompareDocumentDate);
        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,2,lCompareDocumentType);
        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,3,lCompareTitleShort);
        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,4,lCompareTitleLong);
        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,5,lCompareStatus);
        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,6,lCompareEinsatzdatumModell);
        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,7,emano_util.fIsUnequal(lRegIndexVorschriftTypID,lVorschriftTypID));

        -- bei Supplements werden die Antriebsarten, Fahrzeugklassen, Länder und Themen nicht gesetzt
        -- Wenn nicht gesetzt, dann immer Anzeige "identisch"
        if (lVorschriftTypID != 20) then
            -- Antriebsarten (Bit 8) -- abschalten nach story 1206
         /*   select count(vra.antriebsartid) into lDiffAntriebsart 
            from t_vorschrift_ref_antriebsart vra
            join t_antriebsart aa on (aa.antriebsartid = vra.antriebsartid)
            where vra.vorschriftid = avorschriftid 
            and geloescht =0
            and aa.mapping_GETEX not in (select antriebsart from mv_GETEX_vorschrift_antriebsart where v_id = lGetexKey);

            if (lDiffAntriebsart > 0) then
                lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,8,1);
            end if;

            -- reverse
            select count(antriebsart) into lDiffAntriebsart 
            from mv_GETEX_vorschrift_antriebsart
            where v_id = lGetexKey
            and antriebsart not in (select aa.mapping_GETEX from t_antriebsart aa 
                                 join t_vorschrift_ref_antriebsart vra on (aa.antriebsartid = vra.antriebsartid)
                                 where vra.vorschriftid = avorschriftid and geloescht =0);

            if (lDiffAntriebsart > 0) then
                lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,8,1);
            end if;        
          */  
            -- Fahrzeugklassen (Bit 9)
            select count(vrf.fahrzeugklasseid) into lDiffFzTyp 
            from t_vorschrift_ref_fahrzeugklasse vrf
            where vrf.vorschriftid =  avorschriftid 
            and vrf.fahrzeugklasseid not in (select fahrzeugklasseid from mv_GETEX_vorschrift_FZ_TYP where v_id = lGetexKey);

            if (lDiffFzTyp > 0) then
                lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,9,1);
            end if;

            -- reverse check
            select count(fahrzeugklasseid) into lDiffFzTyp
            from mv_GETEX_vorschrift_FZ_TYP 
            where v_id = lGetexKey
            and fahrzeugklasseid not in (select vrf.fahrzeugklasseid 
                                        from t_vorschrift_ref_fahrzeugklasse vrf  
                                         where vrf.vorschriftid = avorschriftid );
            if (lDiffFzTyp > 0) then
                lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,9,1);
            end if;        

            -- Länder (Bit 10)
            if(USE_GETEX_SUBCOUNTRY = 0) then
                select count( REGINDEX_LANDID) into lDiffLand 
                from mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND 
                where v_id = lGetexKey 
                and REGINDEX_LANDID not in (select landid from t_vorschrift_ref_land  where vorschriftid = avorschriftid and geloescht =0);

                if (lDiffLand > 0) then
                    lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,10,1);
                end if;

                 --  reverse  check ----
                select count(*)  into lDiffLand
                from t_vorschrift_ref_land 
                where vorschriftid = avorschriftid 
                and geloescht =0 and landid is not null
                and landid not in (select regindex_landid  from mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND 
                                 where v_id = lGetexKey
                );

                if (lDiffLand > 0) then
                    lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,10,1);
                end if;     
            else   --USE_GETEX_SUBCOUNTRY = 1
                select count(*) into l_are_co
                from t_vorschrift_ref_land vrl 
                join t_land l on l.landid =vrl.landid and l.b_nummer in ('B89', 'B88','B97')
                where vrl.vorschriftid = avorschriftid and vrl.geloescht =0;

                 --  in Regindex vorhanden, aber nicht in GETEX 
                with cte_subl as (select mg.landid, mg.mapping_text, mg.mapping_typ
                           from T_LAND_MAPPING_GETEX mg
                            join t_vorschrift_ref_land vl on (vl.landid = mg.landid)
                            where vl.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                            and vl.geloescht = 0
                )
                select  count(*)  into lDiffLand 
                from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND gl 
                where v_id = lGetexKey   -- for the Subcountries typ1  landid  is null, for typ 2 
                and ( gl.REGINDEX_LANDID is not null 
                     and 
                     (
                        gl.REGINDEX_LANDID not in ( select landid from t_vorschrift_ref_land  
                                                    where vorschriftid = avorschriftid  and geloescht =0)
                       and gl.REGINDEX_LANDID not in (select landid from cte_subl ct 
                                                         where (ct.mapping_typ =1 and ct.mapping_text = gl.isocode5 
                                                                or ct.mapping_typ =2 and ct.mapping_text = gl.iso_code3)
                                                    )
                      )
                      or 
                       gl.REGINDEX_LANDID is null 
                       and 
                       (
                         ( gl.iso_code3 not in (select mapping_text from t_land_mapping_getex)
                             and gl.iso_code3 != 'ARE' -- sonderfall (Typ 3 )
                          )
                           OR  gl.iso_code3 = 'ARE' and     -- in Getex  'ARE' vorhanden
                                  l_are_co  < 3  -- in Regindex nicht alle 'ARE' für diese Vorschrift
                       )
                );

                if (lDiffLand > 0 ) then
                    lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,10,1);
                end if;

                 --  reverse  check ----
                      --  sind ARE länder in GETEX zugewiesen
                     select count(*) into l_are_co  
                     from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND 
                     where v_id = lGetexKey -- '656dc6779d03c7614dc9ae2e' --lGetexKey
                     and regindex_landid is null and iso_code3 ='ARE';

                 --  in Regindex vorhanden, aber nicht in GETEX      
                    with cte_subl as ( select mg.landid, mg.mapping_text, mg.mapping_typ 
                                    from T_LAND_MAPPING_GETEX mg
                                    join mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND gl on ( mg.mapping_typ =1 and gl.isocode5 = mg.mapping_text 
                                                                         or  mg.mapping_typ =2 and gl.iso_code3 = mg.mapping_text) 
                                    where gl.v_id = lGetexKey  --'656dc6779d03c7614dc9ae2e' --
                    ),
                    cte_are as ( select landid  from t_land where b_nummer in ( 'B88', 'B89', 'B97')
                    )
                    select count(*)  into lDiffLand
                    from t_vorschrift_ref_land 
                    where vorschriftid = avorschriftid    -- 1630
                    and geloescht = 0  --and  landid =1036 --and landid is not null
                    and (( landid not in (select regindex_landid  from mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND 
                                     where v_id = lGetexKey --'656dc6779d03c7614dc9ae2e' --lGetexKey
                                     and regindex_landid is not null
                                )
                        -- not in  sub_land list für diesen Vorschrift
                         and ( landid not in (select ct.landid from cte_subl ct ) ) 
                         and landid not in (select landid from cte_are)  --exclude ARE
                      )
                      OR  -- ARE Länder   (Typ3 )
                      (   landid  in (select landid from cte_are)   -- 'ARE'   in regindex
                        and l_are_co = 0   -- keine 'ARE' in Getex (kann nur 0 oder 3 sein)
                      )

                   );

                    if (lDiffLand > 0) then
                        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,10,1);
                    end if;     

            end if;

            -- Themen (Bit 11)
            select count( REGINDEX_THEMAID)  into lDiffThema 
            from mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA 
            where v_id = lGetexKey 
            and regindex_themaid is not null
            and REGINDEX_THEMAID not in (  select themaid from t_vorschrift_ref_Thema 
                                    where vorschriftid =  avorschriftid  and geloescht =0);

            if (lDiffThema > 0) then
                lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,11,1);
            end if;

            -- reverse check 
            select count(themaid) into lDiffThema 
            from t_vorschrift_ref_Thema 
            where vorschriftid =  avorschriftid 
            and geloescht =0
            and themaid not in (select REGINDEX_THEMAID  from mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA 
                               where v_id = lGetexKey and regindex_themaid is not null);

            if (lDiffThema > 0) then
                lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,11,1);
            end if;   

        end if;   

        -- Inkraftsetzungsdatum (Bit 12)
        select emano_util.fIsUnequal(trunc(gv.rev_inforce_datum), trunc(vret.einsatzdatum)) into lCompareInkraftsetzungsdatum
        from mv_getex_vorschrift gv
        left outer join t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ vret on (vret.einsatzdatum_typid = 1000 and vret.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID)
        where gv.reg_id = lGetexKey;

        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,12,lCompareInkraftsetzungsdatum);

        -- Einsatzdaten (Bit 13)
        lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,13,fCompareEinsatzdaten(aVorschriftID));

        --relations (Bit 14)
        if (fCheckDifference_to_Getex_relations(avorschriftID) != 0) then
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,14,1);
        else
           lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,14,0);
        end if;

        --relations (Bit 15) -- new bits - Tharun Kommaddi
        if (fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Successor_relations(avorschriftID) != 0) then
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask, 15, 1);
        else
           lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,15,0);
        end if;

        -- relations (Bit 16)
        if (fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Amendment_relations(avorschriftID) != 0) then
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask, 16, 1);
        else
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,16,0);
        end if;

        -- relations (Bit 17)
        if (fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Demands_relations(avorschriftID) != 0) then
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask, 17, 1);
        else
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,17,0);
        end if;


        -- relations (Bit 18)
        if (fCheckDifference_to_Getex_LinkedTo_relations(avorschriftID) != 0) then
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask, 18, 1);
        else
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,18,0);
        end if;

        -- relations (Bit 19)
        if (fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Equivalent_relations(avorschriftID) != 0) then
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask, 19, 1);
        else
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,19,0);
        end if;

        -- relations (Bit 20)
        if (fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Consolidates_relations(avorschriftID) != 0) then
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask, 20, 1);
        else
            lBitMask := emano_util.fBitMaskSet(lBitMask,20,0);
        end if;







        update t_vorschrift set getex_vergleich_bitmaske = lBitMask, status_update_getex = case when lBitMask > 0 then 20 else 10 end
        where vorschriftid = aVorschriftID;


    end pCompareVorschrift;       

   /*
  *
  */
  FUNCTION fTimestampToDate(aInput varchar2) RETURN DATE IS
    BEGIN
        RETURN CAST(to_timestamp_tz(aInput, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi:ss.ff3+TZH:TZM') at time zone DBTIMEZONE as date) ;   
    END fTimestampToDate;

    /*
    **
    */
  PROCEDURE pactualiseVorschriftKerndaten(aregindexid varchar2, avorschriftid number)
    AS
        l_VorschriftNummer varchar2(500);
        l_DocumentDate date;
        l_DocumentType number;
        l_TitleLong  varchar2(2000);
        l_TitleShort  varchar2(500);
        l_Status number;
        --l_EinsatzdatumModell number;
       -- l_Inkraftsetzungsdatum number;
        l_RegIndexVorschriftTypID number;
        l_duppl_vorhanden number :=0;
        vorschrift_nummmer_exist EXCEPTION;
        l_publ_name varchar2(200);
    BEGIN

    SELECT  reg_num, rev_doc_datum, gdt.document_typeid, rev_title, rev_shorttitle, vst.VORSCHRIFT_STATUSID, --reg_status, 
     -- case when timelinedatetype = 'EU' then 10 
      --      when timelinedatetype = 'CHINA' THEN 20 
      --       when timelinedatetype = 'MODELYEAR' then 30
      --      else 10 end, 
      publ_name
    INTO l_VorschriftNummer, l_DocumentDate, l_DocumentType, l_TitleLong, l_TitleShort, l_Status, --l_EinsatzdatumModell,
    l_publ_name
    FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT gv
    join mv_getex_vorschrift_document_type gdt on (gdt.reg_id = gv.reg_id)
    join T_VORSCHRIFT_STATUS vst on (vst.mapping_getex = gv.rev_v_status)
            where gv.reg_id =  aregindexid --'650c239d80925e68c5cad0df'
            and rev_current = 'true';
    -- ermittlung einsatzmodelid  benutzend T_Publisher (T. 1392)
    --l_EinsatzdatumModell :=  fEinsatzdatum_ModellId(avorschriftid);
    -- check if rahmenrichtlin
      l_RegIndexVorschriftTypID := fCalcVorschriftTypID(aregindexid); 

    -- check dupplicates 
    /*select count(*) into l_duppl_vorhanden
    from T_VORSCHRIFT where trim(VORSCHRIFT_NUMMER) = trim(l_VorschriftNummer)
    and ((l_DocumentDate is null and dokumentendatum is null) OR trunc(l_DocumentDate) = trunc(dokumentendatum));
    if( l_duppl_vorhanden>0) then
        RAISE vorschrift_nummmer_exist;  --exception to application
    end if;*/
    -- einsatzmodel changed ??
    --select EINSATZDATUM_MODELLID into l_prev_modelid
   -- from t_vorschrift WHERE vorschriftID = avorschriftid ;

    pactualiseVorschriftEinsatzmodel(aregindexid , avorschriftid);
    --desc t_vorschrift
    UPDATE t_vorschrift
    SET VORSCHRIFT_NUMMER = l_VorschriftNummer, DOKUMENTENDATUM = trunc(l_DocumentDate), DOCUMENT_TYPEID =l_DocumentType, 
        VORSCHRIFT_BEZEICHNUNG = l_TitleLong, titel_kurz = l_TitleShort, VORSCHRIFT_STATUSID = l_Status, publisher = l_publ_name,
        VORSCHRIFT_TYPID =l_RegIndexVorschriftTypID --, EINSATZDATUM_MODELLID =l_EinsatzdatumModell, 
    WHERE vorschriftID = avorschriftid ;

    EXCEPTION
    when OTHERS then
      debug('Exception pactualiseVorschriftKerndaten','Vorschrift: ' || aVorschriftid || ', GETEXID: ' || aRegindexid);
      RAISE;
    END pactualiseVorschriftKerndaten;

  /*
  *
  */
  procedure pactualiseVorschriftThema(aregindexid varchar2, avorschriftid number) as
  --  l_th_ids varchar2(2000);
  BEGIN
   /* select listagg(t.themaid, ':') within group (order by t.themaid) into l_th_ids 
      from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA gvt 
      join T_thema t on t.nummer = trim(substr(gvt.thema_name, 1, instr(gvt.thema_name, ' ')) )
     where V_id = aregindexid; -- '652f96a34880f53d523f5dee'
     */
        -- change state of existing       
        UPDATE  t_vorschrift_ref_THEMA set geloescht = 0 
         where vorschriftID = avorschriftid  and geloescht =1
          and themaid in (select regindex_themaid from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA 
        where v_id = aregindexid and regindex_themaid is not null );
           -- and ( themaid in ( select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_th_ids, ':'))) );
          -- 
       UPDATE  t_vorschrift_ref_THEMA set geloescht = 1 
         where vorschriftID = avorschriftid  and geloescht =0
           and  themaid not in ( select regindex_themaid from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA 
                                 where v_id = aregindexid and regindex_themaid is not null);
    -- add not existing
      MERGE into t_vorschrift_ref_THEMA dest
           USING ( select avorschriftid as vorschriftID, regindex_themaid as themaid
                    from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA 
                    where v_id = aregindexid and regindex_themaid is not null) src
           on (src.vorschriftID = dest.vorschriftID 
               and src.themaid = dest.themaid)
          WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
           insert (vorschriftID,    themaid,   geloescht) --, bemerkung)
           values (src.vorschriftID, src.themaid, 0);
  END;

  /*
  *
  */
  procedure pactualiseVorschriftAntriebsart(aregindexid varchar2, avorschriftid number) as
    --l_aa_ids varchar2(100);
  BEGIN

  /*select listagg(aa.antriebsartid, ':') within group (order by aa.antriebsartid)  into l_aa_ids 
    from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_ANTRIEBSART gva 
    join t_antriebsart aa on (aa.mapping_getex = gva.ANTRIEBSART )
   where  gva.v_id = aregindexid;
   */
     UPDATE  t_vorschrift_ref_ANTRIEBSART set geloescht = 0 
      where vorschriftID = avorschriftid  and geloescht =1
        and ( ANTRIEBSARTid in ( select regindex_antriebsartid from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_ANTRIEBSART where v_id = aregindexid) );
      -- select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_aa_ids, ':'))
      UPDATE  t_vorschrift_ref_ANTRIEBSART set geloescht = 1 
         where vorschriftID = avorschriftid  and geloescht =0
           and ( ANTRIEBSARTid not in ( select regindex_antriebsartid from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_ANTRIEBSART where v_id = aregindexid ) );

      MERGE into t_vorschrift_ref_ANTRIEBSART dest
           USING ( select avorschriftid as vorschriftID, regindex_antriebsartid as antriebsartid 
                     from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_ANTRIEBSART where v_id = aregindexid ) src
           on (src.vorschriftID = dest.vorschriftID 
               and src.antriebsartid = dest.antriebsartid)
          WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
           INSERT (vorschriftID,    antriebsartid,   geloescht) --, bemerkung)
           values (src.vorschriftID, src.antriebsartid, 0);
END;

/*
  *
  */
procedure pactualiseVorschriftFahrzeugklasse(aregindexid varchar2, avorschriftid number) as
    --l_fz_class_ids varchar2(100);
  BEGIN
  --select * from t_Fahrzeugklasse
  /*select listagg(fk.Fahrzeugklasseid, ':') within group (order by fk.Fahrzeugklasseid)  into l_fz_class_ids 
    from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP gvfz 
    join t_fahrzeugKlasse fk on (fk.mapping_getex = gvfz.fahrzeug_typ )
   where  gvfz.v_id = aregindexid;
   */
     delete from  t_vorschrift_ref_fahrzeugKlasse 
      where vorschriftID = avorschriftid
       and ( fahrzeugKlasseid not in (select FAHRZEUGKLASSEID from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP  where v_id = aregindexid) );
       -- and ( fahrzeugKlasseid not in ( select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_fz_class_ids, ':'))) );

      MERGE into t_vorschrift_ref_fahrzeugKlasse dest
           USING ( select avorschriftid as vorschriftID, fahrzeugKlasseid 
                     from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP  where v_id = aregindexid ) src
           on (src.vorschriftID = dest.vorschriftID 
               and src.fahrzeugKlasseid = dest.fahrzeugKlasseid)
          WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
           INSERT (vorschriftID,    fahrzeugKlasseid) 
           values (src.vorschriftID, src.fahrzeugKlasseid);
END;

/*
*
*/
  procedure pactualiseVorschriftLand(aregindexid varchar2, avorschriftid number) as
   -- l_land_ids varchar2(2000);
   l_are_co number :=0;
  BEGIN

   /* select listagg(l.landid, ':') within group (order by l.landid)  into l_land_ids 
      from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND gvl 
      join t_land l on (l.iso_Code_3 = gvl.iso_Code3 )
     where  gvl.v_id = aregindexid and gvl.typ = 'COUNTRY';
   */
     select count(*) into l_are_co
     from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND where  ISO_code3 ='ARE' and v_id = aregindexid;

   if (USE_GETEX_SUBCOUNTRY =0 ) then
       UPDATE  T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_LAND set geloescht = 0 
       where vorschriftID = avorschriftid  and geloescht =1
       and landid in (select regindex_landid from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND where v_id = aregindexid and regindex_landid is not null);
       -- and ( landid in ( select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_land_ids, ':'))) );

       UPDATE  T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_LAND set geloescht = 1 
       where vorschriftID = avorschriftid  and geloescht =0
       and  landid not in ( select regindex_landid from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND where v_id = aregindexid and regindex_landid is not null) ;

       MERGE into T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_LAND dest
       USING ( select avorschriftid as vorschriftID, regindex_landid as landid from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND 
               where v_id = aregindexid and regindex_landid is not null) src
         on (src.vorschriftID = dest.vorschriftID 
               and src.landid = dest.landid)
       WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
           INSERT (  vorschriftID,      landid,    geloescht) 
           values (src.vorschriftID, src.landid,   0);
    else
        UPDATE  T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_LAND set geloescht = 0 
        where vorschriftID = avorschriftid  and geloescht =1 --avorschriftid 20181
        and                                                       --'6579a5ea23bb3a5bf7f818f6'
           ( landid in (select regindex_landid from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_LAND where v_id = aregindexid and regindex_landid is not null)
