             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
         list_to_del := '';
         select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
         from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
         where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  --436 
         and beziehung_art not in (
            select x.column_value  
            from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type , ':')  ) x  
         )
         --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
         and ( -- ADJUST_GETEX_EQUI_DEMANDS = 1  
               -- OR  (ADJUST_GETEX_EQUI_DEMANDS = 0 AND 
                beziehung_art not in (40, 102  , 10, 60, 200)
              --  )
         );
         DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
         where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
         DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        Select listagg(distinct decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES', case when instr(upper(l_reg_number),'UN-R')=1  then 30 
                                                                 else 20 end, 
                     'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102,  'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES', 200, 0),
                    ':')  
        into lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        where   vorschriftid = avorschriftid   -- v_id= '65f3e55329fdcf5349b2d2b5'
        and relationtype  in ( 'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CONSOLIDATES', 
                      'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS', 'LINKED_TO' ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr in (select x.column_value bez_art  
                        from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':')  ) x )
        LOOP
          list_to_del := '';
           select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
          from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
          where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  --1603 --
          and beziehung_art =  cur_dr.bez_art     -- in (10)   -- but
          --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
          and (  beziehung_art not in (40, 102  , 10, 60, 200) )
          and vorgaenger_vorschriftid not in                       --                     
          ( select distinct vorschriftid FROM  MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION where  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key --  
              and relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                    60, 'LINKED_FROM',  40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY',  102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', '') 
          );

          DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
           where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
          DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
        from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
        and ( beziehung_art not in (40, 102  , 10, 60, 200)
        )
        and beziehung_art not in (select y.column_value 
                                    from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y    
        );
        DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
          where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
        DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
          where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

  END pActualise_Changes_Relations_vomGetex;


PROCEDURE pActualise_Equivalent_Relations_vomGetex (avorschriftid IN NUMBER) 
AS
        l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;
        l_relationtype varchar2(50);
        l_vorschrift_getex_key varchar2(64);

        lst_rel_type varchar2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev varchar2(250);
        l_reg_number varchar2(250);
        l_successorsincluded varchar2(32);
        l_multigroupid varchar2(64);
        list_to_del varchar2(1000);
    BEGIN
        select regindexid into l_vorschrift_getex_key from t_vorschrift where vorschriftid = avorschriftid;

        FOR cur in ( select distinct vr.vorschriftid, vr.targetid as targetid, vr.relationtype relationtype, vr.reg_number, vr.target_reg_number,
                   vr.successorsincluded, vr.multigroupid,
                        tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
                     FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                     join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                     where vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  -- 
                      and vr.relationtype IN ( 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY') --
                     order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        )
        LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur.relationtype;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;

            if ( l_relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY' 
                   AND ( l_multigroupid is null or nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') ='true' )) then
               MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                 USING ( select avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID, 102  as beziehung_art ,  
                         l_tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid,  
                         case when   nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' 
                              then 10 
                              else 0 end as HOMOLOGATION_SERIE
                         from dual ) src
                    on (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftID 
                        and src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                        and src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art)
                  WHEN MATCHED THEN
                    UPDATE SET dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE = src.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE 
                    --where  (dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE is null or dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE != 10)
                  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                   INSERT (vorgaenger_vorschriftID,      nachfolger_vorschriftid,    beziehung_art,    HOMOLOGATION_SERIE) 
                   VALUES (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID, src.nachfolger_vorschriftid, src.beziehung_art, src.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE );

             end if;


        end LOOP;
        -- vorschrift      changes or successor or demands 
        FOR cur_r in ( select distinct vr.v_id, vr.vorschriftid, vr.targetid as targetid, vr.relationtype relationtype, vr.reg_number, vr.target_reg_number,
                       vr.successorsincluded, multigroupid, --vr.SC_TYPE,  vr.SC_VEHICLETYPE, vr.SC_TOPICID, vr.SC_DATE,
                        tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
                     FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                     join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                     where vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
                      and vr.relationtype  IN ( 'EQUIVALENT_TO') --
                     order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        )
        LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur_r.relationtype;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;

            if ( l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO' AND nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') then
               MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                 USING ( select avorschriftid as nachfolger_vorschriftID, 102  as beziehung_art ,  
                         l_tar_vorschriftid  as vorgaenger_vorschriftid,   10 as HOMOLOGATION_SERIE
                         from dual ) src
                    on (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftID 
                        and src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                        and src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art)
                  WHEN MATCHED THEN
                    UPDATE SET HOMOLOGATION_SERIE = 10  --where  nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 10
                  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                   INSERT (vorgaenger_vorschriftID,      nachfolger_vorschriftid,    beziehung_art,    HOMOLOGATION_SERIE) 
                   VALUES (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID, src.nachfolger_vorschriftid, src.beziehung_art, src.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE );

             end if;

        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        -- ? filtern die with multigroup  not null having ..
        SELECT listagg(distinct decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', case when instr(upper(l_reg_number),'UN-R')=1  then 30 
                                                                          else 20 end,  'LINKED', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,  
                                'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        where vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and relationtype not in ('CONSOLIDATES',  'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES',  'DEMANDS', 'LINKED_TO' );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 

         -- only EQUIVALENT will be taken into account
        FOR cur_d in ( select x.column_value bez_art  
                        from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':')  ) x )
        LOOP
          list_to_del := '';
              select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
              from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
             where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  
             and beziehung_art =  102  --cur_d.bez_art     
             and nachfolger_vorschriftid not in                       --                   
             ( select vorschriftid FROM  MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION where  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key   
               and (relationtype =  decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES', 30, 'CHANGES',
                    60, 'LINKED_TO', 40, 'DEMANDS',  102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES', '')  
                  )
             ) ;
             --AND (  beziehung_art not in (40,   10, 20, 30, 60) );
             DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
             DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
         list_to_del := '';
         select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
         from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
         where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid   
          and beziehung_art =102 ;

         DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
         where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
         DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        Select listagg(distinct decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES', case when instr(upper(l_reg_number),'UN-R')=1  then 30 else 20 end, 
                     'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102,  'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES', 200, 0),
                    ':')  
        into lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        where   vorschriftid = avorschriftid   
        and relationtype  in ( 'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS', 'LINKED_TO', 'CONSOLIDATES' ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr in (select x.column_value bez_art  
                        from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':')  ) x )
        LOOP
          list_to_del := '';
           select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
          from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
          where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  
          and beziehung_art = 102 -- cur_dr.bez_art     
           and vorgaenger_vorschriftid not in                       --                      
          ( select distinct vorschriftid FROM  MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION where  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key 
            and relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                    60, 'LINKED_FROM',  40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY',  102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',  '') 
          );
          DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
           where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
          DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
        from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid
        and beziehung_art=102
         and beziehung_art not in (select y.column_value 
                                    from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y    
        );
        DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
          where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
        DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
          where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

END pActualise_Equivalent_Relations_vomGetex;


 --Demands-Verknüpfungen massenupdate vom GETEX
PROCEDURE pActualise_Demands_Relations_vomGetex (avorschriftid IN NUMBER) 
AS
        l_target_key varchar2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;

        l_relationtype varchar2(50);
        l_getex_v_key varchar2(64);
        l_vorschrift_getex_key varchar2(64);

        l_min_date_all_vehicles date;
        l_min_date_new_types date;
        l_type_all_new varchar2(32);
        lst_rel_type varchar2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev varchar2(250);
        l_ret_datum number :=0;

        l_reg_number varchar2(250);
        l_successorsincluded varchar2(32);
        l_multigroupid varchar2(64);
        list_to_del varchar2(1000);
    BEGIN
        select regindexid into l_vorschrift_getex_key from t_vorschrift where vorschriftid = avorschriftid;

        FOR cur in ( select distinct vr.vorschriftid, vr.targetid as targetid, vr.relationtype relationtype, vr.reg_number, vr.target_reg_number,
                     vr.successorsincluded, vr.multigroupid,
                        tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
                     FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                     join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                     where vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
                      and vr.relationtype NOT IN ( 'SUCCESSOR',  'CONSOLIDATES', 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO',  'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS') --
                     order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        )
        LOOP
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;

              -- IS_DEMANDED_BY :  Immer 
            if(   (cur.relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY' )
                AND ( l_multigroupid is null or nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )) then
                --bestimme datum für PCV, wenn null dann für INDEPENDENT
                l_ret_datum := fgetRelationDates_Getex(avorschriftid , l_target_key,
                       l_relationtype , l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types );

                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                 USING ( select avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID, 40  as beziehung_art ,  
                         l_tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid,  
                         case when   nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' 
                              then 10 
                              else 0 end as HOMOLOGATION_SERIE
                         from dual 
                 ) src
                  ON (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftID 
                        and src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                        and src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art) 
                  WHEN MATCHED THEN
                    UPDATE SET HOMOLOGATION_SERIE = src.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE , datum_neue_typen = l_min_date_new_types, 
                         datum_alle_typen = l_min_date_all_vehicles
                  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                    INSERT (vorgaenger_vorschriftID,      nachfolger_vorschriftid,    beziehung_art,    HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,
                            datum_neue_typen,   datum_alle_typen) 
                    VALUES (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID, src.nachfolger_vorschriftid, src.beziehung_art, src.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,
                            l_min_date_new_types, l_min_date_all_vehicles );
            end if;

        end LOOP;

        -- vorschrift      changes or successor or demands 
        FOR cur_r in ( select distinct vr.v_id, vr.vorschriftid, vr.targetid as targetid, vr.relationtype relationtype, vr.reg_number, vr.target_reg_number,
                       vr.successorsincluded, multigroupid, --vr.SC_TYPE,  vr.SC_VEHICLETYPE, vr.SC_TOPICID, vr.SC_DATE,
                        tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
                        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                       join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                       where vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
                       and vr.relationtype  in (  'DEMANDS') --
                       order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        )
        LOOP
            l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
             l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;

            -- DEMANDS :
             --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            if( ( cur_r.relationtype = 'DEMANDS' )
               and ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' or l_multigroupid is null) -- ignore relations with multigroup having l_successorsincluded=false
            ) then
                --bestimme datum für PCV, wenn null dann für INDEPENDENT
                l_ret_datum := fgetRelationDates_Getex(l_tar_vorschriftid , l_getex_v_key,
                       'IS_DEMANDED_BY' , l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types   );

                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                 USING ( select avorschriftid as nachfolger_vorschriftID, 40  as beziehung_art ,  
                         l_tar_vorschriftid  as vorgaenger_vorschriftid,  
                         case when nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') ='true'   
                              then 10 
                              else 0 end as HOMOLOGATION_SERIE
                         from dual 
                 ) src
                  ON (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftID 
                        and src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                        and src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art) 
                  WHEN MATCHED THEN
                    UPDATE SET HOMOLOGATION_SERIE = src.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE , datum_neue_typen = l_min_date_new_types, 
                         datum_alle_typen = l_min_date_all_vehicles
                  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                    INSERT (vorgaenger_vorschriftID,      nachfolger_vorschriftid,    beziehung_art,    HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,
                            datum_neue_typen,   datum_alle_typen) 
                    VALUES (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID, src.nachfolger_vorschriftid, src.beziehung_art, src.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,
                            l_min_date_new_types, l_min_date_all_vehicles );

            end if;

        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        -- ? filtern die with multigroup  not null having ..
        SELECT listagg(distinct decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', case when instr(upper(l_reg_number),'UN-R')=1  then 30 
                                                                          else 20 end,  'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,  
                                'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        where vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and relationtype not in ('CONSOLIDATES',  'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES',  'DEMANDS', 'LINKED_TO' );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden, except equi und demands
        FOR cur_d in ( select x.column_value bez_art  
                        from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':')  ) x )
        LOOP
          list_to_del := '';
             select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
             from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
             where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid    
             and beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art     
             and nachfolger_vorschriftid not in                       --                   
             ( select vorschriftid FROM  MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION where  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key   
               and (relationtype =  decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES', 30, 'CHANGES',
                    60, 'LINKED_TO', 40, 'DEMANDS',  102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES', '')  
                  )
             )
             AND 
             --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
             ( 
                beziehung_art not in ( 102, 10, 20, 30, 60, 200)
             );
             DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
             DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
         list_to_del := '';
         select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
         from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
         where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid   
         and beziehung_art not in ( select x.column_value 
                                    from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x  
         )
         and ( beziehung_art not in ( 102, 10, 20, 30, 60, 200)   );

         DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
         where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
         DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        select listagg(distinct decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES', case when instr(upper(l_reg_number),'UN-R')=1  then 30  else 20 end, 
                     'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102,  'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES', 200, 0),
                    ':')  
        into lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        where   vorschriftid = avorschriftid   
        and relationtype  in ( 'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS', 'CONSOLIDATES', 'LINKED_TO' ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr in (select x.column_value bez_art  
                        from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':')  ) x )
        LOOP
          list_to_del := '';
           select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
          from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
          where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
          and beziehung_art = cur_dr.bez_art    
          and ( beziehung_art not in ( 102, 10, 20, 30, 60)  )
          and vorgaenger_vorschriftid not in                       --                     
          ( select distinct vorschriftid FROM  MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION where  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key  
            and relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                    60, 'LINKED_FROM',  40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY',  102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', '') 
          );

          DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
           where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
          DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
        from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid
         and ( beziehung_art not in ( 102  , 10, 20, 30, 60, 200)    )
        and beziehung_art not in (select y.column_value 
                                    from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y    
        );
        DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
          where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
        DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
          where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

  END pActualise_Demands_Relations_vomGetex;


  procedure pMassenAktualisierung_ListenAttributen_VomGetex(attr_list in varchar2, avorschriftenids in varchar2)
  AS
    l_co number :=0;
   -- l_getex_key varchar2(64);
  BEGIN                                                         --attr_list  
    for cur in ( select column_value from table ( apex_string.split_numbers(attr_list, ':') )xa   )
    LOOP

       for curi in (  select  gv.reg_id , gv.reg_num, gv.rev_inForce_datum 
                            , v.vorschriftid,  nvl(gv.timelinedatetype,'EU') einsatzdatum_Model
                    from mv_getex_vorschrift gv 
                    join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid is not null and v.regindexid = gv.reg_id )
                    join table (apex_string.split_numbers(avorschriftenids,':')) vx on (vx.column_value = v.vorschriftid)
                    where v.master =20
       )
       loop
        -- 12 SUCCESSOR/PRED
            if(cur.column_value = 12) then
                pActualise_Predecessor_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
            end if;
       -- 13 LINKED
            if(cur.column_value = 13) then
                pActualise_Linked_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
            end if;

         -- 14 Changes
            if(cur.column_value = 14) then
               pActualise_Changes_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
            end if; 

           -- 15 DEMANDS
            if(cur.column_value = 15) then
               pActualise_Demands_Relations_vomGetex (curi.vorschriftid);
            end if;

            -- 16 EQUIVAlent
            if(cur.column_value = 16) then
               pActualise_Equivalent_Relations_vomGetex (curi.vorschriftid);
            end if; 


            -- 17 Länder   *****************************************
            if(cur.column_value = 17) then
               pactualiseVorschriftLand(curi.reg_id, curi.vorschriftid);
            end if; 

            -- 18 Themen
            if(cur.column_value = 18) then
               pactualiseVorschriftThema(curi.reg_id, curi.vorschriftid);
            end if; 

             -- 19 fahrzeugklassen
            if(cur.column_value = 19) then
               pactualiseVorschriftFahrzeugklasse(curi.reg_id, curi.vorschriftid);
            end if; 

            -- 20 Consolidates
            if(cur.column_value = 20) then
                  pActualise_Consolidates_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
           end if; 

       end loop;

    END LOOP;                  
  END pMassenAktualisierung_ListenAttributen_VomGetex;

 --
 FUNCTION fIsDiff_to_Getex_EquivalentOrDemand(avorschriftid IN NUMBER, aequiv in number) RETURN NUMBER
  AS
   -- aequiv=1 check diff for  EQUIV ,   = 0  check diff for DEMANDS
        l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;
        l_target_key varchar2(50);

        l_relationtype varchar2(50);
        l_beziehung_artid number := 0;
        l_min_date_all_vehicles date;
        l_min_date_new_types date;
        l_type_all_new varchar2(32);
        lst_rel_type varchar2(250);
        l_count number := 0;
        l_homolog_serie number :=0;
        l_getex_v_key varchar2(50);
        l_target_reg_number varchar2(250);
        l_reg_number varchar2(250);
        l_successorsincluded varchar2(32);
        l_multigroupid varchar2(64);
        loop_cnt number :=0;
  BEGIN
     -- für alle  verknüpfungen in Getex  vergleich existenz in Regindex 
    FOR cur in ( select distinct tv_key.vorschriftid, vr.targetid, vr.relationtype relationtype, vr.reg_number, vr.target_reg_number, 
                    vr.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED, vr.multigroupid,
                       tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
                FROM mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id) -- !AB over getex key
                where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
               -- and vr.relationtype NOT IN ( 'CONSOLIDATES', 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 'CHANGES', 'SUCCESSOR',
               --       'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'DEMANDS') --
                 and   vr.relationtype = (case when aequiv =1 then 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY' else 'IS_DEMANDED_BY'  end)
                order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_target_key := cur.targetid;
        l_relationtype := cur.relationtype;
        l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
        l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
        l_successorsincluded := cur.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED;
        l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;
        -- vergleiche für die Verknüfungen, die keine Datums angaben haben

        if( aequiv =1 --and ( l_relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY' ) 
                and (l_multigroupid is null or (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'))

        ) then
            -- check if the same exists in Regindex
            select count(*) --avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID,   --l_tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid
            into l_count
              from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
              where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
              and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
              and     ( beziehung_art = 102  );
            if (l_count = 0) then
                   return 1;  -- keine verknüpfungen dieser art in regindex vorhanden
            elsif ( ( l_relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY') 
                    and (l_multigroupid is null or (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')) 
                ) then
                select count(*) into l_count 
                from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
                and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                and beziehung_art = 102;
                if (l_count = 0) then
                   return 102;       -- 102 not in Regindex

                elsif (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') then
                    select HOMOLOGATION_SERIE into l_homolog_serie
                    from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                    where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
                    and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    and beziehung_art = 102;
                    if (nvl(l_homolog_serie,0) !=10) then
                        return 121; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex   (not _multi)
                    end if;
                     --!AB added
                else  -- no homologation
                   select HOMOLOGATION_SERIE into l_homolog_serie
                    from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                    where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
                    and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    and beziehung_art = 102;
                    if (nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) !=0 ) then
                        return 122; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex  obwohl keine höhere serie
                    end if;
                end if;
            end if;
        end if;

        -- vergleiche für die Verknüfungen mit Datums angaben **********
        -- vergleich mit  is DEMANDED_BY
        if( nvl(aequiv, 0) = 0 and ( l_relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY') 
              and 
             (l_multigroupid is null or (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')) ) then
          -- gibt es diese Verknüpfung in Regindex ---
            select count(*) into l_count 
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 40;
            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 40;       -- beziehung_artid 40 not in Regindex
            else
                   --if (l_relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY_MULTI') then
                if (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') then
                    select HOMOLOGATION_SERIE into l_homolog_serie
                    from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                    where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
                    and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    and beziehung_art = 40;
                    if ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 10) then
                        return 41; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex  for beziehung_artid 40 (not _multi)
                    end if; -- fütr multi
                else -- no homolog. / l_multigroupid is null  !AB added
                   select HOMOLOGATION_SERIE into l_homolog_serie
                    from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                    where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
                    and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    and beziehung_art = 40;
                    if (nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) !=0) then
                        return 50; -- homolog_serie != 0 obwohl keine multigroup
                    end if;               
                end if;
             -- vergleiche Datum  für  typen
                   -- hole datum von Getex
               if(0 = fgetRelationDates_Getex( avorschriftid , l_target_key, l_relationtype ,
                                               l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types )
                 ) then
                 -- Mindestens ein datum ist nicht null
                 -- vergleich mit datum in regindex. 

                    select count(*)  into l_count
                    from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                    where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  
                    and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid 
                    and beziehung_art = 40
                    and ( ( datum_alle_typen is null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is not null
                           OR datum_alle_typen is not null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is null
                           OR (datum_alle_typen is not null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is not null 
                               and to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy') )
                           )
                        OR
                           ( datum_neue_typen is null and l_min_date_new_types is not null
                            OR datum_neue_typen is not null and l_min_date_new_types is null
                            OR (datum_neue_typen is not null and l_min_date_new_types is not null 
                                and to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy') )
                           )
                    );
                    if(l_count >0 ) then
                        return  42;   -- datums verstimmung
                    end if;

                end if;

             -- l_min_date_all_vehicles date; -- l_min_date_new_types date; -- l_type_all_new varchar2(32);       
            end if;

        end if;

    END LOOP;

    -- 2: Reverse check: für alle Verknüpfungen in Regindex vergleich Existenz in Getex  
    FOR curs in ( select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, vrv.beziehung_art, 
                     datum_alle_typen, datum_neue_typen, homologation_serie
                 FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
                 where vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                 and vrv.beziehung_art = (case when (nvl(aequiv, 0) =1) then 102 else 40 end )
                 order by vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, vrv.beziehung_art
    )
    LOOP 

        l_tar_vorschriftid := curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

        l_beziehung_artid := curs.beziehung_art;
        l_homolog_serie := curs.homologation_serie;    
        l_min_date_all_vehicles := curs.datum_alle_typen;
        l_min_date_new_types := curs.datum_neue_typen;

        select regindexid  into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

        if( l_beziehung_artid in ( 40, 102) )  then
                -- check if the same exists in GETEX
                select count(*) into l_count
                FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
                where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                and targetid = l_target_key
                and ( l_beziehung_artid =  decode(vr.relationtype , 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 0)
                        and  (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')
                 );

            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 2001;  -- entsprechende Verknüpfung in GETEX nicht vorhanden
            end if;

                -- Wenn Verknüpfung vorhanden , dann
                 -- ein Vergleich der Unterschiede in Werten ist nicht notwendig, 
                -- weil es in vorherigen LOOP durchgeführt wurde.
        end if;

    END LOOP;

  --***************** Erweiterung   ********************** --
   -- 3: wenn Vorschrift in einigen relations IN Getex als  Nachfolger 
    FOR cur_r in (  select distinct vr.v_id, tv_key.vorschriftid, vr.targetid as targetid, vr.relationtype relationtype, vr.reg_number, vr.target_reg_number,
                       vr.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED, vr.multigroupid ,
                       tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
                    FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                    join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                     join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id) -- !AB over getex key
                    where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  
                    and vr.relationtype = ( case when (nvl(aequiv, 0) =1) then  'EQUIVALENT_TO' else  'DEMANDS' end )  
                    order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        )
    LOOP
        l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
        l_target_key := cur_r.targetid;
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_relationtype := cur_r.relationtype;
        l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
        l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
        l_successorsincluded := cur_r.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED;
        l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;
        -- v_id                     vorschriftid    targetid           Tar_vorschriftid
        if(  l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO' 
                and (l_multigroupid is null or nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')  -- !AB cor
        ) then
                select count(*)      into l_count
                from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
                and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                and  beziehung_art = 102 ;

            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 1000;  
            end if;  
        end if;
        if ( l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO' 
               and (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') ) then  
            select count(*) --avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID,   --l_tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid
                into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 102 and  nvl(homologation_serie,0) = 10;
            if (l_count = 0) then
                   return 1102;   -- nicht vorhanden oder Homologation  falsch
            end if;  
        elsif ( l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'    -- !AB added
               and ( l_multigroupid is null )) then  -- !AB cor  homologation =0
            select count(*) --avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID,   --l_tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid
            into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 102 and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;
              if (l_count = 0) then
                   return 1110;   -- nicht vorhanden oder Homologation = true
              end if;           
        end if;
        -- vergleiche für die Verknüfungen mit Datums angaben **********
        -- vergleich mit   DEMANDS
        if( ( l_relationtype = 'DEMANDS') 
             and (l_multigroupid is null or nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')  --!AB evtl trennen l_multigroupid =null / l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'
             ) then
          -- gibt es diese Verknüpfung in Regindex? ---
            select count(*) into l_count 
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 40;
            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 43;       -- beziehung_artid 40 not in Regindex
            else                --if (l_relationtype = 'DEMANDS_MULTI') then
                if (  nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) then
                    select HOMOLOGATION_SERIE into l_homolog_serie
                    from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                    where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
                    and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    and beziehung_art = 40;
                    if (nvl(l_homolog_serie,0) != 10) then
                        return 44; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex  for beziehung_artid 40 (not _multi)
                    end if; -- für multi
               -- !AB added
                elsif ( l_multigroupid is null ) then 
                    select HOMOLOGATION_SERIE into l_homolog_serie
                    from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                    where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
                    and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    and beziehung_art = 40;
                    if (nvl(l_homolog_serie,0) != 0 ) then
                        return 51; -- homolog_serie !=0 in regindex  for beziehung_artid 40 which is not multi in Getex 
                    end if; -- für not multi
                end if;
            end if;
            -- check datumsangaben!!
            if(0 = pck_ri_getex.fgetRelationDates_Getex( avorschriftid , l_target_key, l_relationtype ,
                                           l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types )
            ) then
             -- Mindestens ein datum ist nicht null   -- vergleich mit datum in regindex. 
                select count(*)  into l_count
                from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
                where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  
                and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid 
                and beziehung_art = 40
                and ( ( datum_alle_typen is null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is not null
                       OR datum_alle_typen is not null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is null
                       OR (datum_alle_typen is not null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is not null 
                           and to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy') )
                       )
                    OR
                       ( datum_neue_typen is null and l_min_date_new_types is not null
                        OR datum_neue_typen is not null and l_min_date_new_types is null
                        OR (datum_neue_typen is not null and l_min_date_new_types is not null 
                            and to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy') )
                       )
                );
                if(l_count >0 ) then
                    return  45;   -- datums verstimmung bei check in erweiterung
                end if;

            end if;

        end if;

      END LOOP;
    loop_cnt :=0;

    -- 4:  Reverse check: für alle Verknüpfungen mit relationtyp --S  in Regindex,  vergleich Existenz in Getex  
  FOR curs in ( with cte as ( select tv_key.vorschriftid, tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid 
                      from MV_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
                      join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                      join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id) -- !AB over getex key
                      where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid -- 
                      and (  vr.relationtype = ( case when (nvl(aequiv, 0) =1) then 'EQUIVALENT_TO' else 'DEMANDS' end) 
                                and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')
                          )
                  )        
                  select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, vrv.beziehung_art, 
                         datum_alle_typen, datum_neue_typen, homologation_serie
                  FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
                  join cte on (vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid and cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid)
                  where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  and vrv.beziehung_art = (case when (nvl(aequiv, 0) =1) then 102 else  40 end)
                  order by vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, vrv.beziehung_art
    )
    LOOP 

        l_tar_vorschriftid := curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        l_beziehung_artid := curs.beziehung_art;
        l_homolog_serie := curs.homologation_serie;    
        l_min_date_all_vehicles := curs.datum_alle_typen;
        l_min_date_new_types := curs.datum_neue_typen;
        loop_cnt :=loop_cnt +1;
        select regindexid  into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT where VORSCHRIFTID =  curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;  

          -- check if the same exists in Regindex
            select count(*) into l_count
            FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
            join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id) 
            where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            and targetid = l_target_key
            and (   l_beziehung_artid =  decode(vr.relationtype , 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'DEMANDS', 40, 0)
                     and (  vr.multigroupid is null and nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0)  = 0 
                           or (nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') and nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0)  = 10 
                        )-- wenn in Regindex mit homol =0 
            ) ;   

            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 3005 ;  -- entsprechende Verknüpfung in GETEX nicht vorhanden
            end if;
           -- Wenn Verknüpfung vorhanden , dann
                 -- ein Vergleich der Unterschiede in Werten ist nicht notwendig, 
                -- weil es in vorherigen LOOP durchgeführt wurde.
    END LOOP;  

    return 0;
  END fIsDiff_to_Getex_EquivalentOrDemand;

/**
 * Funktion liefert eine Tabelle mit  Zeizpunkten und jeweiligen Bitmasken für bestimmten Getex-Attribut der Vorschrift
   Aufruf parameter: 
      avorschriftid  -- vorschrift id
      attribut_bit  - bit in der Bitmaske, der dem Attribut entspricht 
    Return  rows:
     Row:       h_Vorschriftid,   Zeitpunkt der Änderung,  neues Wert von attribut Bit oder  Bitmaske
   Geliefert werden nur die Daten mit Zeitpunkten, in denen der Bit von gegebenem Attribut sich geändert hat.
   Falls der Parameter attribut_bit nicht gesetzt ist, werden die Zeitpunkte für die Änderung der Bitmaske geliefert.

 */
 function fVorschriftBitmaskHistory(avorschriftid number, attribut_bit number default null) return t_type_bitmask_h_table 
 is 
     bm_t t_type_bitmask_h_table;
     prev_bitmask  number :=0;
     cur_bitmask number :=1;
     prev_attr_bit  number :=0;
     cur_attr_bit number :=1;

     list_h_vorchriftid varchar2(2000) :='';
     list_aenderung_Datum varchar2(2000) :='';
     list_bitmask varchar2(2000) := '';
 begin
    bm_t := t_type_bitmask_h_table(); 
     for curs in (select h_Vorschriftid, VorschriftID, Vorschrift_nummer, Letzte_aenderung_Datum, GETEX_VERGLEICH_BITMASKE --, lead_VKO_Benutzer
                     from T_H_Vorschrift 
                     where GETEX_VERGLEICH_BITMASKE is not null and Vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                     order by h_Vorschriftid, Letzte_aenderung_Datum desc
                     ) 
    LOOP
        cur_bitmask := curs.GETEX_VERGLEICH_BITMASKE;
        if (prev_bitmask != cur_bitmask) then
            if (attribut_bit is not null) then
                prev_attr_bit := emano_util.fBitmaskGet(prev_bitmask,  attribut_bit);
            end if;
            prev_bitmask := cur_bitmask ; 
            if (attribut_bit is not null) then
                cur_attr_bit :=  emano_util.fBitmaskGet(cur_bitmask,  attribut_bit);
                  --- attr bit changed ?
                if(cur_attr_bit != prev_attr_bit) then
                    bm_t.extend; 
                    bm_t(bm_t.count) := 
                    t_type_bitmask_h_object(curs.h_Vorschriftid, curs.Letzte_aenderung_Datum, cur_attr_bit );
                else
                    continue;
                end if;
            else
               bm_t.extend; 
               bm_t(bm_t.count) := 
               t_type_bitmask_h_object(curs.h_Vorschriftid, curs.Letzte_aenderung_Datum, cur_bitmask );
            end if; 
        else
           continue;
        end if;

    END LOOP;
    return bm_t;
  END;

  procedure pSynchronizeTopicNames as
    l_co number :=0;
  begin
     for cur_t in (  select distinct ge.Thema_id, regindex_themaid, thema_name, thema_name_en
                     from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA ge
                     JOIN T_THEMA th on (th.getex_thema_key = ge.thema_id)
      ) LOOP
          -- update namen
          update T_THEMA  set bezeichnung = cur_t.thema_name,
                                  name_eng = cur_t.thema_name_en
              --  select  count(*) into l_co from T_THEMA 
          where (getex_thema_key is not null and getex_thema_key  = cur_t.thema_id)
          and ( (cur_t.thema_name is not null and bezeichnung != cur_t.thema_name )
                OR ( cur_t.thema_name_en is not null and name_eng != cur_t.thema_name_en ) 
              );

      END LOOP;

    -- neue Themen aus GETEX in Regindex übernehmen
    FOR cur_m in (select distinct Thema_id themaid,   thema_name, thema_name_en,  regindex_themaid --, 1,     sysdate 
                     from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA  )
    LOOP
       select count(*) into l_co
       from  t_thema
       where getex_thema_key = cur_m.themaid; 
       if ( l_co = 0 ) then  --and cur_m.regindex_themaid is not null
         -- debug('thema_name: '|| cur_m.thema_name ||' id: ' || cur_m.regindex_themaid , cur_m.themaid);
          insert into T_THEMA ( getex_thema_key ,    bezeichnung, name_eng,  status_pflege , Gueltigkeit_StartDatum)
                        values( cur_m.themaid,   cur_m.thema_name, cur_m.thema_name_en, 1, sysdate);
        end if;
    end LOOP;
  end pSynchronizeTopicNames;


  PROCEDURE PHISTORIZE_GETEX_DATA IS
    BEGIN
        -- Insert data from main table to history table
        INSERT INTO T_H_X_GETEX_IMPORT (
            GETEX_SCHLUESSEL,
            ZEITPUNKT_UPLOAD,
            DATEN
        )
        SELECT 
            GETEX_SCHLUESSEL,
            ZEITPUNKT_UPLOAD,
            DATEN
        FROM T_X_GETEX_IMPORT;


        -- Delete records older than 30 days
        DELETE FROM T_H_X_GETEX_IMPORT 
        WHERE ZEITPUNKT_HISTORISIERUNG < SYSDATE - 32;

    EXCEPTION
        WHEN OTHERS THEN
            -- Log error and rollback
            ROLLBACK;
            RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20001, 'Error in P_HISTORIZE_GETEX_DATA: ' || SQLERRM);
    END;


    procedure pAbschlussBeladung is
    begin

        -- MViews aktualisieren
        pck_ri_getex.pRefreshMViews;

        -- GETEX-URLs aktualisieren
        merge into t_vorschrift v
        using (
            select reg_id, reg_displayurl
            from mv_getex_vorschrift m
        ) u
        on (v.regindexid = u.reg_id)
        when matched then update set URL_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT = u.reg_displayurl;

        pSynchronizeTopicNames;

        -- Compare für alle Vorschriften
        for x in (select vorschriftid from t_vorschrift) loop
            pck_ri_getex.pCompareVorschrift(x.vorschriftid);
        end loop;
        -- master= "GETEX + Automatische Übernahme"
        FOR cur in ( 
            select v.Vorschriftid, v.master --count( T_X_GETEX_IMPORT.CHANGETIMESTAMP)
            from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT gv 
            join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid = gv.reg_id  and nvl(v.master, 0) = 30)
            where nvl(v.getex_vergleich_bitmaske, 0) >0
        )
        LOOP
           pAbgleichRegIndexVorschriftVomGetex(cur.Vorschriftid);
        end LOOP;

        pck_ri_getex.pLoad_Vorschrift_Thema_Einsatzdatum_typ_fromGetex;

        commit;

    end pAbschlussBeladung;    


  PROCEDURE pActualise_Consolidates_Relations_vomGetex(avorschriftid IN NUMBER)
   AS
        l_vorschrift_getex_key varchar2(64);
        lst_rel_type varchar2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev varchar2(250);
        l_reg_number varchar2(250);

        list_to_del varchar2(1000);
    BEGIN
        select regindexid into l_vorschrift_getex_key from t_vorschrift where vorschriftid = avorschriftid;

        FOR cur in ( select distinct vr.vorschriftid, vr.targetid as targetid, vr.relationtype relationtype, vr.reg_number, vr.target_reg_number,
                   vr.successorsincluded, vr.multigroupid,
                        tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
                     FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                     join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                     where vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  -- 23342
                      and vr.relationtype  IN ( 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN') --
                     order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        )
        LOOP
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;

            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
             USING ( select avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID, 
             decode(cur.relationtype , 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200,   0)  as beziehung_art ,
             cur.tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid
                     from dual ) src
                on (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftID 
                    and src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                    and src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art)
              WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
               INSERT (vorgaenger_vorschriftID,      nachfolger_vorschriftid,    beziehung_art    ) 
               values (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID, src.nachfolger_vorschriftid, src.beziehung_art);

        end LOOP;
        -- vorschrift       consolidates
        FOR cur_r in ( select distinct vr.v_id, vr.vorschriftid, vr.targetid as targetid, vr.relationtype relationtype, 
                        vr.reg_number, vr.target_reg_number, vr.successorsincluded, multigroupid, 
                        tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
                       FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
                       Join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
                       WHERE vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid   
                       and vr.relationtype  in ( 'CONSOLIDATES' )
                       order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        )
        LOOP
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;

            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
             USING ( select avorschriftid as nachfolger_vorschriftID, 
                    200  as beziehung_art ,
                   cur_r.tar_vorschriftid  as vorgaenger_vorschriftid  from dual ) src
                on (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftID 
                    and src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                    and src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art)
              WHEN MATCHED THEN
                UPDATE SET HOMOLOGATION_SERIE = 0 
                --where   nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 10)
              WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
               INSERT (vorgaenger_vorschriftID,      nachfolger_vorschriftid,    beziehung_art    ) 
               values (src.vorgaenger_vorschriftID, src.nachfolger_vorschriftid, src.beziehung_art);

        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        SELECT listagg(distinct decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', case when instr(upper(l_reg_number),'UN-R')=1  then 30  else 20 end,
                                                 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,  
                                'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        where vorschriftid = avorschriftid   --23342 -
        and relationtype not in ('CONSOLIDATES',  'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES',  'DEMANDS', 'LINKED_TO' );


        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden, except equi und demands
        FOR cur_d in ( select x.column_value bez_art  
                        from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':')  ) x )
        LOOP
          list_to_del := '';
              select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
              from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
             where vorgaenger_vorschriftID =  avorschriftid    --23342 -- --'65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'
             and beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art     
             and nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
             ( select vorschriftid FROM  MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION where  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key   
               and (relationtype =  decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES', 30, 'CHANGES',
                    60, 'LINKED_TO', 40, 'DEMANDS',  102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES', '')  
                  )
             )
             AND 
             (  beziehung_art not in (40, 102, 20, 30, 10, 60) );

             DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
             DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
         list_to_del := '';
         select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
         from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
         where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  --436 
         and beziehung_art not in (
            select x.column_value  
            from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type , ':')  ) x  
         )
         and (     beziehung_art not in (40, 102  , 10, 60, 20, 30)   );

         DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
         where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
         DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        Select listagg(distinct decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES', case when instr(upper(l_reg_number),'UN-R')=1  then 30  else 20 end, 
                     'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102,  'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES', 200, 0),
                    ':')  
        into lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        where   vorschriftid = avorschriftid   -- v_id= '65f3e55329fdcf5349b2d2b5'
        and relationtype  in ( 'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CONSOLIDATES', -- 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                      'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS', 'LINKED_TO' ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr in (select x.column_value bez_art  
                        from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':')  ) x )
        LOOP
          list_to_del := '';
           select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')  into list_to_del 
          from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
          where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  --1603 --
          and beziehung_art =  cur_dr.bez_art     -- in (10)   -- but

          and (  beziehung_art not in (40, 102 , 20, 30 , 10, 60) )
          and vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                     
          ( select distinct vorschriftid FROM  MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION where  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key --  
              and relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                    60, 'LINKED_FROM',  40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY',  102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', '') 
          );

          DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
           where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
          DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
             where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        select listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':') into list_to_del 
        from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid
        and ( beziehung_art not in (40, 102 , 20, 30 , 10, 60)
        )
        and beziehung_art not in (select y.column_value 
                                    from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y    
        );
        DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema 
          where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );
        DELETE from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
          where vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid  in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':')) );

  END pActualise_Consolidates_Relations_vomGetex;

 /**
 *  erzeugt einen asynchronen job, welcher die Getex MViews aktualisiert. Führt es aus.
 * Job wird automatisch gelöscht
 *  benutzt in Proc fNeueVorschrift
 */
 procedure pCreateJob_AbschlussBeladung is
        lJobName varchar2(255);
    begin 
        lJobName := dbms_scheduler.generate_job_name('refresh_GTX_MViews');

            dbms_scheduler.create_job(
                job_name            => lJobName,
                job_type            => 'PLSQL_BLOCK',
                job_action          => '
                    BEGIN
                        debug(''async_job: execute pAbschlussBeladung .. '');
                       pck_ri_getex.pAbschlussBeladung;
                       debug(''Getex pAbschlussBeladung ausgeführt '');
                    EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
                      NULL;
                    END;
                ',
                enabled             => true
            );    
         -- 
  end pCreateJob_AbschlussBeladung;



 FUNCTION fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Successor_relations(avorschriftid IN NUMBER) RETURN NUMBER
AS
    l_target_key varchar2(64);
    l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;
    l_relationtype varchar2(50);
    l_count number := 0;
    l_getex_v_key varchar2(50);
    loop_cnt number := 0;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check: Check Getex to RegIndex
    FOR cur in (
        select distinct tv_key.vorschriftid, vr.targetid, 
               vr.relationtype relationtype,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'PREDECESSOR'
        order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_target_key := cur.targetid;
        -- Check if exists in RegIndex
        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and beziehung_art = 10;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex  
    FOR curs in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 10
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'PREDECESSOR';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2001;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
    FOR cursb in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 10
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2002;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
    FOR cur_r in (
        select distinct vr.v_id, tv_key.vorschriftid, 
               vr.targetid, vr.relationtype,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR'
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and beziehung_art = 10;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1000;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
    loop_cnt := 0;
    FOR curs in (
        with cte as (
            select tv_key.vorschriftid, tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid 
            from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
            join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
            join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
            where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            and vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR'
        )
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.beziehung_art
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        join cte on (vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid 
                    and cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid)
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 10
    )
    LOOP 
        loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 3005;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    return 0;
END;


    FUNCTION fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Amendment_relations(avorschriftid IN NUMBER) RETURN NUMBER
AS
    l_target_key varchar2(64);
    l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;
    l_relationtype varchar2(50);
    l_count number := 0;
    l_getex_v_key varchar2(50);
    l_target_reg_number varchar2(250);
    loop_cnt number := 0;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
    FOR cur in (
        select distinct tv_key.vorschriftid, vr.targetid, 
               vr.relationtype relationtype,
               vr.target_reg_number,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'IS_CHANGED_BY'
        order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_target_key := cur.targetid;
        l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;

        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and ((instr(upper(l_target_reg_number),'UN-R')=1 and beziehung_art = 30) 
             or beziehung_art = 20);

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
    FOR curs in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
               vrv.beziehung_art
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art in (20, 30)
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'IS_CHANGED_BY'
        and ((instr(upper(vr.target_reg_number),'UN-R')=1 and curs.beziehung_art = 30)
             or curs.beziehung_art = 20);

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2001;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
    FOR cursb in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
               vrv.beziehung_art
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art in (20, 30)
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
        and ((instr(upper(vr.target_reg_number),'UN-R')=1 and cursb.beziehung_art = 30)
             or cursb.beziehung_art = 20);

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2002;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
    FOR cur_r in (
        select distinct vr.v_id, tv_key.vorschriftid, 
               vr.targetid, vr.relationtype,
               vr.target_reg_number,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;

        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and ((instr(upper(l_target_reg_number),'UN-R')=1 and beziehung_art = 30)
             or beziehung_art = 20);

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1000;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
    loop_cnt := 0;
    FOR curs in (
        with cte as (
            select tv_key.vorschriftid, tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid 
            from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
            join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
            join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
            where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            and vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
        )
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.beziehung_art
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        join cte on (vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid 
                    and cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid)
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art in (20, 30)
    )
    LOOP 
        loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
        and ((instr(upper(vr.target_reg_number),'UN-R')=1 and curs.beziehung_art = 30)
             or curs.beziehung_art = 20);

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 3005;
        end if;
