    END LOOP;

    return 0;
END;


    FUNCTION fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Demands_relations(avorschriftid IN NUMBER) RETURN NUMBER
AS
    l_target_key varchar2(64);
    l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;
    l_relationtype varchar2(50);
    l_count number := 0;
    l_getex_v_key varchar2(50);
    l_successorsincluded varchar2(32);
    l_multigroupid varchar2(64);
    l_homolog_serie number;
    l_min_date_all_vehicles date;
    l_min_date_new_types date;
    loop_cnt number := 0;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
    FOR cur in (
        select distinct tv_key.vorschriftid, vr.targetid, 
               vr.relationtype relationtype,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid,
               vr.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED,
               vr.multigroupid
        FROM mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')
        order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_target_key := cur.targetid;
        l_successorsincluded := cur.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED;
        l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;

        -- Basic existence check
        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and beziehung_art = 40;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1;
        end if;

        -- Check homologation_serie
        if (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') then
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 40
            and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;

            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 41;  -- homologation_serie mismatch
            end if;
        elsif (l_multigroupid is null) then
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 40
            and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;

            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 42;  -- should have no homologation_serie
            end if;
        end if;

        -- Check dates
        if(0 = fgetRelationDates_Getex(avorschriftid, l_target_key, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY',
                                     l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types)) then
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  
            and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid 
            and beziehung_art = 40
            and ((datum_alle_typen is null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is not null)
                 OR (datum_alle_typen is not null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is null)
                 OR (datum_alle_typen is not null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is not null 
                     and to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy'))
                 OR (datum_neue_typen is null and l_min_date_new_types is not null)
                 OR (datum_neue_typen is not null and l_min_date_new_types is null)
                 OR (datum_neue_typen is not null and l_min_date_new_types is not null 
                     and to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy')));

            if(l_count > 0) then
                return 43;  -- Date mismatch
            end if;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
    FOR curs in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
               vrv.homologation_serie,
               vrv.datum_alle_typen,
               vrv.datum_neue_typen
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 40
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true');

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2001;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
    FOR cursb in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
               vrv.homologation_serie,
               vrv.datum_alle_typen,
               vrv.datum_neue_typen
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 40
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'DEMANDS'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true');

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2002;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
    FOR cur_r in (
        select distinct vr.v_id, tv_key.vorschriftid, 
               vr.targetid, vr.relationtype,
               vr.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED,
               vr.multigroupid,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'DEMANDS'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_successorsincluded := cur_r.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED;
        l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;

        -- Check existence and homologation_serie
        if (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') then
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 40
            and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;
        else
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 40
            and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;
        end if;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1000;
        end if;

        -- Check dates if they exist
        if(0 = fgetRelationDates_Getex(l_tar_vorschriftid, l_getex_v_key, 'DEMANDS',
                                     l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types)) then
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid  
            and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid 
            and beziehung_art = 40
            and ((datum_alle_typen is null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is not null)
                 OR (datum_alle_typen is not null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is null)
                 OR (datum_alle_typen is not null and l_min_date_all_vehicles is not null 
                     and to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy'))
                 OR (datum_neue_typen is null and l_min_date_new_types is not null)
                 OR (datum_neue_typen is not null and l_min_date_new_types is null)
                 OR (datum_neue_typen is not null and l_min_date_new_types is not null 
                     and to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy')));

            if(l_count > 0) then
                return 1001;
            end if;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
    loop_cnt := 0;
    FOR curs in (
        with cte as (
            select tv_key.vorschriftid, tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid 
            from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
            join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
            join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
            where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            and vr.relationtype = 'DEMANDS'
            and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')
        )
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.beziehung_art,
               vrv.homologation_serie,
               vrv.datum_alle_typen,
               vrv.datum_neue_typen
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        join cte on (vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid 
                    and cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid)
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 40
    )
    LOOP 
        loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'DEMANDS'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true');

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 3005;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    return 0;
END;






    FUNCTION fCheckDifference_to_Getex_LinkedTo_relations(avorschriftid IN NUMBER) RETURN NUMBER
AS
    l_target_key varchar2(64);
    l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;
    l_relationtype varchar2(50);
    l_count number := 0;
    l_getex_v_key varchar2(50);
    loop_cnt number := 0;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
    FOR cur in (
        select distinct tv_key.vorschriftid, vr.targetid, 
               vr.relationtype relationtype,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_FROM'
        order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_target_key := cur.targetid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and beziehung_art = 60;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
    FOR curs in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 60
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_FROM';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2001;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
    FOR cursb in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 60
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2002;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
    FOR cur_r in (
        select distinct vr.v_id, tv_key.vorschriftid, 
               vr.targetid, vr.relationtype,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO'
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and beziehung_art = 60;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1000;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
    loop_cnt := 0;
    FOR curs in (
        with cte as (
            select tv_key.vorschriftid, tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid 
            from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
            join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
            join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
            where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            and vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO'
        )
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.beziehung_art
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        join cte on (vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid 
                    and cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid)
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 60
    )
    LOOP 
        loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 3005;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    return 0;
END;



    FUNCTION fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Equivalent_relations(avorschriftid IN NUMBER) RETURN NUMBER
AS
    l_target_key varchar2(64);
    l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;
    l_relationtype varchar2(50);
    l_count number := 0;
    l_getex_v_key varchar2(50);
    l_successorsincluded varchar2(32);
    l_multigroupid varchar2(64);
    l_homolog_serie number;
    loop_cnt number := 0;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
    FOR cur in (
        select distinct tv_key.vorschriftid, vr.targetid, 
               vr.relationtype relationtype,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid,
               vr.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED,
               vr.multigroupid
        FROM mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')
        order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_target_key := cur.targetid;
        l_successorsincluded := cur.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED;
        l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;

        -- Basic existence check
        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and beziehung_art = 102;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1;
        end if;

        -- Check homologation_serie
        if (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') then
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 102
            and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;

            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 41;  -- homologation_serie mismatch
            end if;
        elsif (l_multigroupid is null) then
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 102
            and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;

            if (l_count = 0) then
                return 42;  -- should have no homologation_serie
            end if;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
    FOR curs in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
               vrv.homologation_serie
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 102
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true');

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2001;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
    FOR cursb in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
               vrv.homologation_serie
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 102
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true');

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2002;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
    FOR cur_r in (
        select distinct vr.v_id, tv_key.vorschriftid, 
               vr.targetid, vr.relationtype,
               vr.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED,
               vr.multigroupid,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_successorsincluded := cur_r.SUCCESSORSINCLUDED;
        l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;

        -- Check existence and homologation_serie
        if (nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') then
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 102
            and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;
        else
            select count(*) into l_count
            from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
            where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
            and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
            and beziehung_art = 102
            and nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;
        end if;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1000;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
    loop_cnt := 0;
    FOR curs in (
        with cte as (
            select tv_key.vorschriftid, tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid 
            from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
            join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
            join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
            where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            and vr.relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
            and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true')
        )
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.beziehung_art,
               vrv.homologation_serie
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        join cte on (vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid 
                    and cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid)
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 102
    )
    LOOP 
        loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
        and (vr.multigroupid is null or nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true');

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 3005;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    return 0;
END;




    FUNCTION fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Consolidates_relations(avorschriftid IN NUMBER) RETURN NUMBER
AS
    l_target_key varchar2(64);
    l_tar_vorschriftid number := 0;
    l_relationtype varchar2(50);
    l_count number := 0;
    l_getex_v_key varchar2(50);
    loop_cnt number := 0;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
    FOR cur in (
        select distinct tv_key.vorschriftid, vr.targetid, 
               vr.relationtype relationtype,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN'
        order by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
        l_target_key := cur.targetid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where vorgaenger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and beziehung_art = 200;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
    FOR curs in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 200
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2001;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
    FOR cursb in (
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 200
    )
    LOOP 
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'CONSOLIDATES';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 2002;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
    FOR cur_r in (
        select distinct vr.v_id, tv_key.vorschriftid, 
               vr.targetid, vr.relationtype,
               tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vr.relationtype = 'CONSOLIDATES'
    )
    LOOP
        l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT 
        where nachfolger_vorschriftID = avorschriftid 
        and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
        and beziehung_art = 200;

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 1000;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
    loop_cnt := 0;
    FOR curs in (
        with cte as (
            select tv_key.vorschriftid, tv.vorschriftid as tar_vorschriftid 
            from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
            join t_vorschrift tv on (tv.regindexid = vr.targetid)
            join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
            where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            and vr.relationtype = 'CONSOLIDATES'
        )
        select distinct vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid, 
               vrv.beziehung_art
        FROM T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT vrv
        join cte on (vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid 
                    and cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid)
        where vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and vrv.beziehung_art = 200
    )
    LOOP 
        loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
        select regindexid into l_target_key 
        from T_VORSCHRIFT 
        where VORSCHRIFTID = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

        select count(*) into l_count
        FROM MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_RELATION vr
        join t_vorschrift tv_key on (tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id)
        where tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        and targetid = l_target_key
        and vr.relationtype = 'CONSOLIDATES';

        if (l_count = 0) then
            return 3005;
        end if;
    END LOOP;

    return 0;
END;
















procedure pMassenAktualisierung_NewBits_VomGetex(attr_list in varchar2, avorschriftenids in varchar2)
AS
    l_co number := 0;
BEGIN
    for cur in (select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(attr_list, ':')) xa)
    LOOP
        for curi in (
            select gv.reg_id, v.vorschriftid
            from mv_getex_vorschrift gv 
            join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid is not null and v.regindexid = gv.reg_id)
            join table(apex_string.split_numbers(avorschriftenids,':')) vx on (vx.column_value = v.vorschriftid)
            where v.master = 20
        )
        loop


            -- Bit 15: Successor/Predecessor
            if(cur.column_value = 15) then
                if fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Successor_relations(curi.vorschriftid) != 0 then
                    pActualise_Predecessor_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
                end if;
            end if;

            -- Bit 16: Amendment/Supplements
            if(cur.column_value = 16) then
                if fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Amendment_relations(curi.vorschriftid) != 0 then
                    pActualise_Changes_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
                end if;
            end if;

            -- Bit 17: Demands
            if(cur.column_value = 17) then
                if fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Demands_relations(curi.vorschriftid) != 0 then
                    pActualise_Demands_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
                end if;
            end if;

            -- Bit 18: Linked To
            if(cur.column_value = 18) then
                if fCheckDifference_to_Getex_LinkedTo_relations(curi.vorschriftid) != 0 then
                    pActualise_LINKED_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
                end if;
            end if;

            -- Bit 19: Equivalent
            if(cur.column_value = 19) then
                if fIsDiff_to_Getex_EquivalentOrDemand(curi.vorschriftid, 1) != 0 then
                    pActualise_Equivalent_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
                end if;
            end if;

            -- Bit 20: Consolidates
            if(cur.column_value = 20) then
                if fCheckDifference_to_Getex_Consolidates_relations(curi.vorschriftid) != 0 then
                    pActualise_Consolidates_Relations_vomGetex(curi.vorschriftid);
                end if;
            end if;







        end loop;
    END LOOP;
END pMassenAktualisierung_NewBits_VomGetex;






















END PCK_RI_GETEX;
/

/*

create or replace PACKAGE BODY "PCK_RI_GETEX_APPLY" AS
-- Core data update procedures
	PROCEDURE pUpdateKernDaten (
        aregindexid     VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftid   NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_vorschriftnummer          VARCHAR2(500);
        l_documentdate              DATE;
        l_documenttype              NUMBER;
        l_titlelong                 VARCHAR2(2000);
        l_titleshort                VARCHAR2(500);
        l_status                    NUMBER;
        l_regindexvorschrifttypid   NUMBER;
        l_duppl_vorhanden           NUMBER := 0;
        vorschrift_nummmer_exist EXCEPTION;
        l_publ_name                 VARCHAR2(200);
        l_publ_id number;
    BEGIN

        insert into t_publisher (name)
        select distinct publ_name
        from mv_getex_vorschrift
        where publ_name is not null
        and publ_name not in (select name from t_publisher);   


        SELECT
            reg_num,
            rev_doc_datum,
            gdt.document_typeid,
            rev_title,
            rev_shorttitle,
            vst.vorschrift_statusid, --reg_status, 

            publ_name,
            p.publisherid
        INTO
            l_vorschriftnummer,
            l_documentdate,
            l_documenttype,
            l_titlelong,
            l_titleshort,
            l_status, --l_EinsatzdatumModell,
            l_publ_name,
            l_publ_id
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift                 gv
            JOIN mv_getex_vorschrift_document_type   gdt ON ( gdt.reg_id = gv.reg_id )
            JOIN t_vorschrift_status                 vst ON ( vst.mapping_getex = gv.rev_v_status )
            left outer join t_publisher p on (p.name = gv.publ_name)
        WHERE
            gv.reg_id = aregindexid --'650c239d80925e68c5cad0df'
            AND rev_current = 'true';
    -- ermittlung einsatzmodelid  benutzend T_Publisher (T. 1392)
    --l_EinsatzdatumModell :=  PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fEinsatzDatumModellID(avorschriftid);
    -- check if rahmenrichtlin
        l_regindexvorschrifttypid := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fCalcVorTypID(aregindexid); 

        pUpdateVorEinsatzModel(aregindexid, avorschriftid);
    --desc t_vorschrift
        UPDATE t_vorschrift
        SET
            vorschrift_nummer = l_vorschriftnummer,
            dokumentendatum = trunc(l_documentdate),
            document_typeid = l_documenttype,
            vorschrift_bezeichnung = l_titlelong,
            titel_kurz = l_titleshort,
            vorschrift_statusid = l_status,
            publisher = l_publ_name,
            publisherid = l_publ_id,
            vorschrift_typid = l_regindexvorschrifttypid --, EINSATZDATUM_MODELLID =l_EinsatzdatumModell, 
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
    EXCEPTION
        WHEN OTHERS THEN
            debug('Exception pUpdateKernDaten', 'Vorschrift: '
                                                             || avorschriftid
                                                             || ', GETEXID: '
                                                             || aregindexid);
            RAISE;
    END pUpdateKernDaten;


	PROCEDURE pUpdateVorThema (
        aregindexid     VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftid   NUMBER
    ) AS
  --  l_th_ids varchar2(2000);
    BEGIN
   /* select listagg(t.themaid, ':') within group (order by t.themaid) into l_th_ids 
      from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_THEMA gvt 
      join T_thema t on t.nummer = trim(substr(gvt.thema_name, 1, instr(gvt.thema_name, ' ')) )
     where V_id = aregindexid; -- '652f96a34880f53d523f5dee'
     */
        -- change state of existing       
        UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_thema
        SET geloescht = 0
        WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND geloescht = 1
          AND themaid IN (
                SELECT regindex_themaid
                FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_thema
                WHERE v_id = aregindexid
                  AND regindex_themaid IS NOT NULL
            );
           -- and ( themaid in ( select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_th_ids, ':'))) );
          -- 
        UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_thema
        SET geloescht = 1
        WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND geloescht = 0
          AND themaid NOT IN (
                SELECT regindex_themaid
                FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_thema
                WHERE v_id = aregindexid
                  AND regindex_themaid IS NOT NULL
            );
    -- add not existing
        MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_thema dest
        USING (  SELECT  avorschriftid      AS vorschriftid,
                      regindex_themaid   AS themaid
                  FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_thema
                  WHERE v_id = aregindexid
                    AND regindex_themaid IS NOT NULL
              )
        src ON ( src.vorschriftid = dest.vorschriftid
                 AND src.themaid = dest.themaid )
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (  vorschriftid,      themaid,   geloescht ) --, bemerkung)
        VALUES ( src.vorschriftid, src.themaid,  0 );
    END pUpdateVorThema;

  /*
  *
  */
    PROCEDURE pUpdateVorAntriebsart (
        aregindexid     VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftid   NUMBER
    ) AS
    --l_aa_ids varchar2(100);
    BEGIN

  /*select listagg(aa.antriebsartid, ':') within group (order by aa.antriebsartid)  into l_aa_ids 
    from V_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_ANTRIEBSART gva 
    join t_antriebsart aa on (aa.mapping_getex = gva.ANTRIEBSART )
   where  gva.v_id = aregindexid;
   */
        UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_antriebsart
        SET
            geloescht = 0
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND geloescht = 1
            AND ( antriebsartid IN (
                SELECT
                    regindex_antriebsartid
                FROM
                    v_getex_vorschrift_antriebsart
                WHERE
                    v_id = aregindexid
            ) );
      -- select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_aa_ids, ':'))
        UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_antriebsart
        SET
            geloescht = 1
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND geloescht = 0
            AND ( antriebsartid NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    regindex_antriebsartid
                FROM
                    v_getex_vorschrift_antriebsart
                WHERE
                    v_id = aregindexid
            ) );
        MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_antriebsart dest
        USING (
                  SELECT
                      avorschriftid            AS vorschriftid,
                      regindex_antriebsartid   AS antriebsartid
                  FROM
                      v_getex_vorschrift_antriebsart
                  WHERE
                      v_id = aregindexid
              )
        src ON ( src.vorschriftid = dest.vorschriftid
                 AND src.antriebsartid = dest.antriebsartid )
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (
            vorschriftid,
            antriebsartid,
            geloescht ) --, bemerkung)
        VALUES
            ( src.vorschriftid,
              src.antriebsartid,
            0 );
    END pUpdateVorAntriebsart;

/*
  *
  */
    PROCEDURE pUpdateVorFzgKlasse (
        aregindexid     VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftid   NUMBER
    ) AS
    --l_fz_class_ids varchar2(100);
    BEGIN

        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_fahrzeugklasse
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND ( fahrzeugklasseid NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    fahrzeugklasseid
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift_fz_typ
                WHERE
                    v_id = aregindexid
            ) );
       -- and ( fahrzeugKlasseid not in ( select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_fz_class_ids, ':'))) );
        MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_fahrzeugklasse dest
        USING (
                  SELECT
                      avorschriftid AS vorschriftid,
                      fahrzeugklasseid
                  FROM
                      mv_getex_vorschrift_fz_typ
                  WHERE
                      v_id = aregindexid
              )
        src ON ( src.vorschriftid = dest.vorschriftid
                 AND src.fahrzeugklasseid = dest.fahrzeugklasseid )
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (
            vorschriftid,
            fahrzeugklasseid )
        VALUES
            ( src.vorschriftid,
              src.fahrzeugklasseid );
    END pUpdateVorFzgKlasse;

/*
*
*/
    PROCEDURE pUpdateVorLand (
        aregindexid     VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftid   NUMBER
    ) AS
   -- l_land_ids varchar2(2000);
        l_are_co NUMBER := 0;
        l_pr_co NUMBER := 0;
        l_prLandid  number :=0;
        l_pr_land varchar2(60);
    BEGIN

        SELECT  COUNT(*) INTO l_are_co
        FROM   mv_getex_vorschrift_land
        WHERE  iso_code3 = 'ARE'
            AND v_id = aregindexid;

        SELECT  COUNT(*) INTO l_pr_co
        FROM   mv_getex_vorschrift_land
        WHERE  (isocode5 = 'US-PR' OR iso_code3 ='USA')
          AND v_id = aregindexid;

        IF ( use_getex_subcountry = 0 ) THEN
            UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_land
            SET geloescht = 0
            WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND geloescht = 1
              AND landid IN (
                    SELECT  regindex_landid
                    FROM   mv_getex_vorschrift_land
                    WHERE   v_id = aregindexid
                      AND regindex_landid IS NOT NULL
                );
       -- and ( landid in ( select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_land_ids, ':'))) );
            UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_land
            SET    geloescht = 1
            WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND geloescht = 0
              AND landid NOT IN (
                    SELECT    regindex_landid
                    FROM    mv_getex_vorschrift_land
                    WHERE v_id = aregindexid
                      AND regindex_landid IS NOT NULL
                );
            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_land dest
            USING (  SELECT DISTINCT avorschriftid     AS vorschriftid,
                            regindex_landid   AS landid
                      FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_land
                      WHERE  v_id = aregindexid
                        AND regindex_landid IS NOT NULL
                  )
            src ON ( src.vorschriftid = dest.vorschriftid
                     AND src.landid = dest.landid )
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (   vorschriftid,    landid,   geloescht )
            VALUES( src.vorschriftid,   src.landid,       0 );
        ELSE     -- use subcountry
            UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_land
            SET     geloescht = 0
            WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND geloescht = 1 --avorschriftid 20181
                AND                                                      --'6579a5ea23bb3a5bf7f818f6'
                 ( landid IN ( SELECT    regindex_landid
                              FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_land
                              WHERE   v_id = aregindexid
                              AND regindex_landid IS NOT NULL
                              ) 
                 -- and ( landid in ( select column_value from table(apex_string.split_numbers(l_land_ids, ':'))) );
                    OR landid IN (
                        SELECT    mg.landid --,   gl.v_id, mg.mapping_typ, mg.MAPPING_TEXT
                        FROM     t_land_mapping_getex   mg
                        JOIN mv_getex_vorschrift_land   gl ON ( gl.iso_code3 = mg.mapping_text
                                                                  OR mg.mapping_text = gl.isocode5 )
                        WHERE  v_id = aregindexid
                        AND (    mg.mapping_typ = 1 AND mg.mapping_text = gl.isocode5
                              OR mg.mapping_typ = 2 AND mg.mapping_text = gl.iso_code3 
                            )
                    )
                  -- mapping TYP 3 has no Land id in GETEX
                    OR ( landid IN ( SELECT  landid   FROM   t_land
                                       WHERE b_nummer IN ( 'B89', 'B88', 'B97' )
                                     ) -- ARE länder
                            AND ( l_are_co > 0 ) --aregindexid ) '656dc6779d03c7614dc9ae2e'
                       ) 
                    OR ( landid IN ( SELECT landid  FROM t_land 
                                      WHERE b_nummer IN ( 'B93' ) 
                                      ) -- PR 
                            AND ( l_pr_co > 0

                            ) 
                       ) 
                 );  
        ---
            UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_land
            SET   geloescht = 1
            WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
               AND geloescht = 0
               AND ( landid NOT IN ( SELECT     landid
                                      FROM   t_land
                                      WHERE   b_nummer IN ('B89', 'B88', 'B97' )
                                    )
                      AND landid NOT IN (  SELECT regindex_landid
                                            FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_land
                                            WHERE  v_id = aregindexid
                                              AND regindex_landid IS NOT NULL
                                        )
                      AND landid NOT IN (
                            SELECT mg.landid --,   gl.v_id, mg.mapping_typ, mg.MAPPING_TEXT
                            FROM t_land_mapping_getex       mg
                             JOIN mv_getex_vorschrift_land   gl ON ( gl.iso_code3 = mg.mapping_text
                                                                      OR mg.mapping_text = gl.isocode5 )
                            WHERE v_id = aregindexid
                              AND (    mg.mapping_typ = 1 AND mg.mapping_text = gl.isocode5
                                    OR mg.mapping_typ = 2 AND mg.mapping_text = gl.iso_code3 )
                      )

                      OR ( landid IN ( SELECT landid
                                        FROM t_land
                                        WHERE b_nummer IN ( 'B89', 'B88','B97' )
                                  ) -- ARE länder
                            AND ( l_are_co = 0 ) --'656dc6779d03c7614dc9ae2e' 
                        )
                      OR ( landid IN ( SELECT landid FROM t_land
                                        WHERE b_nummer IN ( 'B93' )
                                    ) -- Puerto Rico
                            AND ( l_pr_co = 0 )
                      ) 
                );

            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_land dest
            USING ( SELECT DISTINCT avorschriftid     AS vorschriftid,
                          regindex_landid   AS landid
                      FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_land
                      WHERE  v_id = aregindexid
                        AND regindex_landid IS NOT NULL
                  )
            src ON ( src.vorschriftid = dest.vorschriftid
                     AND src.landid = dest.landid )
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (
                vorschriftid,
                landid,
                geloescht ) --, bemerkung)
            VALUES
                ( src.vorschriftid,
                  src.landid,
                0 );

         -- using sub countries      
            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_land dest
            USING (
                      SELECT
                          avorschriftid   AS vorschriftid,
                          mg.landid       AS landid,
                          gl.land_name    AS land_name
                      FROM
                          mv_getex_vorschrift_land   gl
                          JOIN t_land_mapping_getex       mg ON ( gl.iso_code3 = mg.mapping_text
                                                            OR mg.mapping_text = gl.isocode5 )
                      WHERE
                          gl.v_id = aregindexid
                          AND ( mg.mapping_typ = 1
                                AND mg.mapping_text = gl.isocode5
                                OR mg.mapping_typ = 2
                                AND mg.mapping_text = gl.iso_code3 )
                  )
            src ON ( src.vorschriftid = dest.vorschriftid
                     AND src.landid = dest.landid )
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (  vorschriftid,
                    landid,
                    geloescht,
                    bemerkung )
            VALUES ( src.vorschriftid,
                      src.landid,
                      0,
                      land_name ); 

       -- ARE länder, US-PR (Typ 3)  
            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_land dest
            USING ( SELECT avorschriftid   AS vorschriftid, --
                          l.landid        AS landid,
                          l.land          AS land_name --, gl.b_number as b_nummer 
                      FROM   mv_getex_vorschrift_land   gl
                      JOIN t_land   l ON ( l.b_nummer = gl.b_number
                                              AND l.b_nummer IN ( 'B89', 'B88', 'B97' ) 
                                            )
                      WHERE v_id = aregindexid
                  ) src --aregindexid  '656dc6779d03c7614dc9ae2e'
             ON ( src.vorschriftid = dest.vorschriftid
                     AND src.landid = dest.landid )
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (  vorschriftid,
                landid,
                geloescht,
                bemerkung )
            VALUES ( src.vorschriftid,
                  src.landid,
                  0,
                  land_name );

            -- Puerto Rico
           select landid , land  into l_prLandid , l_pr_land
            from t_land  where b_nummer= 'B93';  -- 1131
        --  wenn USA, merge Puerto Rico
            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_land dest
            USING ( SELECT distinct avorschriftid   AS vorschriftid, --
                          l_prLandid        AS landid,
                          l.land          AS land_name --, gl.b_number as b_nummer
                          , l.b_nummer
                      FROM  t_land      l 
                      JOIN  mv_getex_vorschrift_land  gl ON ( gl.isocode5 = 'US-PR' --l.b_nummer = gl.b_number
                                              AND l.b_nummer IN (  'B93' ) or gl.iso_code3 = 'USA' and l.b_nummer in ('BU2', 'BU1')
                                            )
                      WHERE v_id = aregindexid -- 
                  ) src 
             ON ( src.vorschriftid = dest.vorschriftid
                     AND src.landid = dest.landid  )
             WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (  vorschriftid,    landid, geloescht, bemerkung )
            VALUES ( src.vorschriftid,  src.landid,  0,  l_pr_land );                   
        END IF;
    END pUpdateVorLand;




	/*
	PROCEDURE pactualisevorschriftcluster (
        aregindexid             VARCHAR2,
        acreated_vorschriftid   NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_cluster_ids VARCHAR2(2000);
    BEGIN
        NULL;
     -- to do

            LISTAGG(kc.konzern_clusterid, ':') WITHIN GROUP(
                ORDER BY
                    kc.konzern_clusterid
            )
        INTO l_cluster_ids

        WHERE

    END pactualisevorschriftcluster;

	PROCEDURE pUpdateVorEinsatzModel (
        aregindexid     IN   VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftid   IN   NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_timelinedatetype    VARCHAR2(64);
        l_modellid            NUMBER := 0;
        l_master              NUMBER := 0;
        l_previous_modellid   NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
    -- verhindere Aktualisierung,  wenn master = "getex" -->20
        SELECT
            nvl(master, 0)
        INTO l_master
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            regindexid = aregindexid;
        IF ( l_master not in ( 20, 30) ) THEN
            return;
        END IF;
    /*
    select decode(TIMELINEDATETYPE, 'EU', 10, 'CHINA', 20, 'MODELYEAR', 30, null, 10, 10) into  l_modellid 
    from v_getex_vorschrift   where reg_id = aregindexid;
    select EINSATZDATUM_MODELLID into l_previous_modellid 
    from  t_vorschrift 
    where vorschriftid = avorschriftid and regindexid = aregindexid;
    */
        l_modellid := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fEinsatzDatumModellID(avorschriftid);  -- (T 1392)

     -- remove not used datumangaben
        IF ( l_modellid != l_previous_modellid ) THEN
            UPDATE t_vorschrift
            SET
                einsatzdatum_modellid = l_modellid
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND regindexid = aregindexid
        --and l_timelineDatetype is not null 
                AND einsatzdatum_modellid != l_modellid;
            IF ( l_previous_modellid = 20 ) THEN
            -- delete 
                DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                WHERE
                    vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND einsatzdatum_typid IN (
                        1020,
                        1021,
                        1022,
                        1023,
                        1060,
                        1063
                    );
            ELSIF ( l_previous_modellid = 30 ) THEN
                DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                WHERE
                    vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND einsatzdatum_typid IN (
                        1030,
                        1031
                    );
            ELSIF ( l_previous_modellid = 10 ) THEN
                DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                WHERE
                    vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND einsatzdatum_typid IN (
                        1010,
                        1011,
                        1041
                    );
            END IF;
        END IF;
    END pUpdateVorEinsatzModel;


 /**
 *   Neu
 */
  procedure pUpdateVorEinsatzdaten (
        aVorschriftID in number
    ) is
        l_master NUMBER := 0;

    begin
    --select distinct getexid from v_vorschrift_getex_einsatzdatum where VorschriftID =aVorschriftID;
        SELECT nvl(master, 0)
        INTO l_master
        FROM t_vorschrift
        WHERE vorschriftid = aVorschriftID;

        IF ( l_master not in ( 20, 30) ) THEN
            return;
        END IF;


        merge into t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ t
        using (
            select einsatzdatum_typid, min(datum) datum, min(sc_year) as jahr, fahrzeugklasseid
            from v_vorschrift_getex_einsatzdatum
            where vorschriftid = aVorschriftid
            group by einsatzdatum_typid, fahrzeugklasseid
        ) u
        on (t.vorschriftid = aVorschriftID and t.einsatzdatum_typid = u.einsatzdatum_typid 
                                  and nvl(t.fahrzeugklasseid, 0) = nvl(u.fahrzeugklasseid, 0))
        when matched then update set t.einsatzdatum = u.datum, 
        t.modeljahr = nvl2(u.jahr, to_date( u.jahr, 'yyyy'), null), manuelle_eintragung = 20
        where emano_util.fIsUnequal(t.einsatzdatum, u.datum) = 1
              or emano_util.fIsUnequal(t.modeljahr, nvl2(u.jahr, to_date( u.jahr, 'yyyy'), null)) = 1
        when not matched then insert (vorschriftid, einsatzdatum_typid, einsatzdatum,
             modeljahr,
             fahrzeugklasseid, manuelle_eintragung)
        values (aVorschriftID, u.einsatzdatum_typid, u.datum, 
             nvl2(u.jahr, to_date( u.jahr, 'yyyy'), null),
             u.fahrzeugklasseid, 20);

        --delete from t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ where (vorschriftid, einsatzdatum_typid, fahrzeugklasseid) not in (
       --     select vorschriftid, einsatzdatum_typid, fahrzeugklasseid
        --    from v_vorschrift_getex_einsatzdatum
        --    where vorschriftid = aVorschriftid
        --);
        delete 
        from t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ 
        where vorschriftid = aVorschriftID 
          and ( einsatzdatum_typid, nvl(fahrzeugklasseid, 0)) not in (
                                   select  einsatzdatum_typid, nvl(fahrzeugklasseid, 0)
                                   from v_vorschrift_getex_einsatzdatum where vorschriftid = aVorschriftID 
                               )
        and einsatzdatum_typid not in (1051, 1071, 1073);
       --- merge NotApplicable coming from another brunch of JSON- structure
        FOR cu IN ( SELECT  v.vorschriftid ,   gfz.fahrzeugklasseid,  gfz.basetype
                ,gfz.all_notapplicable, gfz.FBU_notapplicable, gfz.CKD_notapplicable
                from MV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP gfz
                join T_vorschrift v on (gfz.v_id = v.regindexid and v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid )-- and v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid) --37593 )
                 where basetype is not null
        ) LOOP

        -- for PCV  cu.fahrzeugklasseid
        if (cu.basetype ='CHINA') then
         --// FBU
           MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ dest
           USING ( SELECT  v.vorschriftid ,   gfz.fahrzeugklasseid  --gfz.*
                    ,gfz.all_notapplicable, gfz.FBU_notapplicable, gfz.CKD_notapplicable
                    from MV_getex_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP gfz
                    join T_vorschrift v on (gfz.v_id = v.regindexid and v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid) --37593 ) --
                    where   fahrzeugklasseid in (cu.fahrzeugklasseid)
           )src
            on ( dest.vorschriftid = src.vorschriftid and
                 dest.fahrzeugklasseid = src.fahrzeugklasseid 
                 and dest.einsatzdatum_typid = 1073 ) -- PCV  FBU_notapplicable 
            WHEN MATCHED THEN 
                 UPDATE      set einsatzdatum = FBU_notapplicable
                 where emano_util.fIsUnequal(einsatzdatum, FBU_notapplicable) = 1                 
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (vorschriftid,     fahrzeugklasseid,    einsatzdatum,          einsatzdatum_typid )
            VALUES( src.vorschriftid, src.fahrzeugklasseid, src.FBU_notapplicable,  1073 )
            where FBU_notapplicable is not null;

           --// CKD not Appl
           MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ dest
           USING ( SELECT  v.vorschriftid ,   gfz.fahrzeugklasseid  --gfz.*
                    ,gfz.all_notapplicable, gfz.FBU_notapplicable, gfz.CKD_notapplicable
                    from MV_getex_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP gfz
                    join T_vorschrift v on (gfz.v_id = v.regindexid and v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid) --37593 ) --
                    where   fahrzeugklasseid in (cu.fahrzeugklasseid)
           )src
            on ( dest.vorschriftid = src.vorschriftid and
                 dest.fahrzeugklasseid = src.fahrzeugklasseid 
                 and dest.einsatzdatum_typid = 1071 ) -- PCV  CKD_notapplicable 
            WHEN MATCHED THEN 
                 UPDATE      set einsatzdatum = CKD_notapplicable
                 where emano_util.fIsUnequal(einsatzdatum, CKD_notapplicable) = 1
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (vorschriftid,     fahrzeugklasseid,    einsatzdatum,          einsatzdatum_typid )
            VALUES( src.vorschriftid, src.fahrzeugklasseid, src.CKD_notapplicable,  1071  )
            where CKD_notapplicable is not null;

        elsif (cu.basetype ='GENERAL') then
             MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ dest
               USING ( SELECT  v.vorschriftid ,   gfz.fahrzeugklasseid  --gfz.*
                ,gfz.all_notapplicable, gfz.FBU_notapplicable, gfz.CKD_notapplicable
                from MV_getex_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP gfz
                join T_vorschrift v on (gfz.v_id = v.regindexid and v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid)
                where   fahrzeugklasseid in (cu.fahrzeugklasseid)
            )src
            on ( dest.vorschriftid = src.vorschriftid and
                 dest.fahrzeugklasseid = src.fahrzeugklasseid 
                 and dest.einsatzdatum_typid = 1051  ) -- PCV  all_NOTapplicable 
            WHEN MATCHED THEN 
                 UPDATE set einsatzdatum = all_notapplicable
                 where emano_util.fIsUnequal(einsatzdatum,all_notapplicable) = 1
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (vorschriftid,     fahrzeugklasseid,    einsatzdatum,          einsatzdatum_typid )
            VALUES( src.vorschriftid, src.fahrzeugklasseid, src.all_notapplicable,  1051 )
            where all_notapplicable is not null;
        end if;

    end LOOP;
    pck_ri.pMarkObsoleteRelations(aVorschriftID);
    end pUpdateVorEinsatzdaten;

 /**
 *  O B S O L E T E
 */
 /**
 *
 */
 /*   PROCEDURE pUpdateVorEinsatzdaten (
        aregindexid     IN   VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftid   IN   NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_getex_einsatzdat_typids   VARCHAR2(300);
        l_neue_einsatzdat_typids    VARCHAR2(300);
        l_reginex_einsatzdat_typ    VARCHAR2(300);
        l_sc_datum                  DATE;
    --l_ch_datum varchar2(64);
   -- l_einsatzdatum_model varchar2(64);
        l_datum_as_mj               NUMBER := 0;
        l_modelyear                 NUMBER := NULL;
        l_getex_ed_types            VARCHAR2(100);
        l_getex_ed_dates            VARCHAR2(300);
        l_phaseinsincl              NUMBER := 0;
        l_master                    NUMBER := 0;
        leinsatzdatum_modellid      NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
    -- verhindere Aktualisierung,  wenn master != "getex" -->20
        SELECT  nvl(master, 0)
        INTO l_master
        FROM t_vorschrift
        WHERE  regindexid = aregindexid;
        IF ( l_master not in ( 20, 30) ) THEN
            return;
        END IF;

   -- select timelinedatetype  into l_einsatzdatum_model  
   -- from v_getex_vorschrift 
  --  where reg_id = aregindexid and rev_current = 'true';
        leinsatzdatum_modellid := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fEinsatzDatumModellID(avorschriftid);

    -- collect alle sc_typeid over all thema for getex Vorschrift
        WITH e_l AS (
            SELECT
                sc_fahrzeug_typ,
                sc_datum,
                sc_year,
                edt.einsatzdatum_typid AS ed_typeid
            FROM mv_getex_thema_scenario   vsc
            JOIN t_einsatzdatum_typ        edt ON ( edt.mapping_getex = vsc.sc_type )
            WHERE vsc.sc_themaid IS NOT NULL
              AND vsc.sc_type IS NOT NULL
              AND vsc.v_id = aregindexid
        )
        SELECT   listagg(DISTINCT e_l.ed_typeid, ':')
        INTO l_getex_einsatzdat_typids
        FROM e_l;
    -- types existing in Regindex
        SELECT  listagg(einsatzdatum_typid, ':')
        INTO l_reginex_einsatzdat_typ
        FROM t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
        WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid;

    -- types from GETEX which do not exist in regindex
        SELECT listagg(column_value, ':')
        INTO l_neue_einsatzdat_typids
        FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_einsatzdat_typids, ':') )
        WHERE column_value NOT IN (
                SELECT column_value
                FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_reginex_einsatzdat_typ, ':') )
            );


    --//
        WITH cte_daten_getex AS (
            -- Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 1: Minimum über alle Themen holen 
            SELECT v.vorschriftid,
                sc_type,
                trunc(MIN(sc_datum)) AS sc_datum,
                sc_fahrzeug_typ
            FROM mv_getex_thema_scenario   g
            JOIN t_vorschrift              v ON ( g.v_id = v.regindexid )
            WHERE sc_datum IS NOT NULL
                AND v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid -- 1614 --:P29_VORSCHRIFTID  --in (182, 199,331,17,356,1440,1443) -- aVorschriftID 
            GROUP BY
                v.vorschriftid,
                sc_type,
                sc_fahrzeug_typ
        ), cte_daten_getex_mj AS (
            -- Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 1: Minimum über alle Themen holen 
            SELECT
                v.vorschriftid,
                sc_type,  --sc_datum , --trunc(min(sc_datum)) as sc_datum,
                MIN(sc_year) AS sc_year,
                sc_fahrzeug_typ
            FROM
                mv_getex_thema_scenario   g
                JOIN t_vorschrift              v ON ( g.v_id = v.regindexid )
            WHERE
                ( sc_year IS NOT NULL )
                AND v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid -- 1614 --aVorschriftID 
            GROUP BY
                v.vorschriftid,
                sc_type,
                sc_fahrzeug_typ
        ), cte_daten_getex2 AS (
            -- Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 2: Sortorder über Fahrzeugarten definieren 
            SELECT  c.*,
                CASE sc_fahrzeug_typ
                    WHEN 'PCV'           THEN 1
                    WHEN 'INDEPENDENT'   THEN 2
                    ELSE 3
                END AS sortorder
            FROM cte_daten_getex c
        ), cte_daten_getex2_mj AS (
            -- Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 2: Sortorder über Fahrzeugarten definieren 
            SELECT c_mj.*,
                CASE sc_fahrzeug_typ
                    WHEN 'PCV'           THEN  1
                    WHEN 'INDEPENDENT'   THEN  2
                    ELSE 3
                END AS sortorder
            FROM
                cte_daten_getex_mj c_mj
        ), cte_daten_getex3 AS (
            -- Einsatzdatumsangaben aus GETEX - Schritt 3: Auf Fahrzeugart mit höchster Priorität limitieren 
            -- only one of both sc_year or sc_datum exsists
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vorschriftid,
                sc_type,
                FIRST_VALUE(to_char(sc_datum, 'dd.mm.yyyy')) OVER(
                    PARTITION BY sc_type
                    ORDER BY
                        sortorder
                ) getex_einsatzdatum,
                FIRST_VALUE(sc_fahrzeug_typ) OVER(
                    PARTITION BY sc_type
                    ORDER BY
                        sortorder
                ) AS fahrzeugtyp
            FROM
                cte_daten_getex2
            UNION
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vorschriftid,
                sc_type,
                FIRST_VALUE(sc_year) OVER(
                    PARTITION BY sc_type
                    ORDER BY
                        sortorder
                ) getex_einsatzdatum,
                FIRST_VALUE(sc_fahrzeug_typ) OVER(
                    PARTITION BY sc_type
                    ORDER BY
                        sortorder
                ) AS fahrzeugtyp
            FROM cte_daten_getex2_mj
        )   
        --// store  dates and  Types in the correspondent lists 
        SELECT
                LISTAGG(edt.einsatzdatum_typid, ':') WITHIN GROUP(
                    ORDER BY
                        edt.einsatzdatum_typid
                ),
                LISTAGG(gd3.getex_einsatzdatum, ':') WITHIN GROUP(
                    ORDER BY
                        edt.einsatzdatum_typid
                )
        INTO
            l_getex_ed_types,
            l_getex_ed_dates
        FROM cte_daten_getex3     gd3
        JOIN t_einsatzdatum_typ   edt ON ( edt.mapping_getex = gd3.sc_type ); 


 --\\   
    -- first check modelyear *****
    --if(l_einsatzdatum_model = 'MODELYEAR') then
        IF ( leinsatzdatum_modellid = 30 ) THEN      --'MODELYEAR'
            SELECT
                MIN(sc_year)
            INTO l_modelyear
            FROM
                mv_getex_thema_scenario
            WHERE
                v_id = aregindexid;

        -- phasein_Incl  ////
            BEGIN
                SELECT --DISTINCT decode(nvl(sc_phaseinsincluded, 'false'), 'false', 0, 'true', 1,  0)
                max(
                    decode( nvl(sc_phaseinsincluded, 'false'), 'false', 0, 'true', 1,
                           0))
                INTO l_phaseinsincl
                FROM mv_getex_thema_scenario
                WHERE v_id = aregindexid;

                UPDATE t_vorschrift
                SET phasein_enthalten = l_phaseinsincl
                WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
            EXCEPTION
                WHEN no_data_found THEN
            -- Keine Datumsszenarien für Vorschrift;
                    NULL;
            END;        --\\\\   
            IF ( l_modelyear IS NOT NULL ) THEN
                l_datum_as_mj := 1;

                UPDATE t_vorschrift
                SET  mj_schalter_status = 1
                WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
            -- update existent
                UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                SET einsatzdatum = NULL, --to_date('31.12.'||l_modelyear , 'dd.mm.yyyy'),
                    modeljahr = NULL --to_date(l_modelyear, 'yyyy')
                WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND einsatzdatum_typid = 1031;

                FOR cur IN (
                    WITH cte_typ AS (
                        SELECT x.column_value ed_typ,
                            ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY ROWNUM  ) rn  --, y.column_value 
                        FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_ed_types, ':') ) x
                    ), cte_dat AS (
                        SELECT y.column_value ed_dat,
                            ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY  ROWNUM ) rn
                        FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(l_getex_ed_dates, ':') ) y
                    )
                    SELECT
                        cte_typ.ed_typ,
                        cte_dat.ed_dat
                    FROM cte_dat
                    JOIN cte_typ ON cte_typ.rn = cte_dat.rn
                ) LOOP UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                SET --einsatzdatum = to_date('02.01.'||(l_modelyear -1), 'dd.mm.yyyy'), modeljahr = to_date(l_modelyear, 'yyyy')
                    einsatzdatum = NULL,
                    modeljahr = to_date(cur.ed_dat, 'yyyy')
                WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND einsatzdatum_typid IN (
                        SELECT column_value
                        FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_einsatzdat_typids, ':') )
                    )
                    AND einsatzdatum_typid = cur.ed_typ;
                END LOOP;

            -- abgleich nur year *****************
                IF ( l_neue_einsatzdat_typids IS NOT NULL ) THEN
                    INSERT INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ (
                        vorschriftid,
                        einsatzdatum_typid,
                        einsatzdatum,
                        modeljahr,
                        manuelle_eintragung
                    )
                        WITH cte_typ AS (
                            SELECT x.column_value ed_typ, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY ROWNUM ) rn  --, y.column_value 
                            FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_ed_types, ':') ) x
                        ), -- l_getex_ed_types
                         cte_dat AS (
                            SELECT y.column_value ed_dat, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY ROWNUM ) rn
                            FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(l_getex_ed_dates, ':') ) y  --l_getex_ed_dates
                        )
                        SELECT
                            avorschriftid,
                            cte_typ.ed_typ,
                            NULL,
                            CASE
                                WHEN ( cte_typ.ed_typ IN (  1030 ) ) THEN
                                    to_date(cte_dat.ed_dat, 'yyyy')    --  when (column_value in ( 1031) ) then null -- phasein End
                                ELSE NULL
                            END AS modeljahr,
                            20 AS manuelle_eintragung
                        FROM cte_typ
                        JOIN cte_dat ON ( cte_typ.rn = cte_dat.rn )
                        JOIN TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_neue_einsatzdat_typids, ':') ) nz ON ( nz.column_value = cte_typ
                            .ed_typ ); -- l_neue_einsatzdat_Typids
                END IF;
            ELSE -- l_modelyear is null, use sc_datum
                UPDATE t_vorschrift
                SET mj_schalter_status = 0
                WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
            -- update existent
                UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                SET --einsatzdatum = null , --to_date('31.12.'||l_modelyear , 'dd.mm.yyyy'),
                    modeljahr = NULL --to_date(l_modelyear, 'yyyy')
                WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND einsatzdatum_typid IN ( 1030, 1031 );

                FOR cur IN (
                    WITH cte_typ AS (
                        SELECT x.column_value ed_typ,
                            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(    ORDER BY  ROWNUM   ) rn  --, y.column_value 
                        FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_ed_types, ':') ) x
                    ), cte_dat AS (
                        SELECT y.column_value ed_dat,
                            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(  ORDER BY  ROWNUM  ) rn
                        FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(l_getex_ed_dates, ':') ) y
                    )
                    SELECT
                        cte_typ.ed_typ,
                        cte_dat.ed_dat
                    FROM  cte_dat
                    JOIN cte_typ ON cte_typ.rn = cte_dat.rn
                    WHERE cte_typ.ed_typ = 1030
                ) LOOP 
                  UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                  SET einsatzdatum = cur.ed_dat --l_sc_datum, -- case l_datum_as_mj when 0 then l_sc_datum else null end ,
                    ,
                    modeljahr = NULL
                  WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND einsatzdatum_typid IN (
                        SELECT column_value
                        FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_einsatzdat_typids, ':') )
                    )
                --and  einsatzdatum is null  
                    AND einsatzdatum_typid = cur.ed_typ;  --and EINSATZDATUM_TYPID = 1030
                END LOOP;
             --** insert not existing  einsatzdaten
                IF ( l_neue_einsatzdat_typids IS NOT NULL ) THEN
                    INSERT INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ (
                        vorschriftid,
                        einsatzdatum_typid,
                        einsatzdatum,
                        modeljahr,
                        manuelle_eintragung
                    )
                        WITH cte_typ AS (
                            SELECT  x.column_value ed_typ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY  ROWNUM ) rn  --, y.column_value 
                            FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_ed_types, ':') ) x
                        ), -- l_getex_ed_types
                         cte_dat AS (
                            SELECT  y.column_value ed_dat,
                                ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY ROWNUM ) rn
                            FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split(l_getex_ed_dates, ':') ) y  --l_getex_ed_dates
                        )
                        SELECT
                            avorschriftid,
                            cte_typ.ed_typ,
                            to_date(cte_dat.ed_dat, 'dd.mm.yyyy'),
                            NULL,
                            20 AS manuelle_eintragung
                        FROM cte_typ
                        JOIN cte_dat ON ( cte_typ.rn = cte_dat.rn )
                        JOIN TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_neue_einsatzdat_typids, ':') ) nz ON ( nz.column_value = cte_typ
                            .ed_typ ); -- l_neue_einsatzdat_Typids
                END IF;
            END IF;
        -- delete another types when MODELYEAR
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
            WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND einsatzdatum_typid NOT IN (
                    1000, 1051, 1071, 1073  -- not Applicable
                )
              AND ( einsatzdatum_typid NOT IN (
                            SELECT column_value
                            FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_einsatzdat_typids, ':') )
                            )
                      OR einsatzdatum_typid NOT IN (
                            SELECT   column_value
                            FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_ed_types, ':') )
                            ) 
                );
            return;
        END IF;     

        --select * from T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_EINSATZDATUM_TYP
     --
        IF ( l_getex_ed_dates IS NOT NULL ) THEN
            FOR cur IN (
                WITH cte_typ AS (
                    SELECT x.column_value ed_typ,
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY ROWNUM  ) rn  --, y.column_value 
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_ed_types, ':') ) x
                ), cte_dat AS (
                    SELECT
                        y.column_value ed_dat,
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY ROWNUM) rn
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split(l_getex_ed_dates, ':') ) y
                )
                SELECT
                    cte_typ.ed_typ,
                    cte_dat.ed_dat
                FROM
                    cte_dat
                    JOIN cte_typ ON cte_typ.rn = cte_dat.rn
            ) LOOP
                UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                SET einsatzdatum = to_date(cur.ed_dat, 'dd.mm.yyyy')
                WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND einsatzdatum_typid IN (
                        SELECT column_value
                        FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_einsatzdat_typids, ':') )
                    )
                    AND cur.ed_typ = einsatzdatum_typid
                    AND ( einsatzdatum IS NULL
                          OR to_char(einsatzdatum, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != cur.ed_dat );
            END LOOP;
        END IF;
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
        WHERE vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND einsatzdatum_typid NOT IN (  1000,  1041, 1060, 1063, 1051, 1071, 1073  -- not Applicable
            ) -- -- In_Kraft /Ausser Kraft
          AND ( einsatzdatum_typid NOT IN (
                            SELECT column_value
                            FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_einsatzdat_typids, ':') )
                )
                  OR einsatzdatum_typid NOT IN (
                            SELECT column_value
                            FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_ed_types, ':') )
                ) 
          );
    -- add new typen
        IF ( l_neue_einsatzdat_typids IS NOT NULL ) THEN
            INSERT INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ (
                vorschriftid,
                einsatzdatum,
                einsatzdatum_typid
            )
                WITH cte_typ AS (
                    SELECT x.column_value ed_typ,
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(  ORDER BY  ROWNUM ) rn  --, y.column_value 
                    FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_ed_types, ':') ) x
                ), -- l_getex_ed_types
                 cte_dat AS (
                    SELECT to_date(y.column_value, 'dd.mm.yyyy') ed_dat,
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY  ROWNUM ) rn
                    FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(l_getex_ed_dates, ':') ) y  --l_getex_ed_dates
                )
                SELECT  avorschriftid, cte_dat.ed_dat, cte_typ.ed_typ
                FROM cte_typ
                JOIN cte_dat ON ( cte_typ.rn = cte_dat.rn )
                JOIN TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(l_neue_einsatzdat_typids, ':') ) nz ON ( nz.column_value = cte_typ.ed_typ
                    );
        END IF;  
        -- update empty date
       -- update T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_EINSATZDATUM_TYP set einsatzdatum = l_sc_datum 
       -- where Vorschriftid = avorschriftid 
      --  and EINSATZDATUM_TYPID in (select column_value from table (apex_string.split_numbers(l_getex_einsatzdat_Typids, ':')) )
      --  and ( einsatzdatum is null or to_char(einsatzdatum, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_sc_datum, 'dd.mm.yyyy') );

      -- anf. 1578 not Applicable
      -- PCV
