      MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ dest
       USING ( SELECT  v.vorschriftid ,   gfz.fahrzeugklasseid  --gfz.*
                ,gfz.all_notapplicable, gfz.FBU_notapplicable, gfz.CKD_notapplicable
                from MV_getex_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP gfz
                join T_vorschrift v on (gfz.v_id = v.regindexid and v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid)
                where   fahrzeugklasseid in (1024)
       )src
        on ( dest.vorschriftid = src.vorschriftid and
             dest.fahrzeugklasseid = src.fahrzeugklasseid 
             and dest.einsatzdatum_typid = 1051 ) -- PCV not all_applicable 
        WHEN MATCHED THEN 
             UPDATE      set einsatzdatum = all_notapplicable
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (vorschriftid,     fahrzeugklasseid,    einsatzdatum,          einsatzdatum_typid )
        VALUES( src.vorschriftid, src.fahrzeugklasseid, src.all_notapplicable,  1051 );

         --// FBU not Applicable
     MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ dest
       USING ( SELECT  v.vorschriftid ,   gfz.fahrzeugklasseid  --gfz.*
                ,gfz.all_notapplicable, gfz.FBU_notapplicable, gfz.CKD_notapplicable
                from MV_getex_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP gfz
                join T_vorschrift v on (gfz.v_id = v.regindexid and v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid)
                where   fahrzeugklasseid in (1024)
       )src
        on ( dest.vorschriftid = src.vorschriftid and
             dest.fahrzeugklasseid = src.fahrzeugklasseid 
             and dest.einsatzdatum_typid = 1073 ) -- PCV not FBU_notapplicable 
        WHEN MATCHED THEN 
             UPDATE      set einsatzdatum = FBU_notapplicable
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (vorschriftid,     fahrzeugklasseid,    einsatzdatum,          einsatzdatum_typid )
        VALUES( src.vorschriftid, src.fahrzeugklasseid, src.FBU_notapplicable,  1073 );

       --// CKD not Appl
     MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ dest
       USING ( SELECT  v.vorschriftid ,   gfz.fahrzeugklasseid  --gfz.*
                ,gfz.all_notapplicable, gfz.FBU_notapplicable, gfz.CKD_notapplicable
                from MV_getex_VORSCHRIFT_FZ_TYP gfz
                join T_vorschrift v on (gfz.v_id = v.regindexid and v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid)
                where   fahrzeugklasseid in (1024)
       )src
        on ( dest.vorschriftid = src.vorschriftid and
             dest.fahrzeugklasseid = src.fahrzeugklasseid 
             and dest.einsatzdatum_typid = 1071 ) -- PCV not FBU_notapplicable 
        WHEN MATCHED THEN 
             UPDATE      set einsatzdatum = CKD_notapplicable
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (vorschriftid,     fahrzeugklasseid,    einsatzdatum,          einsatzdatum_typid )
        VALUES( src.vorschriftid, src.fahrzeugklasseid, src.CKD_notapplicable,  1071 ); 

    END pUpdateVorEinsatzdaten;
   */ 
    /*
    *
    */
    PROCEDURE pUpdateInKraftDatum (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS

 --declare 
        l_co          NUMBER := 0;
        l_master      NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_key   VARCHAR2(64);
    BEGIN

    -- go over getex key,  some getex jsons do not have rev_regIndexId
        SELECT
            regindexid
        INTO l_getex_key
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;  

    -- verhindere Aktualisierung,  wenn master = "getex" -->20
        SELECT
            nvl(master, 0)
        INTO l_master
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            regindexid = l_getex_key;
        IF ( l_master not in (20, 30) ) THEN
            return;
        END IF;
        
        merge into t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ t
        using (
            SELECT trunc(rev_inforce_datum) datuminkraft
            FROM mv_getex_vorschrift
            WHERE reg_id = l_getex_key
        ) u
        on (t.vorschriftid = avorschriftid and t.einsatzdatum_typid = 1000)
        when matched then update set t.einsatzdatum = u.datuminkraft
            where emano_util.fIsUnequal(t.einsatzdatum, u.datuminkraft) = 1
        when not matched then insert (vorschriftid,
                einsatzdatum_typid,
                einsatzdatum
            ) values (avorschriftid, 1000, u.datuminkraft)
            where u.datuminkraft is not null;
            
   
    END pUpdateInKraftDatum;


-- Mass update procedures	
	PROCEDURE pMassenUpdateGetexKernDaten (
        attr_list          IN   VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftenids   IN   VARCHAR2
    ) AS

	-- attr_list := '2:3:5:6' ; 
	--  1 Vorschriftennummer; 
	-- 2 Dokumentendatum
	--  3  l_Dokumententyp
	--  4  Titel Kurz
	--  5  Titel Lang
	--  6  Status der Vorschrift
	--  7  Einsatzdatum Modell
	--  8 Vorschriftentyp
        lvorschrifttypid          NUMBER := 0;
        l_dokumententyp           VARCHAR2(30);
        l_docum_typeid            NUMBER := 0;
        l_statusid                NUMBER := 0;
        l_einsatzdatum_modellid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_co                      NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske NUMBER := 0;
        l_diffsVorhanden   NUMBER := 0;   --  != 0   falls differenzen vorhanden in bestimmten attributen ( Anf.1600)
   BEGIN                                                         --attr_list  
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT
                column_value
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(attr_list, ':') ) xa
        ) LOOP
  -- select v.vorschriftid from mv_getex_vorschrift gv  join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid = gv.reg_id) where v.vorschriftid <200
            FOR curi IN (
                SELECT
                    gv.reg_id,
                    gv.reg_num,
                    gv.rev_doc_datum,
                    gv.rev_documenttype,
                    gv.rev_title,
                    gv.rev_shorttitle,
                    gv.reg_status,
                    v.vorschriftid  --,   nvl(gv.timelinedatetype,'EU') einsatzdatum_Model
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift                                      gv
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                                             v ON ( v.regindexid = gv.reg_id )
                    JOIN TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(avorschriftenids, ':') ) vx ON ( vx.column_value = v.vorschriftid )
                WHERE
                    nvl(v.master, 0)  in (20, 30)
            ) LOOP
              -- 1 vorsch nummer
                IF ( cur.column_value = 1 AND curi.reg_num IS NOT NULL ) THEN
            -- if ( 1 in ( select column_value from table ( apex_string.split_numbers('2:4:5:7', ':') )) ) then
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET
                        vorschrift_nummer = curi.reg_num
                    WHERE
                        vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                        AND nvl(vorschrift_nummer, ' ') != nvl(curi.reg_num, ' ');
                END IF;

              --// 1600  ----------
                SELECT       getex_vergleich_bitmaske
                INTO  l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske
                 FROM t_vorschrift
                 WHERE vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid;
                 l_diffsVorhanden := bitand( nvl(l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske, 0), power(2,0)+  power(2,5)+ power(2,6)
                 ) ;
           --2 documentendatum
                IF ( cur.column_value = 2 ) THEN
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET
                        dokumentendatum = trunc(curi.rev_doc_datum)
                    WHERE
                        vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                        AND ( dokumentendatum IS NULL
                              AND curi.rev_doc_datum IS NOT NULL
                              OR dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL
                              AND curi.rev_doc_datum IS NULL
                              OR dokumentendatum != trunc(curi.rev_doc_datum) );
                END IF;

            --3 DOCUMENT_TYPEID
                IF ( cur.column_value = 3 ) THEN
                    SELECT
                        COUNT(document_typeid)
                    INTO l_co --DOCUMENT_TYPEID
                    FROM
                        t_document_type
                    WHERE
                        document_type = curi.rev_documenttype;
                    IF ( l_co = 1 ) THEN
                        SELECT
                            document_typeid
                        INTO l_docum_typeid
                        FROM
                            t_document_type
                        WHERE
                            document_type = curi.rev_documenttype;
                    -- aktualisiere wenn ungleich
                        UPDATE t_vorschrift
                        SET
                            document_typeid = l_docum_typeid
                        WHERE
                            vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                            AND ( nvl(document_typeid, 0) != nvl(l_docum_typeid, 0) );
                    END IF;
                END IF;

            --4 TITEL_KURZ  gv.rev_title, gv.rev_shorttitle, gv.reg_status
                IF ( cur.column_value = 4 ) THEN
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET
                        titel_kurz = curi.rev_shorttitle
                    WHERE
                        vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                        AND nvl(titel_kurz, ' ') != nvl(curi.rev_shorttitle, ' ');
                END IF;

           -- 5 VORSCHRIFT_BEZEICHNUNG 
                IF ( cur.column_value = 5 ) THEN
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET
                        vorschrift_bezeichnung = curi.rev_title
                    WHERE
                        vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                        AND nvl(vorschrift_bezeichnung, ' ') != nvl(curi.rev_title, ' ');
                END IF;

           --6 VORSCHRIFT_STATUSID 
                IF ( cur.column_value = 6 ) THEN
                    SELECT
                        vorschrift_statusid
                    INTO l_statusid
                    FROM
                        t_vorschrift_status
                    WHERE
                        mapping_getex = curi.reg_status;
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET
                        vorschrift_statusid = l_statusid
                    WHERE
                        vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                        AND nvl(vorschrift_statusid, 0) != nvl(l_statusid, 0);
                END IF;

            -- 7 Einsatzdatum Modell  EINSATZDATUM_MODELLID
                IF ( cur.column_value = 7 ) THEN
                    l_einsatzdatum_modellid := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fEinsatzDatumModellID(curi.vorschriftid);

                --select EINSATZDATUM_MODELLID into l_einsatzdatum_modellid 
              --  from T_EINSATZDATUM_MODELL
               -- where MAPPING_GETEX = curi.einsatzdatum_Model;
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET
                        einsatzdatum_modellid = l_einsatzdatum_modellid
                    WHERE
                        vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                        AND nvl(einsatzdatum_modellid, 0) != nvl(l_einsatzdatum_modellid, 0);
                END IF;

            ----8 VorschriftTypID
                IF ( cur.column_value = 8 ) THEN
                    lvorschrifttypid := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fCalcVorTypID(curi.reg_id);
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET
                        vorschrift_typid = lvorschrifttypid
                    WHERE
                        vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                        AND nvl(vorschrift_typid, 0) != nvl(lvorschrifttypid, 0);
                END IF;            --
                -- 1600--
                if ( l_diffsVorhanden > 0) then
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET   INHALTLICH_SACHLICH_GEPRUEFT = 10    --( nicht gepr.)
                    WHERE vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid;
                end if;

            END LOOP;
        END LOOP;
    END pMassenUpdateGetexKernDaten;


    PROCEDURE pMassenUpdateGetexEinsatzdaten (
        attr_list          IN   VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftenids   IN   VARCHAR2
    ) AS
      -- attr_list := '9:10' ; 
	--  9 Inkraftsetzungsdatum;  -- 10 Einsatzdaten --  11  Ausserkraftsetz --  4  Titel Kurz
        l_co NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske number :=0;
        l_diffsVorhanden number  :=0;
    BEGIN                                                         --attr_list  
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT column_value
            FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(attr_list, ':') ) xa
        ) LOOP
  -- select v.vorschriftid from mv_getex_vorschrift gv  join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid = gv.reg_id) where v.vorschriftid <200
            FOR curi IN (
                SELECT
                    gv.reg_id,
                    gv.reg_num,
                    gv.rev_inforce_datum,
                    v.vorschriftid,
                    nvl(gv.timelinedatetype, 'EU') einsatzdatum_model
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift                                      gv
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                                             v ON ( v.regindexid = gv.reg_id )
                    JOIN TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(avorschriftenids, ':') ) vx ON ( vx.column_value = v.vorschriftid )
                WHERE
                    nvl(v.master, 0)  in (20, 30)
            ) LOOP
        -- select *-- trunc(rev_inForce_datum)  
        -- from mV_GETEX_VORSCHRIFT
          --// 1600  ----------
                SELECT   getex_vergleich_bitmaske
                INTO  l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske
                 FROM t_vorschrift
                 WHERE vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid;
                l_diffsVorhanden := bitand( nvl(l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske, 0),  power(2,13)  ) ;

          -- 9 rev_inForce_datum
                IF ( cur.column_value = 9 ) THEN
                    SELECT COUNT(*)
                    INTO l_co  --Vorschriftid, einsatzdatum_typid, einsatzdatum  
                    FROM   t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                    WHERE     vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid --:P29_VORSCHRIFTID 
                    AND einsatzdatum_typid = 1000;
                    IF ( l_co > 0 ) THEN
                        UPDATE t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ
                        SET  einsatzdatum = trunc(curi.rev_inforce_datum)
                        WHERE   vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid
                          AND einsatzdatum_typid = 1000
                          AND ( einsatzdatum IS NULL
                                  AND curi.rev_inforce_datum IS NOT NULL
                                  OR einsatzdatum IS NOT NULL
                                  AND curi.rev_inforce_datum IS NULL
                                  OR nvl(to_char(einsatzdatum, 'dd.mm.yyyy'), 'null') != nvl(to_char(trunc(curi.rev_inforce_datum
                                  ), 'dd.mm.yyyy'), 'null') );
                    ELSE
                        INSERT INTO t_vorschrift_ref_einsatzdatum_typ (
                            vorschriftid,
                            einsatzdatum_typid,
                            einsatzdatum
                        ) VALUES (
                            curi.vorschriftid,
                            1000,
                            trunc(curi.rev_inforce_datum)
                        );
                    END IF;
                END IF;

            --10 Einsatzdaten
                IF ( cur.column_value = 10 ) THEN
                    pUpdateVorEinsatzdaten(curi.vorschriftid);

                END IF;

               if ( l_diffsVorhanden > 0) then
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET   INHALTLICH_SACHLICH_GEPRUEFT = 10    --( nicht gepr.)
                    WHERE vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid;
                end if;

           -- 11 Außerkraftsetzung
           -- if(cur.column_value = 11) then

           -- end if;
            END LOOP;
        END LOOP;
    END pMassenUpdateGetexEinsatzdaten;


	PROCEDURE pMassenUpdateGetexListAttrs (
        attr_list          IN   VARCHAR2,
        avorschriftenids   IN   VARCHAR2
    ) AS
        l_co NUMBER := 0;
	-- l_getex_key varchar2(64);
        l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske number :=0;
        l_diffsVorhanden number  :=0;
   BEGIN                                                         --attr_list  
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT
                column_value
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(attr_list, ':') ) xa
        ) LOOP
            FOR curi IN (
                SELECT
                    gv.reg_id,
                    gv.reg_num,
                    gv.rev_inforce_datum,
                    v.vorschriftid,
                    nvl(gv.timelinedatetype, 'EU') einsatzdatum_model
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift                                      gv
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                                             v ON ( v.regindexid IS NOT NULL
                                             AND v.regindexid = gv.reg_id )
                    JOIN TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(avorschriftenids, ':') )  vx ON ( vx.column_value = v.vorschriftid )
                WHERE
                    nvl(v.master, 0)  in (20, 30)
            ) LOOP
             --// 1600  ----------
                SELECT       getex_vergleich_bitmaske
                INTO  l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske
                FROM t_vorschrift
                WHERE vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid;
                 l_diffsVorhanden := bitand( nvl(l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske, 0), 
                 +  power(2,15)+ power(2,17)+ power(2,19) ) ;
       -- 12 SUCCESSOR/PRED
                IF ( cur.column_value = 12 ) THEN
                    pUpdateGetexPredecessorRelations(curi.vorschriftid);
                END IF;
       -- 13 LINKED
                IF ( cur.column_value = 13 ) THEN
                    pUpdateGetexLinkedRelations(curi.vorschriftid);
                END IF;

         -- 14 Changes
                IF ( cur.column_value = 14 ) THEN
                    pUpdateGetexChangeRelations(curi.vorschriftid);
                END IF; 

           -- 15 DEMANDS
                IF ( cur.column_value = 15 ) THEN
                    pUpdateGetexDemandsRelations(curi.vorschriftid);
                END IF;

            -- 16 EQUIVAlent
                IF ( cur.column_value = 16 ) THEN
                    pUpdateGetexEquivalentRelations(curi.vorschriftid);
                END IF; 


            -- 17 Länder   *****************************************
                IF ( cur.column_value = 17 ) THEN
                    pUpdateVorLand(curi.reg_id, curi.vorschriftid);
                END IF; 

            -- 18 Themen
                IF ( cur.column_value = 18 ) THEN
                    pUpdateVorThema(curi.reg_id, curi.vorschriftid);
                    pck_ri.pResetVI(curi.vorschriftid);
                    --  T 1562  remove  LeadVKO if invalid
                    pUpdateLeadVKO (curi.vorschriftid); 
                END IF; 

             -- 19 fahrzeugklassen
                IF ( cur.column_value = 19 ) THEN
                    pUpdateVorFzgKlasse(curi.reg_id, curi.vorschriftid);
                END IF; 

            -- 20 Consolidates
                IF ( cur.column_value = 20 ) THEN
                    pUpdateGetexConsolidatesRelations(curi.vorschriftid);
                END IF;
                 -- regindexe-1600
                if ( l_diffsVorhanden > 0) then
                    UPDATE t_vorschrift
                    SET   INHALTLICH_SACHLICH_GEPRUEFT = 10    --( nicht gepr.)
                    WHERE vorschriftid = curi.vorschriftid;
                end if;
           END LOOP;
        END LOOP;
    END pMassenUpdateGetexListAttrs;




-- Relation update procedures


	PROCEDURE pUpdateGetexPredecessorRelations (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_target_key              VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid        NUMBER := 0;
        l_prev_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype            VARCHAR2(50);
        l_getex_v_key             VARCHAR2(64);
        l_vorschrift_getex_key    VARCHAR2(64);
        l_min_date_all_vehicles   DATE;
        l_min_date_new_types      DATE;
        l_type_all_new            VARCHAR2(32);
        lst_rel_type              VARCHAR2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev          VARCHAR2(250);
        l_ret_datum               NUMBER := 0;
        l_target_reg_number       VARCHAR2(250);
        l_reg_number              VARCHAR2(250);
        l_successorsincluded      VARCHAR2(32);
        l_multigroupid            VARCHAR2(64);
        list_to_del               VARCHAR2(1000);
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            regindexid
        INTO l_vorschrift_getex_key
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
                AND vr.relationtype IN (
                    'PREDECESSOR'
                )
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
         --  select instr('', 'IS_CHANGED_BY')  from dual; 
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;
            IF ( l_relationtype = 'PREDECESSOR' ) THEN
                --OR cur.relationtype = 'CONSOLIDATES'
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              10 AS beziehung_art, --           <- Predecessor
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art );
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        -- vorschrift       successor 
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR'
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
            l_target_key := cur_r.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur_r.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;
            -- 
            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
            USING (
                      SELECT
                          avorschriftid        AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                          10 AS beziehung_art,
                          l_tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                      FROM
                          dual
                  )
            src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                     AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                     AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
            WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
            SET homologation_serie = 0 --where nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 0)
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                beziehung_art )
            VALUES
                ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                  src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                  src.beziehung_art );
        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,
                                    'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND relationtype NOT IN (
                'CONSOLIDATES',
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO'
            );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden, except equi und demands
        FOR cur_d IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid    --1603 -- --'65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'
                AND beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
                 (
                    SELECT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                        AND ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES',
                                                    30, 'CHANGES', 60, 'LINKED_TO', 40,
                                                    'DEMANDS', 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    '') )
                )
                AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102,
                    20,
                    30,
                    60,
                    200
                ) );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    x.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
            )
         -- nur Successor betreffend
            AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102,
                20,
                30,
                60,
                200
            ) );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10,
                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid   -- v_id= '65f3e55329fdcf5349b2d2b5'
            AND relationtype IN (
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CONSOLIDATES', -- 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO'
            ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --1603 --
                AND beziehung_art = cur_dr.bez_art     -- in (10)   -- but
          -- -- nur betreffend successor
                AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102,
                    20,
                    30,
                    60,
                    200
                ) )
                AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                      1603
                 (
                    SELECT DISTINCT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key --  '65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'  
                        AND relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                                  30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 60, 'LINKED_FROM', 40,
                                                  'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                                  '') 
            -- OR relationtype =  decode(cur_dr.bez_art,  40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY_MULTI',   '')
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        -- nur Successor betreffend, exclude all other
            AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102,
                20,
                30,
                60,
                200
            ) )
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    y.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
    END pUpdateGetexPredecessorRelations;


    PROCEDURE pUpdateGetexLinkedRelations (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_vorschrift_getex_key   VARCHAR2(64);
        lst_rel_type             VARCHAR2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev         VARCHAR2(250);
        l_reg_number             VARCHAR2(250);
        list_to_del              VARCHAR2(1000);
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            regindexid
        INTO l_vorschrift_getex_key
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
                AND vr.relationtype IN (
                    'LINKED_FROM'
                )
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
            USING (
                      SELECT
                          avorschriftid          AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                          60 AS beziehung_art, --           <- LINKED_FROM
                          cur.tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid
                      FROM
                          dual
                  )
            src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                     AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                     AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                beziehung_art )
            VALUES
                ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                  src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                  src.beziehung_art );
        END LOOP;
        -- vorschrift       LINKED_TO 
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO'
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            -- 
            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
            USING (
                      SELECT
                          avorschriftid            AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                          60 AS beziehung_art,
                          cur_r.tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                      FROM
                          dual
                  )
            src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                     AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                     AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
            WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
            SET homologation_serie = 0 --where nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 0)
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                beziehung_art )
            VALUES
                ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                  src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                  src.beziehung_art );
        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,
                                    'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND relationtype NOT IN (
                'CONSOLIDATES',
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO'
            );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden, except equi und demands
        FOR cur_d IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid    --1603 -- --'65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'
                AND beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
                 (
                    SELECT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                        AND ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES',
                                                    30, 'CHANGES', 60, 'LINKED_TO', 40,
                                                    'DEMANDS', 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    '') )
                )
                AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102,
                    10,
                    20,
                    30,
                    200
                ) );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    x.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
            )
         -- nur Successor betreffend
            AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102,
                10,
                20,
                30,
                200
            ) );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10,
                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid   -- v_id= '65f3e55329fdcf5349b2d2b5'
            AND relationtype IN (
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO', --'CONSOLIDATES', 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO',
                'CONSOLIDATES'
            ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --1603 --
                AND beziehung_art = cur_dr.bez_art     -- in (10)   -- but
          -- -- nur betreffend Linked_to
                AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102,
                    10,
                    20,
                    30,
                    200
                ) )
                AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                      1603
                 (
                    SELECT DISTINCT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key --  '65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'  
                        AND relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                                  30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 60, 'LINKED_FROM', 40,
                                                  'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                                  '')
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        -- nur Linked_to betreffend, exclude all other
            AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102,
                10,
                20,
                30,
                200
            ) )
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    y.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
         -- decode ( y.column_value, 'CHANGES', 30,  'DEMANDS', 40, 
           --      'SUCCESSOR', 10, 'EQUIVALENT_TO',102,  'LINKED_TO', 60)
    END pUpdateGetexLinkedRelations;

    PROCEDURE pUpdateGetexChangeRelations (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_target_key              VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid        NUMBER := 0;
        l_prev_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype            VARCHAR2(50);
        l_getex_v_key             VARCHAR2(64);
        l_vorschrift_getex_key    VARCHAR2(64);
        l_min_date_all_vehicles   DATE;
        l_min_date_new_types      DATE;
        l_type_all_new            VARCHAR2(32);
        lst_rel_type              VARCHAR2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev          VARCHAR2(250);
        l_ret_datum               NUMBER := 0;
        l_target_reg_number       VARCHAR2(250);
        l_reg_number              VARCHAR2(250);
        l_successorsincluded      VARCHAR2(32);
        l_multigroupid            VARCHAR2(64);
        list_to_del               VARCHAR2(1000);
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            regindexid
        INTO l_vorschrift_getex_key
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
                AND vr.relationtype NOT IN (
                    'SUCCESSOR',
                    'CONSOLIDATES', --,
                    'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                    'CHANGES',
                    'DEMANDS',
                    'LINKED_TO'
                ) --
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
         --  select instr('', 'IS_CHANGED_BY')  from dual; 
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;
            IF ( l_relationtype = 'IS_CHANGED_BY' ) THEN
                --OR cur.relationtype = 'CONSOLIDATES'
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              decode(l_relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                     CASE
                                         WHEN instr(upper(l_target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                             30
                                         ELSE
                                             20
                                     END, 0) AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art );
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        -- vorschrift      changes or successor or demands 
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                multigroupid, --vr.SC_TYPE,  vr.SC_VEHICLETYPE, vr.SC_TOPICID, vr.SC_DATE,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype IN (
                    'CHANGES'
                ) --
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
            l_target_key := cur_r.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur_r.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;
            -- normal case , no multi
            IF ( l_relationtype = 'CHANGES' ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              decode(l_relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                     CASE
                                         WHEN instr(upper(l_target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                             30
                                         ELSE
                                             20
                                     END
                              ) AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET homologation_serie = 0 
                    --where   nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 10)
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art );
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        -- ? filtern die with multigroup  not null having ..
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,
                                    'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND relationtype NOT IN (
                'CONSOLIDATES',
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO'
            );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden, except equi und demands
        FOR cur_d IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid    --1603 -- --'65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'
                AND beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
                 (
                    SELECT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key   
              -- and relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR' )
                        AND ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES',
                                                    30, 'CHANGES', 60, 'LINKED_TO', 40,
                                                    'DEMANDS', 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    '') )
                )
                AND 
             --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
                 ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102,
                    10,
                    60,
                    200
                ) );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    x.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
            )
         --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            AND ( -- ADJUST_GETEX_EQUI_DEMANDS = 1  
               -- OR  (ADJUST_GETEX_EQUI_DEMANDS = 0 AND 
             beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102,
                10,
                60,
                200
            )
              --  )
             );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10,
                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid   -- v_id= '65f3e55329fdcf5349b2d2b5'
            AND relationtype IN (
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CONSOLIDATES',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO'
            ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --1603 --
                AND beziehung_art = cur_dr.bez_art     -- in (10)   -- but
          --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
                AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102,
                    10,
                    60,
                    200
                ) )
                AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                     
                 (
                    SELECT DISTINCT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key --  
                        AND relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                                  30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 60, 'LINKED_FROM', 40,
                                                  'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                                  '')
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102,
                10,
                60,
                200
            ) )
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    y.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
    END pUpdateGetexChangeRelations;

    --OLD --
 /*   PROCEDURE pUpdateGetexEquivalentRelations (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_target_key              VARCHAR2(64);

        l_prev_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype            VARCHAR2(50);

                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --

                    'SUCCESSOR',

                    'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                    'CHANGES',
                    'DEMANDS',

                tv.vorschriftid,

            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;
            IF ( l_relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY' AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'
            ) ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              102 AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              CASE
                                  WHEN nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' THEN
                                      10
                                  ELSE
                                      0
                              END AS homologation_serie
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET dest.homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie 
                    --where  (dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE is null or dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE != 10)
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art,
                    homologation_serie )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art,
                      src.homologation_serie );
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        -- vorschrift      
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                multigroupid, --vr.SC_TYPE,  vr.SC_VEHICLETYPE, vr.SC_TOPICID, vr.SC_DATE,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
              AND vr.relationtype IN ( 'EQUIVALENT_TO' ) --
            ORDER BY tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
            l_target_key := cur_r.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur_r.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;
            -- normal case , no multi
            IF ( cur_r.multigroupid is NULL  OR nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING ( SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              102 AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              decode ( nvl(cur_r.multigroupid, 0) , 0 , 0, 10 ) AS homologation_serie
                          FROM dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                    SET homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie   --where  nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 10
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                    INSERT (
                        vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                        nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                        beziehung_art,
                        homologation_serie )
                    VALUES
                        ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                          src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                          src.beziehung_art,
                          src.homologation_serie );
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        -- ? filtern die with multigroup  not null having ..
        SELECT listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                    CASE WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                             30
                                        ELSE 20
                                    END, 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,
                                    'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 
                                    'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND relationtype NOT IN (
                'CONSOLIDATES', 'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS',  'LINKED_TO'
            );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 

         -- only EQUIVALENT will be taken into account
        FOR cur_d IN (
            SELECT  x.column_value bez_art
            FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art     
              AND nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
              (
                    SELECT vorschriftid
                    FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                        AND ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES',
                                                    30, 'CHANGES', 60, 'LINKED_TO', 40, 'DEMANDS', -- 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                                                    200, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    '') 
                            OR  ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', '') 
                                 and (multigroupid is null or nvl(successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'))
                           )
              )
             AND (  beziehung_art not in (40,   10, 20, 30, 60, 200) );

            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                                SELECT  column_value
                                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
        list_to_del := '';
        --/////////// !AB check if necessary
            SELECT listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE  vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid   
             and beziehung_art not in ( -- !AB comment in
                select x.column_value  
                from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type , ':')  ) x  
              )
                AND  --beziehung_art = 102;
              (   beziehung_art not in (40,   10, 20, 30, 60, 200) );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        --\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\
        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                    CASE  WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                              30
                                        ELSE  20
                                    END, 'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10,
                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND relationtype IN ( 'SUCCESSOR',   'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES',  'DEMANDS', 'LINKED_TO', 'CONSOLIDATES'
            ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr IN (
            SELECT x.column_value bez_art
            FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT   listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND beziehung_art =  cur_dr.bez_art     
               and ( beziehung_art not in (40,   10, 20, 30, 60) )
              AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                      
              (
                    SELECT DISTINCT vorschriftid
                    FROM   mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                      AND (relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                           30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 60, 'LINKED_FROM', 40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY',-- 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY',
                                            200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', '')
                           OR  ( relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', '') 
                                and (multigroupid is null or nvl(successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'))
                   )
              );

            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE   vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE  vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT  listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE  nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND beziehung_art = 102
        -- and (      beziehung_art not in (40, 10, 20, 30, 60) )
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT y.column_value
                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT column_value
                FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT column_value
                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
    END pUpdateGetexEquivalentRelations;
*/

-- NEW --
PROCEDURE pUpdateGetexEquivalentRelations (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_target_key              VARCHAR2(64);
        l_prev_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
