        l_getex_v_key             VARCHAR2(64);
        l_vorschrift_getex_key    VARCHAR2(64);
        lst_rel_type              VARCHAR2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev          VARCHAR2(250);
        l_ret_datum               NUMBER := 0;
        l_reg_number              VARCHAR2(250);
        list_to_del               VARCHAR2(1000);
        l_vor_ref_vor_id          NUMBER :=0;
        l_co                     NUMBER :=0;

    BEGIN
        SELECT
            regindexid
        INTO l_vorschrift_getex_key
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift              tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  -- 
                AND vr.relationtype  IN ( 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY'  ) --
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
         --  select instr('', 'IS_CHANGED_BY')  from dual; 
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            --l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;

            IF ( cur.relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY' AND ( cur.multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(cur.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'
            ) ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              102 AS beziehung_art,
                               cur.tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              CASE
                                  WHEN nvl(cur.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' THEN
                                      10
                                  ELSE
                                      0
                              END AS homologation_serie
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET dest.homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie 
                    --where  (dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE is null or dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE != 10)
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art,
                    homologation_serie )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art,
                      src.homologation_serie );

           -- returning vorschrift_ref_vorschrifid  into l_vors_ref_vors_id;
                BEGIN
                    select vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid 
                      into l_vor_ref_vor_id
                    from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
                    where beziehung_art = 102 
                    and nachfolger_vorschriftid =   cur.tar_vorschriftid
                    and vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
                EXCEPTION
                   when  NO_DATA_FOUND then
                    l_vor_ref_vor_id := 0; 
                END;

                -- Insert  in vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
                 select count(*) into l_co from MV_getex_THEMA_SCENARIO where v_id = l_target_key;
                if (l_vor_ref_vor_id > 0 
                     and l_co > 0  -- themen für nachfolger existieren
                 ) then
                    FOR cur_t IN ( select distinct v_id, sc_thema, --sc_type, sc_datum, sc_year, sc_fahrzeug_typ, 
                                  regindex_themaid 
                                 from MV_getex_THEMA_SCENARIO gts
                                 join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid = gts.v_id )
                                 where v.vorschriftid =  cur.tar_vorschriftid    
                    ) LOOP
                    --select * v_id, sc_themaid, sc_type_sc_datum, sc_year, sc_fahrzeug_typfrom MV_getex_THEMA_SCENARIO
                  --  cu_t.regindex_themaid  -> themaid
                  --  avorschriftid -> 
                   -- select * from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_Thema
                    merge into t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_Thema dest
                    USING ( SELECT
                            l_vor_ref_vor_id as vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid ,  
                           cur_t.regindex_themaid  as themaid
                         FROM dual
                      )
                      src ON ( src.vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid = dest.vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid
                         AND src.themaid = dest.themaid
                       )
                     --  WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                      --     set geloescht = 0
                       WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                           INSERT (
                             vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid,
                             themaid,
                             status_verknuepfung,
                             letzte_aenderung_datum,
                             geloescht
                           )
                           values(
                             src.vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid,
                             src.themaid,
                             1,
                             sysdate,
                             0
                           );
                    END LOOP;
                end if;

            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        -- vorschrift      
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                multigroupid, 
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
              AND vr.relationtype IN ( 'EQUIVALENT_TO' ) --
            ORDER BY tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
            l_target_key := cur_r.targetid;
           -- l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
             -- l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;
            -- normal case , no multi
            IF ( cur_r.multigroupid is NULL  OR nvl(cur_r.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING ( SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              102 AS beziehung_art,
                               cur_r.tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              decode ( nvl(cur_r.multigroupid, 0) , 0 , 0, 10 ) AS homologation_serie
                          FROM dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                    SET homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie   --where  nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 10
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                    INSERT (
                        vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                        nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                        beziehung_art,
                        homologation_serie )
                    VALUES
                        ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                          src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                          src.beziehung_art,
                          src.homologation_serie ); 

                --returning vorschrift_ref_vorschrifid  into l_vors_ref_vors_id;
                BEGIN
                    select vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid 
                      into l_vor_ref_vor_id
                    from t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift 
                    where beziehung_art = 102 
                    and nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid 
                    and vorgaenger_vorschriftid =  cur_r.tar_vorschriftid ;
                EXCEPTION
                   when  NO_DATA_FOUND then
                    l_vor_ref_vor_id := 0; 
                END;

                -- Insert in vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
                select count(*) into l_co from MV_getex_THEMA_SCENARIO where v_id = l_getex_v_key;
                if (l_vor_ref_vor_id > 0   --
                     and l_co >0  -- themen für nachfolger existieren
                 ) then
                    FOR cur_t IN ( select distinct v_id, sc_thema, --sc_type, sc_datum, sc_year, sc_fahrzeug_typ, 
                              regindex_themaid 
                                 from MV_getex_THEMA_SCENARIO gts
                                 join t_vorschrift v on (v.regindexid = gts.v_id)
                                 where v.vorschriftid = avorschriftid    
                    ) LOOP

                    MERGE INTO T_VORSCHRIFT_REF_VORSCHRIFT_REF_THEMA dest
                    USING ( SELECT
                            l_vor_ref_vor_id as vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid ,  
                           cur_t.regindex_themaid  as themaid
                         FROM dual
                      )
                      src ON ( src.vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid = dest.vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid
                         AND src.themaid = dest.themaid
                       )
                      -- WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                       --    set geloescht = 0
                       WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                           INSERT (
                             vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid,
                             themaid,
                             status_verknuepfung,
                             letzte_aenderung_datum,
                             geloescht
                           )
                           VALUES(
                             src.vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid,
                             src.themaid,
                             1,
                             sysdate,
                             0
                           );
                    END LOOP;
                end if;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        -- ? filtern die with multigroup  not null having ..
        SELECT listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                    CASE WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                             30
                                        ELSE 20
                                    END, 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,
                                    'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 
                                    'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND relationtype NOT IN (
                'CONSOLIDATES', 'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS',  'LINKED_TO'
            );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 

         -- only EQUIVALENT will be taken into account
        FOR cur_d IN (
            SELECT  x.column_value bez_art
            FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art     
              AND nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
              (
                    SELECT vorschriftid
                    FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                        AND ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES',
                                                    30, 'CHANGES', 60, 'LINKED_TO', 40, 'DEMANDS', -- 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                                                    200, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    '') 
                            OR  ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', '') 
                                 and (multigroupid is null or nvl(successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'))
                           )
              )
             AND (  beziehung_art not in (40,   10, 20, 30, 60, 200) );

            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                                SELECT  column_value
                                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
        list_to_del := '';
        --/////////// !AB check if necessary
            SELECT listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE  vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid   
             and beziehung_art not in ( -- !AB comment in
                select x.column_value  
                from table ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type , ':')  ) x  
              )
                AND  --beziehung_art = 102;
              (   beziehung_art not in (40,   10, 20, 30, 60, 200) );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        --\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\
        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                    CASE  WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                              30
                                        ELSE  20
                                    END, 'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10,
                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND relationtype IN ( 'SUCCESSOR',   'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES',  'DEMANDS', 'LINKED_TO', 'CONSOLIDATES'
            ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr IN (
            SELECT x.column_value bez_art
            FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT   listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND beziehung_art =  cur_dr.bez_art     
               and ( beziehung_art not in (40,   10, 20, 30, 60) )
              AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                      
              (
                    SELECT DISTINCT vorschriftid
                    FROM   mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                      AND (relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                           30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 60, 'LINKED_FROM', 40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY',-- 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY',
                                            200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', '')
                           OR  ( relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', '') 
                                and (multigroupid is null or nvl(successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'))
                   )
              );

            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE   vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE  vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT  listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE  nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND beziehung_art = 102
        -- and (      beziehung_art not in (40, 10, 20, 30, 60) )
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT y.column_value
                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT column_value
                FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT column_value
                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
       -- 1728 set status für evtl. ungültige Equivalent Verkn. (wegen außerkraft/ nicht mehr anwendbar der Nachfolger)
        pck_ri.pMarkObsoleteRelations(avorschriftid);
    END pUpdateGetexEquivalentRelations;


	--Demands-Verknüpfungen massenupdate vom GETEX
    PROCEDURE pUpdateGetexDemandsRelations (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER

    ) AS
        l_target_key              VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid        NUMBER := 0;
        l_prev_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype            VARCHAR2(50);
        l_getex_v_key             VARCHAR2(64);
        l_vorschrift_getex_key    VARCHAR2(64);
        l_min_date_all_vehicles   DATE;
        l_min_date_new_types      DATE;
        l_type_all_new            VARCHAR2(32);
        lst_rel_type              VARCHAR2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev          VARCHAR2(250);
        l_ret_datum               NUMBER := 0;
        l_target_reg_number       VARCHAR2(250);
        l_reg_number              VARCHAR2(250);
        l_successorsincluded      VARCHAR2(32);
        l_multigroupid            VARCHAR2(64);
        list_to_del               VARCHAR2(1000);
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            regindexid
        INTO l_vorschrift_getex_key
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
             AND vr.relationtype NOT IN ( 'SUCCESSOR', 'CONSOLIDATES', 'CONSOLIDATES', 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS' ) --
            ORDER BY tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
           -- l_relationtype := cur.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;

              -- IS_DEMANDED_BY :  Immer 
            IF ( ( cur.relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY' ) AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'
            ) ) THEN
                --bestimme datum für PCV, wenn null dann für INDEPENDENT
                l_ret_datum := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(avorschriftid, l_target_key, l_relationtype, l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types
                );
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                        SELECT avorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                            40   AS beziehung_art,
                            l_tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                            CASE WHEN nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' THEN  10
                                 ELSE  0  END AS homologation_serie
                          FROM dual
                      ) src
                    ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie,
                    datum_neue_typen = l_min_date_new_types,
                    datum_alle_typen = l_min_date_all_vehicles
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (  vorgaenger_vorschriftid,     nachfolger_vorschriftid,    beziehung_art,
                     homologation_serie,   datum_neue_typen,     datum_alle_typen )
                VALUES( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid, src.nachfolger_vorschriftid, src.beziehung_art,
                   src.homologation_serie, l_min_date_new_types, l_min_date_all_vehicles );
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

        -- vorschrift       or demands 
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                multigroupid, --vr.SC_TYPE,  vr.SC_VEHICLETYPE, vr.SC_TOPICID, vr.SC_DATE,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift            tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
             AND vr.relationtype IN ( 'DEMANDS' ) --
            ORDER by tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
            l_target_key := cur_r.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            --l_relationtype := cur_r.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;

            -- DEMANDS :
             --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            IF ( ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' OR l_multigroupid IS NULL ) -- ignore relations with multigroup having l_successorsincluded=false
             ) THEN
                --bestimme datum für PCV, wenn null dann für INDEPENDENT
                l_ret_datum := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(l_tar_vorschriftid, l_getex_v_key, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY', l_min_date_all_vehicles
                , l_min_date_new_types);
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (  SELECT  avorschriftid        AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              40 AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              CASE WHEN nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' THEN 10
                                  ELSE  0
                              END AS homologation_serie
                          FROM  dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie,
                    datum_neue_typen = l_min_date_new_types,
                    datum_alle_typen = l_min_date_all_vehicles
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art,
                    homologation_serie,
                    datum_neue_typen,
                    datum_alle_typen )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art,
                      src.homologation_serie,
                      l_min_date_new_types,
                      l_min_date_all_vehicles );
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        -- ? filtern die with multigroup  not null having ..
        SELECT listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                    CASE  WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN 30
                                        ELSE 20
                                    END, 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,
                                    'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200, 0), 
                         ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE  vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND relationtype NOT IN (  'CONSOLIDATES', 'SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CHANGES', 'DEMANDS','LINKED_TO' );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden, except equi und demands
        FOR cur_d IN (
            SELECT  x.column_value bez_art
            FROM   TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM  t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art
              AND nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
               (
                    SELECT vorschriftid
                    FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                     AND ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES',
                                                    30, 'CHANGES', 60, 'LINKED_TO', --40, 'DEMANDS', 
                                                    102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    '')
                          OR  ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 40, 'DEMANDS', '') 
                                and (multigroupid is null or nvl(successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'))
                    )
              )
              AND --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
                 ( beziehung_art NOT IN (  102, 10,  20, 30, 60, 200 ) );

            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
          AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT  x.column_value
                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
          )
          AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN ( 102, 10, 20, 30, 60,  200 ) );

        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT column_value
                FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT column_value
                FROM  TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                    CASE WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN 30
                                        ELSE 20
                                    END, 'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10,
                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES', 200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE   vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        AND relationtype IN ('SUCCESSOR', 'EQUIVALENT_TO','CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS', 'CONSOLIDATES','LINKED_TO' ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr IN (
            SELECT  x.column_value bez_art
            FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT  listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE   nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND beziehung_art = cur_dr.bez_art
              AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (102, 10,  20, 30, 60  ) )
              AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN  (
                    SELECT DISTINCT   vorschriftid
                    FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE  targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                    AND (relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                                  30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 60, 'LINKED_FROM', -- 40,'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 
                                                  102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                                  '')
                         OR ( relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY', '') 
                                and (multigroupid is null or nvl(successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'))
                    )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT column_value
                    FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT  column_value
                    FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM  t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE  nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
         AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                102,  10, 20, 30, 60, 200 ) 
         )
         AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT  y.column_value
                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y
         );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT  column_value
                FROM TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT column_value
                FROM   TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        -- 1728 set status f. evtl. ungültige Equivalent Verkn. (wegen außerkraft/ nicht mehr anwendbar der Nachfolger)
        pck_ri.pMarkObsoleteRelations(avorschriftid);

    END pUpdateGetexDemandsRelations;



	PROCEDURE pUpdateGetexConsolidatesRelations (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_vorschrift_getex_key   VARCHAR2(64);
        lst_rel_type             VARCHAR2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev         VARCHAR2(250);
        l_target_reg_number      VARCHAR2(250);
        l_reg_number             VARCHAR2(250);
        list_to_del              VARCHAR2(1000);
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            regindexid
        INTO l_vorschrift_getex_key
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  -- 23342
                AND vr.relationtype IN (
                    'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN'
                ) --
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            IF ( cur.relationtype = 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN' ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid          AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              decode(cur.relationtype, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200, 0) AS beziehung_art,
                              cur.tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art );
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        -- vorschrift       consolidates
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype IN (
                    'CONSOLIDATES'
                )
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
            USING (
                      SELECT
                          avorschriftid            AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                          200 AS beziehung_art,
                          cur_r.tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                      FROM
                          dual
                  )
            src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                     AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                     AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
            WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
            SET homologation_serie = 0 
                --where   nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 10)
            WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                beziehung_art )
            VALUES
                ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                  src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                  src.beziehung_art );
        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,
                                    'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid   --23342 -
            AND relationtype NOT IN (
                'CONSOLIDATES',
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO'
            );


        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 
        --!AB  kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden, except equi und demands
        FOR cur_d IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid    --23342 -- --'65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'
                AND beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
                 (
                    SELECT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key
                        AND ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES',
                                                    30, 'CHANGES', 60, 'LINKED_TO', 40,
                                                    'DEMANDS', 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    '') )
                )
                AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102,
                    20,
                    30,
                    10,
                    60
                ) );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    x.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
            )
            AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102,
                10,
                60,
                20,
                30
            ) );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10,
                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid   -- v_id= '65f3e55329fdcf5349b2d2b5'
            AND relationtype IN (
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CONSOLIDATES', -- 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO'
            ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --1603 --
                AND beziehung_art = cur_dr.bez_art     -- in (10)   -- but
                AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102,
                    20,
                    30,
                    10,
                    60
                ) )
                AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                     
                 (
                    SELECT DISTINCT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key --  
                        AND relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                                  30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 60, 'LINKED_FROM', 40,
                                                  'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                                  '')
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND ( beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102,
                20,
                30,
                10,
                60
            ) )
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    y.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
    END pUpdateGetexConsolidatesRelations;



	PROCEDURE pUpdateGetexVerknuepRelations (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_target_key              VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid        NUMBER := 0;
        l_prev_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype            VARCHAR2(50);
        l_getex_v_key             VARCHAR2(64);
        l_vorschrift_getex_key    VARCHAR2(64);
        l_min_date_all_vehicles   DATE;
        l_min_date_new_types      DATE;
        l_type_all_new            VARCHAR2(32);
        lst_rel_type              VARCHAR2(250);
        lst_rel_type_rev          VARCHAR2(250);
        l_ret_datum               NUMBER := 0;
        l_target_reg_number       VARCHAR2(250);
        l_reg_number              VARCHAR2(250);
        l_successorsincluded      VARCHAR2(32);
        l_multigroupid            VARCHAR2(64);
        list_to_del               VARCHAR2(1000);
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            regindexid
        INTO l_vorschrift_getex_key
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
                AND vr.relationtype NOT IN (
                    'SUCCESSOR',
                    'CONSOLIDATES', --'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                    'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                    'CHANGES',
                    'DEMANDS',
                    'LINKED_TO'
                ) --
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
         --  select instr('', 'IS_CHANGED_BY')  from dual; 
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;
            IF ( l_relationtype IN (
                'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                'PREDECESSOR',
                'LINKED_FROM',
                'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN'
            ) ) THEN
                --OR cur.relationtype = 'CONSOLIDATES'
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              decode(l_relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                     CASE
                                         WHEN instr(upper(l_target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                             30
                                         ELSE
                                             20
                                     END, 'PREDECESSOR', 10, 'LINKED_FROM', 60,
                                     'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 200, 0) AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art );
            -- !?!-1 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            ELSIF ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1 AND l_relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY' AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl
            (l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              102 AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              CASE
                                  WHEN nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' THEN
                                      10
                                  ELSE
                                      0
                              END AS homologation_serie
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET dest.homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie 
                    --where  (dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE is null or dest.HOMOLOGATION_SERIE != 10)
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art,
                    homologation_serie )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art,
                      src.homologation_serie );
              /* */
            END IF;

              -- IS_DEMANDED_BY :  Immer 
             --!?!-2 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            IF ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1 AND ( l_relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY' ) AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(l_successorsincluded
            , 'false') = 'true' ) ) THEN
                --bestimme datum für PCV, wenn null dann für INDEPENDENT
                l_ret_datum := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(avorschriftid, l_target_key, l_relationtype, l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types
                );
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              40 AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              CASE
                                  WHEN nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' --'IS_DEMANDED_BY_MULTI' = l_relationtype 
                                   THEN
                                      10
                                  ELSE
                                      0
                              END AS homologation_serie
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie,
                    datum_neue_typen = l_min_date_new_types,
                    datum_alle_typen = l_min_date_all_vehicles
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art,
                    homologation_serie,
                    datum_neue_typen,
                    datum_alle_typen )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art,
                      src.homologation_serie,
                      l_min_date_new_types,
                      l_min_date_all_vehicles );
            END IF;

        END LOOP;
        -- vorschrift      changes or successor or demands or LINKED_TO
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                vr.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                multigroupid, --vr.SC_TYPE,  vr.SC_VEHICLETYPE, vr.SC_TOPICID, vr.SC_DATE,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            WHERE
                vr.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
                AND vr.relationtype IN (
                    'SUCCESSOR',
                    'CONSOLIDATES', --'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                    'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                    'CHANGES',
                    'DEMANDS',
                    'LINKED_TO'
                ) -- !AB!Lin
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
            l_target_key := cur_r.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur_r.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;
            -- normal case , no multi
            IF ( l_relationtype IN (
                'CHANGES',
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'LINKED_TO',
                'CONSOLIDATES'
            ) 
               --!AB  !?!-3 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
             OR ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1 AND ( l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO' AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL AND nvl(l_successorsincluded
            , 'false') != 'true' ) ) ) ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              decode(l_relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                     CASE
                                         WHEN instr(upper(l_target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                             30
                                         ELSE
                                             20
                                     END, 'SUCCESSOR', 10, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102,
                                     'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES', 200, 0) AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET homologation_serie = 0 
                    --where   nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 10)
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art );
        --!AB !?!-4 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            ELSIF ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1 AND ( l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO' AND nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') =
            'true' ) ) THEN
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              102 AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              10 AS homologation_serie
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET homologation_serie = 10 --where  nvl(HOMOLOGATION_SERIE,0) != 10
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art,
                    homologation_serie )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art,
                      src.homologation_serie );
          /**/
            END IF;

            -- DEMANDS :
             --!AB !?!-5 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            IF ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1 AND ( l_relationtype = 'DEMANDS' ) AND ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'
            OR l_multigroupid IS NULL ) -- ignore relations with multigroup having l_successorsincluded=false
             ) THEN
                --bestimme datum für PCV, wenn null dann für INDEPENDENT
                l_ret_datum := PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(l_tar_vorschriftid, l_getex_v_key, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY', l_min_date_all_vehicles
                , l_min_date_new_types);
                MERGE INTO t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift dest
                USING (
                          SELECT
                              avorschriftid        AS nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                              40 AS beziehung_art,
                              l_tar_vorschriftid   AS vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                              CASE
                                  WHEN nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'  --'DEMANDS_MULTI' = l_relationtype 
                                   THEN
                                      10
                                  ELSE
                                      0
                              END AS homologation_serie
                          FROM
                              dual
                      )
                src ON ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = dest.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.nachfolger_vorschriftid = dest.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                         AND src.beziehung_art = dest.beziehung_art )
                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
                SET homologation_serie = src.homologation_serie,
                    datum_neue_typen = l_min_date_new_types,
                    datum_alle_typen = l_min_date_all_vehicles
                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
                INSERT (
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                    beziehung_art,
                    homologation_serie,
                    datum_neue_typen,
                    datum_alle_typen )
                VALUES
                    ( src.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                      src.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                      src.beziehung_art,
                      src.homologation_serie,
                      l_min_date_new_types,
                      l_min_date_all_vehicles );
            END IF;
         /**/
        END LOOP;

        --  delete aus der Regindex nicht vorhandene Verknüpf. ----
        -- ? filtern die with multigroup  not null having ..
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'LINKED_FROM', 60, 'PREDECESSOR', 10,
                                    'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid
            AND relationtype NOT IN (
                'CONSOLIDATES',
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO'
            );
              -- wenn 20 and 30 enthalten  

        -- 1. DELETE Beziehungen mit typen aus GETEX list of relations , zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden 
        --!AB   kommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden, except equi und demands
        FOR cur_d IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid    --1603 -- --'65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'
                AND beziehung_art = cur_d.bez_art
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                   
                 (
                    SELECT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key   
              -- and relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR' )
                        AND ( relationtype = decode(cur_d.bez_art, 10, 'SUCCESSOR', 20, 'CHANGES',
                                                    30, 'CHANGES', 60, 'LINKED_TO', 40,
                                                    'DEMANDS', 102, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 200, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                                    '') )
                )
                AND 
             --!AB !?!-6 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
                 ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1
                      OR ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 0
                           AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102
                ) ) );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --DELETE  all relation in regindex  where  Vorschrift as Vorgänger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
         -- wg Constraint
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    x.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type, ':') ) x
            )
         --!AB !?!-7 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            AND ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1
                  OR ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 0
                       AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102
            ) ) );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );

        --  ? filtern die relations mit multigroup not null  und l_successorsincluded =false  ?
        SELECT
            listagg(DISTINCT decode(relationtype, 'CHANGES',
                                    CASE
                                        WHEN instr(upper(l_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1 THEN
                                            30
                                        ELSE
                                            20
                                    END, 'DEMANDS', 40, 'SUCCESSOR', 10,
                                    'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'LINKED_TO', 60, 'CONSOLIDATES',
                                    200, 0), ':')
        INTO lst_rel_type_rev
        FROM
            mv_getex_vorschrift_relation vr
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid   -- v_id= '65f3e55329fdcf5349b2d2b5'
            AND relationtype IN (
                'SUCCESSOR',
                'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                'CHANGES',
                'DEMANDS',
                'LINKED_TO',
                'CONSOLIDATES'
            ); 

        -- 2. DELETE beziehungen (als Nachfolger) mit typen aus GETEX list of relations, zu den vorschriften, die in GETEX als relation nicht vorhanden
        FOR cur_dr IN (
            SELECT
                x.column_value bez_art
            FROM
                TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) x
        ) LOOP
            list_to_del := '';
            SELECT
                listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
            INTO list_to_del
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --1603 --
                AND beziehung_art = cur_dr.bez_art     -- in (10)   -- but
          --!AB !?!-8 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
                AND ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1
                      OR ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 0
                           AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                    40,
                    102
                ) ) )
                AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid NOT IN                       --                      1603
                 (
                    SELECT DISTINCT
                        vorschriftid
                    FROM
                        mv_getex_vorschrift_relation
                    WHERE
                        targetid = l_vorschrift_getex_key --  '65aa19ad713d341396e1e001'  
            --and relationtype = 'PREDECESSOR' 
                        AND relationtype = decode(cur_dr.bez_art, 10, 'PREDECESSOR', 20, 'IS_CHANGED_BY',
                                                  30, 'IS_CHANGED_BY', 60, 'LINKED_FROM', 40,
                                                  'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 102, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 200, 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN',
                                                  '') 
            -- OR relationtype =  decode(cur_dr.bez_art,  40, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY_MULTI',   '')
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
            DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT
                        column_value
                    FROM
                        TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
                );
        END LOOP;

        --!!! DELETE  all relation in regindex where Vorschr as Nachfolger  and beziehung_art not in the GETEX list of relations
        list_to_del := '';
        SELECT
            listagg(vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid, ':')
        INTO list_to_del
        FROM
            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
        --!AB !?!-9 unkommentiert nach Absprache mit Kunden
            AND ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 1
                  OR ( adjust_getex_equi_demands = 0
                       AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                40,
                102
            ) ) )
            AND beziehung_art NOT IN (
                SELECT
                    y.column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split(lst_rel_type_rev, ':') ) y
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift_ref_thema
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschrift_ref_vorschriftid IN (
                SELECT
                    column_value
                FROM
                    TABLE ( apex_string.split_numbers(list_to_del, ':') )
            );
         -- decode ( y.column_value, 'CHANGES', 30,  'DEMANDS', 40, 
           --      'SUCCESSOR', 10, 'EQUIVALENT_TO',102,   LINKED_TO',60)
        -- Update status für evtl. geänderrte    DEMAND, EQUIVALENT verkn
        pck_ri.pMarkObsoleteRelations(aVorschriftID);

    END pUpdateGetexVerknuepRelations;



	/*   A L T  -------
	  Speicherung von Einsatzdatumsangaben differenziert nach Themengebieten
	*/
 /* PROCEDURE pLoadGetexThemaEinsatzDaten AS
    BEGIN
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_thema_ref_einsatzdatum_typ;
        COMMIT;
        INSERT INTO t_vorschrift_ref_thema_ref_einsatzdatum_typ (
            vorschriftid,
            themaid,
            einsatzdatum_typid,
            einsatzdatum,
            modeljahr,
            letzte_aenderung_datum
        )
            SELECT
                v.vorschriftid,  --  g.V_ID, g.SC_THEMAID, g.SC_TYPE,   --g.sc_year as jahr,
                t.themaid,
                e.einsatzdatum_typid,
                trunc(g.sc_datum) AS einsatzdatum,
                nvl2(g.sc_year, to_date(g.sc_year, 'yyyy'), NULL),
                sysdate
            FROM
                v_getex_thema_scenario   g
                INNER JOIN t_vorschrift             v ON g.v_id = v.regindexid
                INNER JOIN t_thema                  t ON g.regindex_themaid = t.themaid  -- Updated JOIN condition as per new requirement
                INNER JOIN t_einsatzdatum_typ       e ON g.sc_type = e.mapping_getex
            WHERE
                ( g.sc_fahrzeug_typ = 'PCV'
                  OR g.sc_fahrzeug_typ = 'INDEPENDENT' )
            ORDER BY
                v.vorschriftid,
                t.themaid,
                e.einsatzdatum_typid;
    END pLoadGetexThemaEinsatzDaten;
*/

/*
*  N E U   --
*/
PROCEDURE pLoadGetexThemaEinsatzDaten AS
    BEGIN
        -- Clear the table for a full refresh.
        DELETE FROM t_vorschrift_ref_thema_ref_einsatzdatum_typ;
        COMMIT;

        -- The INSERT statement now includes FAHRZEUGKLASSEID
        INSERT INTO t_vorschrift_ref_thema_ref_einsatzdatum_typ (
            vorschriftid,
            themaid,
            einsatzdatum_typid,
            fahrzeugklasseid, -- fahrzeugklasseid column
            einsatzdatum,
            modeljahr,
            letzte_aenderung_datum
        )
        SELECT
            v.vorschriftid,
            t.themaid,
            e.einsatzdatum_typid,
            -- Correctly handle 'INDEPENDENT' vs. specific vehicle classes
            /*CASE
                WHEN g.sc_fahrzeug_typ = 'INDEPENDENT' THEN NULL
                ELSE fk.fahrzeugklasseid
            END AS fahrzeugklasseid,*/
            fk.fahrzeugklasseid,
            trunc(g.sc_datum) AS einsatzdatum,
            nvl2(g.sc_year, to_date(g.sc_year, 'yyyy'), NULL) AS modeljahr,
            sysdate AS letzte_aenderung_datum
        FROM
            v_getex_thema_scenario   g
            INNER JOIN t_vorschrift             v ON g.v_id = v.regindexid
            INNER JOIN t_thema                  t ON g.regindex_themaid = t.themaid
            INNER JOIN t_einsatzdatum_typ       e ON g.sc_type = e.mapping_getex
            -- This join maps the GETEX text to the internal ID
            LEFT JOIN t_fahrzeugklasse         fk ON g.sc_fahrzeug_typ = fk.mapping_getex
        WHERE
            g.sc_fahrzeug_typ IS NOT NULL;

    END pLoadGetexThemaEinsatzDaten;


	PROCEDURE pAbgleichRegIndexVomGetex (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) AS
        l_regindex_key      VARCHAR2(64);
        l_count             NUMBER := 0;
        l_vorschrifttypid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske NUMBER := 0;
        l_diffsVorhanden   NUMBER := 0;   --  != 0   falls differenzen vorhanden in bestimmten attributen ( Anf.1600)
        l_model number;
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            regindexid, getex_vergleich_bitmaske
        INTO l_regindex_key, l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske
        FROM
            t_vorschrift
        WHERE
            vorschriftid = avorschriftid;

        IF ( l_regindex_key IS NOT NULL ) THEN

          l_diffsVorhanden := bitand( nvl(l_getex_vergleich_bitmaske, 0), power(2,0)+  power(2,5)+ power(2,6)
