            , 'false') = 'true' )  --!AB evtl trennen l_multigroupid =null / l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'
             ) THEN
			-- gibt es diese Verknüpfung in Regindex? ---
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 40;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 43;       -- beziehung_artid 40 not in Regindex
                ELSE                --if (l_relationtype = 'DEMANDS_MULTI') then
                    IF ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                        SELECT
                            homologation_serie
                        INTO l_homolog_serie
                        FROM
                            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE
                            nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                            AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                            AND beziehung_art = 40;
                        IF ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 10 ) THEN
                            RETURN 44; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex  for beziehung_artid 40 (not _multi)
                        END IF; -- für multi
				-- !AB added
                    ELSIF ( l_multigroupid IS NULL ) THEN
                        SELECT
                            homologation_serie
                        INTO l_homolog_serie
                        FROM
                            t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE
                            nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                            AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                            AND beziehung_art = 40;
                        IF ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 0 ) THEN
                            RETURN 51; -- homolog_serie !=0 in regindex  for beziehung_artid 40 which is not multi in Getex 
                        END IF; -- für not multi
                    END IF;
                END IF;
            -- check datumsangaben!!
                IF ( 0 = PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(avorschriftid, l_target_key, l_relationtype, l_min_date_all_vehicles
                , l_min_date_new_types) ) THEN
			-- Mindestens ein datum ist nicht null   -- vergleich mit datum in regindex. 
                    SELECT
                        COUNT(*)
                    INTO l_count
                    FROM
                        t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                    WHERE
                        nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                        AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                        AND beziehung_art = 40
                        AND ( ( datum_alle_typen IS NULL
                                AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL
                                OR datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                                AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NULL
                                OR ( datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                                     AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL
                                     AND to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy'
                                     ) ) )
                              OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NULL
                                   AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL
                                   OR datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                                   AND l_min_date_new_types IS NULL
                                   OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                                        AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL
                                        AND to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy'
                                        ) ) ) );
                    IF ( l_count > 0 ) THEN
                        RETURN 45;   -- datums verstimmung bei check in erweiterung
                    END IF;
                END IF;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        loop_cnt := 0;

    -- 4:  Reverse check: für alle Verknüpfungen mit relationtyp --S  in Regindex,  vergleich Existenz in Getex  
        FOR curs IN (
            WITH cte AS (
                SELECT
                    tv_key.vorschriftid,
                    tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id ) -- !AB over getex key
                WHERE
                    tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid -- 
                    AND ( vr.relationtype IN (
                        'SUCCESSOR',
                        'CHANGES',
                        'LINKED_TO',
                        'CONSOLIDATES'
                    )
                          OR ( vr.relationtype IN (
                        'EQUIVALENT_TO',
                        'DEMANDS'
                    )
                               AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                                     OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) ) )
            )
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art,
                datum_alle_typen,
                datum_neue_typen,
                homologation_serie
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
                JOIN cte ON ( vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid
                              AND cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid )
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art IN (
                    10,
                    30,
                    20,
                    40,
                    60,
                    102,
                    200
                )
            ORDER BY
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            l_beziehung_artid := curs.beziehung_art;
            l_homolog_serie := curs.homologation_serie;
            l_min_date_all_vehicles := curs.datum_alle_typen;
            l_min_date_new_types := curs.datum_neue_typen;
            loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            IF ( l_beziehung_artid IN (
                10,
                30,
                20,
                60,
                200
            ) OR ( adjust_getex_equi_demands != 0 AND l_beziehung_artid IN (
                40,
                102
            ) 
                --and ( multigroupid is null or (nvl(successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true') )
             ) ) THEN
		-- check if the same exists in Regindex
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
                WHERE
                    tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND targetid = l_target_key
                    AND ( l_beziehung_artid = decode(vr.relationtype, 'SUCCESSOR', 10, 'LINKED_TO', 60,
                                                     'CONSOLIDATES', 200, 0) --
                          OR ( adjust_getex_equi_demands != 0
                               AND l_beziehung_artid = decode(vr.relationtype, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'DEMANDS', 40,
                                                              0)
                               AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                                     AND nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) = 0
                                     OR ( nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )
                                     AND nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) = 10 )-- wenn in Regindex mit homol =0 
                                      )
                          OR ( vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
                               AND ( ( instr(upper(vr.target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1
                                       AND l_beziehung_artid = 30 )
                                     OR l_beziehung_artid = 20 ) --!AB cor
                                      ) );      --'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN'
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 3005;  -- entsprechende Verknüpfung in GETEX nicht vorhanden
                END IF;
			-- Wenn Verknüpfung vorhanden , dann
				-- ein Vergleich der Unterschiede in Werten ist nicht notwendig, 
                -- weil es in vorherigen LOOP durchgeführt wurde.
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 0;
    END fCheckRelationDiff;




	FUNCTION fCheckEquivDemandDiff (
        avorschriftid   IN   NUMBER,
        aequiv          IN   NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER AS
   -- aequiv=1 check diff for  EQUIV ,   = 0  check diff for DEMANDS
        l_tar_vorschriftid        NUMBER := 0;
        l_target_key              VARCHAR2(50);
        l_relationtype            VARCHAR2(50);
        l_beziehung_artid         NUMBER := 0;
        l_min_date_all_vehicles   DATE;
        l_min_date_new_types      DATE;
        l_type_all_new            VARCHAR2(32);
        lst_rel_type              VARCHAR2(250);
        l_count                   NUMBER := 0;
        l_homolog_serie           NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_v_key             VARCHAR2(50);
        l_target_reg_number       VARCHAR2(250);
        l_reg_number              VARCHAR2(250);
        l_successorsincluded      VARCHAR2(32);
        l_multigroupid            VARCHAR2(64);
        loop_cnt                  NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
     -- für alle  verknüpfungen in Getex  vergleich existenz in Regindex 
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id ) -- !AB over getex key
            WHERE tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid  --436 
               -- and vr.relationtype NOT IN ( 'CONSOLIDATES', 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN', 'CHANGES', 'SUCCESSOR',
               --       'EQUIVALENT_TO', 'DEMANDS') --
                AND vr.relationtype = (
                    CASE WHEN aequiv = 1 THEN
                            'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY'
                        ELSE
                            'IS_DEMANDED_BY'
                    END
                )
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_relationtype := cur.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;
        -- vergleiche für die Verknüfungen, die keine Datums angaben haben
            IF ( aequiv = 1 --and ( l_relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY' ) 
             AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) ) ) THEN
            -- check if the same exists in Regindex
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*) --avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID,   --l_tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid
                INTO l_count
                FROM    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                  AND ( beziehung_art = 102 );
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 1;  -- keine verknüpfungen dieser art in regindex vorhanden
                ELSIF ( ( l_relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY' ) AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false'
                ) = 'true' ) ) ) THEN
                    SELECT       COUNT(*)
                    INTO l_count
                    FROM   t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                    WHERE  vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                      AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                      AND beziehung_art = 102;
                    IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                        RETURN 102;       -- 102 not in Regindex
                    ELSIF ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                        SELECT    homologation_serie
                        INTO l_homolog_serie
                        FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                            AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                            AND beziehung_art = 102;
                        IF ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 10 ) THEN
                            RETURN 121; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex   (not _multi)
                        END IF;
                     --!AB added
                    ELSE  -- no homologation
                        SELECT homologation_serie
                        INTO l_homolog_serie
                        FROM  t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                          AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                          AND beziehung_art = 102;
                        IF ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 0 ) THEN
                            RETURN 122; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex  obwohl keine höhere serie
                        END IF;
                    END IF;
                END IF;
            END IF;

        -- vergleiche für die Verknüfungen mit Datums angaben **********
        -- vergleich mit  is DEMANDED_BY
            IF ( nvl(aequiv, 0) = 0 AND ( l_relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY' ) AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR ( nvl(l_successorsincluded
            , 'false') = 'true' ) ) ) THEN
          -- gibt es diese Verknüpfung in Regindex ---
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 40;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 40;       -- beziehung_artid 40 not in Regindex
                ELSE
                   --if (l_relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY_MULTI') then
                    IF ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                        SELECT homologation_serie
                        INTO l_homolog_serie
                        FROM  t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                            AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                            AND beziehung_art = 40;
                        IF ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 10 ) THEN
                            RETURN 41; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex  for beziehung_artid 40 (not _multi)
                        END IF; -- fütr multi
                    ELSE -- no homolog. / l_multigroupid is null  !AB added
                        SELECT homologation_serie
                        INTO l_homolog_serie
                        FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                          AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                          AND beziehung_art = 40;
                        IF ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 0 ) THEN
                            RETURN 50; -- homolog_serie != 0 obwohl keine multigroup
                        END IF;
                    END IF;
             -- vergleiche Datum  für  typen
                   -- hole datum von Getex
                    IF ( 0 = PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(avorschriftid, l_target_key, l_relationtype, l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types
                    ) ) THEN
                 -- Mindestens ein datum ist nicht null
                 -- vergleich mit datum in regindex. 
                        SELECT  COUNT(*)
                        INTO l_count
                        FROM  t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE  vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                          AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                          AND beziehung_art = 40
                          AND ( ( datum_alle_typen IS NULL
                                    AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL
                                    OR datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                                    AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NULL
                                    OR ( datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                                         AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL
                                         AND to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy'
                                         ) ) )
                                  OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NULL
                                       AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL
                                       OR datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                                       AND l_min_date_new_types IS NULL
                                       OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                                            AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL
                                            AND to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy'
                                            ) ) ) );
                        IF ( l_count > 0 ) THEN
                            RETURN 42;   -- datums verstimmung
                        END IF;
                    END IF;

             -- l_min_date_all_vehicles date; -- l_min_date_new_types date; -- l_type_all_new varchar2(32);       
                END IF;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2: Reverse check: für alle Verknüpfungen in Regindex vergleich Existenz in Getex  
        FOR curs IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art,
                datum_alle_typen,
                datum_neue_typen,
                homologation_serie
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = (
                    CASE
                        WHEN ( nvl(aequiv, 0) = 1 ) THEN
                            102
                        ELSE
                            40
                    END
                )
            ORDER BY
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;
            l_beziehung_artid := curs.beziehung_art;
            l_homolog_serie := curs.homologation_serie;
            l_min_date_all_vehicles := curs.datum_alle_typen;
            l_min_date_new_types := curs.datum_neue_typen;
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;
            IF ( l_beziehung_artid IN (
                40,
                102
            ) ) THEN
                -- check if the same exists in GETEX
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                 JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
                WHERE tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND targetid = l_target_key
                  AND ( l_beziehung_artid = decode(vr.relationtype, 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY', 102, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY', 40,  0)
                  AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL  OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) );
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 2001;  -- entsprechende Verknüpfung in GETEX nicht vorhanden
                END IF;

                -- Wenn Verknüpfung vorhanden , dann
                 -- ein Vergleich der Unterschiede in Werten ist nicht notwendig, 
                -- weil es in vorherigen LOOP durchgeführt wurde.
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

  --***************** Erweiterung   ********************** --
   -- 3: wenn Vorschrift in einigen relations IN Getex als  Nachfolger 
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid       AS targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.reg_number,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id ) -- !AB over getex key
            WHERE  tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND vr.relationtype = (
                    CASE  WHEN ( nvl(aequiv, 0) = 1 ) THEN  'EQUIVALENT_TO'
                        ELSE 'DEMANDS'
                    END
                )
            ORDER BY tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_getex_v_key := cur_r.v_id;
            l_target_key := cur_r.targetid;
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_relationtype := cur_r.relationtype;
            l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            l_reg_number := cur_r.reg_number;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;
        -- v_id                     vorschriftid    targetid           Tar_vorschriftid
            IF ( l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO' AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )  -- !AB cor
             ) THEN
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 102;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 1000;
                END IF;
            END IF;
            IF ( l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO' AND ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) ) THEN
                SELECT COUNT(*) --avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID,   --l_tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid
                INTO l_count
                FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 102
                    AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 1102;   -- nicht vorhanden oder Homologation  falsch
                END IF;
            ELSIF ( l_relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'    -- !AB added
             AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL ) ) THEN  -- !AB cor  homologation =0
                SELECT     COUNT(*) --avorschriftid as vorgaenger_vorschriftID,   --l_tar_vorschriftid  as nachfolger_vorschriftid
                INTO l_count
                FROM   t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE   nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 102
                    AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 1110;   -- nicht vorhanden oder Homologation = true
                END IF;
            END IF;
        -- vergleiche für die Verknüfungen mit Datums angaben **********
        -- vergleich mit   DEMANDS
            IF ( ( l_relationtype = 'DEMANDS' ) AND ( l_multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )  --!AB evtl trennen l_multigroupid =null / l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true'
             ) THEN
          -- gibt es diese Verknüpfung in Regindex? ---
                SELECT  COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM  t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE  nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                  AND beziehung_art = 40;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 43;       -- beziehung_artid 40 not in Regindex
                ELSE                --if (l_relationtype = 'DEMANDS_MULTI') then
                    IF ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                        SELECT  homologation_serie
                        INTO l_homolog_serie
                        FROM  t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE  nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                          AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                          AND beziehung_art = 40;
                        IF ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 10 ) THEN
                            RETURN 44; -- homolog_serie !=10 in regindex  for beziehung_artid 40 (not _multi)
                        END IF; -- für multi
               -- !AB added
                    ELSIF ( l_multigroupid IS NULL ) THEN
                        SELECT homologation_serie
                        INTO l_homolog_serie
                        FROM    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                        WHERE nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                          AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                          AND beziehung_art = 40;
                        IF ( nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) != 0 ) THEN
                            RETURN 51; -- homolog_serie !=0 in regindex  for beziehung_artid 40 which is not multi in Getex 
                        END IF; -- für not multi
                    END IF;
                END IF;
            -- check datumsangaben!!
                IF ( 0 = PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(avorschriftid, l_target_key, l_relationtype, l_min_date_all_vehicles
                , l_min_date_new_types) ) THEN
             -- Mindestens ein datum ist nicht null   -- vergleich mit datum in regindex. 
                    SELECT  COUNT(*)
                    INTO l_count
                    FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                    WHERE    nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                      AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                      AND beziehung_art = 40
                      AND ( ( datum_alle_typen IS NULL
                                AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL
                                OR datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                                AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NULL
                                OR ( datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                                     AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL
                                     AND to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy'
                                     ) ) )
                              OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NULL
                                   AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL
                                   OR datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                                   AND l_min_date_new_types IS NULL
                                   OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                                        AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL
                                        AND to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy'
                                        ) ) ) );
                    IF ( l_count > 0 ) THEN
                        RETURN 45;   -- datums verstimmung bei check in erweiterung
                    END IF;
                END IF;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        loop_cnt := 0;

    -- 4:  Reverse check: für alle Verknüpfungen mit relationtyp --S  in Regindex,  vergleich Existenz in Getex  
        FOR curs IN (
            WITH cte AS (
                SELECT  tv_key.vorschriftid,
                    tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
                FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id ) -- !AB over getex key
                WHERE tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid -- 
                  AND ( vr.relationtype = (
                          CASE WHEN ( nvl(aequiv, 0) = 1 ) 
                               THEN 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
                               ELSE 'DEMANDS' END
                        )
                        AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                                OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) 
                 )
            )
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art,
                datum_alle_typen,
                datum_neue_typen,
                homologation_serie
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            JOIN cte ON ( vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid
                          AND cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid )
            WHERE  vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND vrv.beziehung_art = (
                    CASE WHEN ( nvl(aequiv, 0) = 1 ) 
                         THEN  102
                        ELSE 40 END
                )
            ORDER BY
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            l_beziehung_artid := curs.beziehung_art;
            l_homolog_serie := curs.homologation_serie;
            l_min_date_all_vehicles := curs.datum_alle_typen;
            l_min_date_new_types := curs.datum_neue_typen;
            loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
            SELECT regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM t_vorschrift
            WHERE  vorschriftid = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;  

          -- check if the same exists in Regindex
            SELECT COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE  tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND targetid = l_target_key
              AND ( l_beziehung_artid = decode(vr.relationtype, 'EQUIVALENT_TO', 102, 'DEMANDS', 40, 0)
                      AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                            AND nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) = 0
                            OR ( nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )
                            AND nvl(l_homolog_serie, 0) = 10 )-- wenn in Regindex mit homol =0 
                             );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 3005;  -- entsprechende Verknüpfung in GETEX nicht vorhanden
            END IF;
           -- Wenn Verknüpfung vorhanden , dann
                 -- ein Vergleich der Unterschiede in Werten ist nicht notwendig, 
                -- weil es in vorherigen LOOP durchgeführt wurde.
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 0;

    END fCheckEquivDemandDiff;



	FUNCTION fCheckSuccessorDiff (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER AS
        l_target_key         VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype       VARCHAR2(50);
        l_count              NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_v_key        VARCHAR2(50);
        loop_cnt             NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check: Check Getex to RegIndex
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'PREDECESSOR'
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
        -- Check if exists in RegIndex
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND beziehung_art = 10;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex  
        FOR curs IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 10
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'PREDECESSOR';
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2001;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
        FOR cursb IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 10
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR';
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2002;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype,
                tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR'
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND beziehung_art = 10;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1000;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
        loop_cnt := 0;
        FOR curs IN (
            WITH cte AS (
                SELECT
                    tv_key.vorschriftid,
                    tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
                WHERE
                    tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR'
            )
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
                JOIN cte ON ( vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid
                              AND cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid )
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 10
        ) LOOP
            loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'SUCCESSOR';
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 3005;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 0;
    END fCheckSuccessorDiff;


	FUNCTION fCheckAmendmentDiff (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER AS
        l_target_key          VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid    NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype        VARCHAR2(50);
        l_count               NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_v_key         VARCHAR2(50);
        l_target_reg_number   VARCHAR2(250);
        loop_cnt              NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'IS_CHANGED_BY'
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_target_reg_number := cur.target_reg_number;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND ( ( instr(upper(l_target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1
                        AND beziehung_art = 30 )
                      OR beziehung_art = 20 );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
        FOR curs IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art IN (
                    20,
                    30
                )
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'IS_CHANGED_BY'
                AND ( ( instr(upper(vr.target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1
                        AND curs.beziehung_art = 30 )
                      OR curs.beziehung_art = 20 );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2001;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
        FOR cursb IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art IN (
                    20,
                    30
                )
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
                AND ( ( instr(upper(vr.target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1
                        AND cursb.beziehung_art = 30 )
                      OR cursb.beziehung_art = 20 );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2002;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype,
                vr.target_reg_number,
                tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_target_reg_number := cur_r.target_reg_number;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND ( ( instr(upper(l_target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1
                        AND beziehung_art = 30 )
                      OR beziehung_art = 20 );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1000;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
        loop_cnt := 0;
        FOR curs IN (
            WITH cte AS (
                SELECT
                    tv_key.vorschriftid,
                    tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
                WHERE
                    tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
            )
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
                JOIN cte ON ( vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid
                              AND cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid )
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art IN (
                    20,
                    30
                )
        ) LOOP
            loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'CHANGES'
                AND ( ( instr(upper(vr.target_reg_number), 'UN-R') = 1
                        AND curs.beziehung_art = 30 )
                      OR curs.beziehung_art = 20 );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 3005;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 0;
    END fCheckAmendmentDiff;



	FUNCTION fCheckDemandsDiff (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER AS
        l_target_key              VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid        NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype            VARCHAR2(50);
        l_count                   NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_v_key             VARCHAR2(50);
        l_successorsincluded      VARCHAR2(32);
        l_multigroupid            VARCHAR2(64);
        l_homolog_serie           NUMBER;
        l_min_date_all_vehicles   DATE;
        l_min_date_new_types      DATE;
        loop_cnt                  NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY'
                AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                      OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;

        -- Basic existence check
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND beziehung_art = 40;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1;
            END IF;

        -- Check homologation_serie
            IF ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 40
                    AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 41;  -- homologation_serie mismatch
                END IF;
            ELSIF ( l_multigroupid IS NULL ) THEN
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 40
                    AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 42;  -- should have no homologation_serie
                END IF;
            END IF;

        -- Check dates
            IF ( 0 = PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(avorschriftid, l_target_key, 'IS_DEMANDED_BY', l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types
            ) ) THEN
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE
                    vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 40
                    AND ( ( datum_alle_typen IS NULL
                            AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL )
                          OR ( datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                               AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NULL )
                          OR ( datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                               AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL
                               AND to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy') )
                          OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NULL
                               AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL )
                          OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                               AND l_min_date_new_types IS NULL )
                          OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                               AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL
                               AND to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy') ) );
                IF ( l_count > 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 43;  -- Date mismatch
                END IF;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
        FOR curs IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.homologation_serie,
                vrv.datum_alle_typen,
                vrv.datum_neue_typen
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 40
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'IS_DEMANDED_BY'
                AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                      OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2001;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
        FOR cursb IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.homologation_serie,
                vrv.datum_alle_typen,
                vrv.datum_neue_typen
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 40
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'DEMANDS'
                AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                      OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2002;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'DEMANDS'
                AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                      OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;

        -- Check existence and homologation_serie
            IF ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 40
                    AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;
            ELSE
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 40
                    AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;
            END IF;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1000;
            END IF;

        -- Check dates if they exist
            IF ( 0 = PCK_RI_GETEX_CTRL.fGetGetexRelationDates(l_tar_vorschriftid, l_getex_v_key, 'DEMANDS', l_min_date_all_vehicles, l_min_date_new_types
            ) ) THEN
                SELECT
                    COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM
                    t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE
                    nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                    AND beziehung_art = 40
                    AND ( ( datum_alle_typen IS NULL
                            AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL )
                          OR ( datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                               AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NULL )
                          OR ( datum_alle_typen IS NOT NULL
                               AND l_min_date_all_vehicles IS NOT NULL
                               AND to_char(datum_alle_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_all_vehicles, 'dd.mm.yyyy') )
                          OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NULL
                               AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL )
                          OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                               AND l_min_date_new_types IS NULL )
                          OR ( datum_neue_typen IS NOT NULL
                               AND l_min_date_new_types IS NOT NULL
                               AND to_char(datum_neue_typen, 'dd.mm.yyyy') != to_char(l_min_date_new_types, 'dd.mm.yyyy') ) );
                IF ( l_count > 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 1001;
                END IF;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
        loop_cnt := 0;
        FOR curs IN (
            WITH cte AS (
                SELECT
                    tv_key.vorschriftid,
                    tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
                WHERE
                    tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vr.relationtype = 'DEMANDS'
                    AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                          OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )
            )
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art,
                vrv.homologation_serie,
                vrv.datum_alle_typen,
                vrv.datum_neue_typen
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
                JOIN cte ON ( vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid
                              AND cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid )
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 40
        ) LOOP
            loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'DEMANDS'
                AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                      OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 3005;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 0;
    END fCheckDemandsDiff;


	FUNCTION fCheckLinkedToDiff (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER AS
        l_target_key         VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype       VARCHAR2(50);
        l_count              NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_v_key        VARCHAR2(50);
        loop_cnt             NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_FROM'
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND beziehung_art = 60;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
        FOR curs IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 60
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_FROM';
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2001;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
        FOR cursb IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 60
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO';
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2002;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype,
                tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO'
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND beziehung_art = 60;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1000;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
        loop_cnt := 0;
        FOR curs IN (
            WITH cte AS (
                SELECT
                    tv_key.vorschriftid,
                    tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
                FROM
                    mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                    JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
                WHERE
                    tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                    AND vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO'
            )
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
                JOIN cte ON ( vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid
                              AND cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid )
            WHERE
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 60
        ) LOOP
            loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
            SELECT
                regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM
                t_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorschriftid = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'LINKED_TO';
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 3005;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 0;
    END fCheckLinkedToDiff;

    /**
    *
    */
    FUNCTION fCheckEquivalentDiff (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER AS
        l_target_key           VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid     NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype         VARCHAR2(50);
        l_count                NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_v_key          VARCHAR2(50);
        l_successorsincluded   VARCHAR2(32);
        l_multigroupid         VARCHAR2(64);
        l_homolog_serie        NUMBER;
        loop_cnt               NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid
            FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND vr.relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY'
              AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL  OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )
            ORDER BY  tv.vorschriftid, vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            l_successorsincluded := cur.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur.multigroupid;

        -- Basic existence check
            SELECT COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND beziehung_art = 102;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1;
            END IF;

        -- Check homologation_serie
            IF ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                  AND beziehung_art = 102
                  AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 41;  -- homologation_serie mismatch
                END IF;
            ELSIF ( l_multigroupid IS NULL ) THEN
                SELECT   COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                  AND beziehung_art = 102
                  AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;
                IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                    RETURN 42;  -- should have no homologation_serie
                END IF;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
        FOR curs IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.homologation_serie
            FROM   t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND vrv.beziehung_art = 102
        ) LOOP
            SELECT regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM  t_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschriftid = curs.nachfolger_vorschriftid;

            SELECT COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
             AND targetid = l_target_key
              AND vr.relationtype = 'SEEN_AS_EQUIVALENT_BY'
              AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2001;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2b. Second reverse check: RegIndex to Getex (as nachfolger)
        FOR cursb IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.homologation_serie
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE  vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND vrv.beziehung_art = 102
        ) LOOP
            SELECT regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM t_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschriftid = cursb.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

            SELECT COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE  tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND targetid = l_target_key
              AND vr.relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
              AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL  OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 2002;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 3. Check when Vorschrift is Nachfolger in Getex
        FOR cur_r IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vr.v_id,
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype,
                vr.successorsincluded,
                vr.multigroupid,
                tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND vr.relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
              AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur_r.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_successorsincluded := cur_r.successorsincluded;
            l_multigroupid := cur_r.multigroupid;

        -- Check existence and homologation_serie
            IF ( nvl(l_successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' ) THEN
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                  AND beziehung_art = 102
                  AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 10;
            ELSE
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                INTO l_count
                FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
                WHERE nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND vorgaenger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                  AND beziehung_art = 102
                  AND nvl(homologation_serie, 0) = 0;
            END IF;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1000;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 4. Final reverse check with type filtering
        loop_cnt := 0;
        FOR curs IN (
            WITH cte AS (
                SELECT tv_key.vorschriftid,  tv.vorschriftid AS tar_vorschriftid
                FROM  mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
                WHERE  tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                  AND vr.relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
                  AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' )
            )
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.beziehung_art,
                vrv.homologation_serie
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            JOIN cte ON ( vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = cte.vorschriftid
                           AND cte.tar_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid )
            WHERE vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
              AND vrv.beziehung_art = 102
        ) LOOP
            loop_cnt := loop_cnt + 1;
            SELECT  regindexid
            INTO l_target_key
            FROM t_vorschrift
            WHERE vorschriftid = curs.vorgaenger_vorschriftid;

            SELECT COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM   mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
            JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND targetid = l_target_key
                AND vr.relationtype = 'EQUIVALENT_TO'
                AND ( vr.multigroupid IS NULL
                      OR nvl(vr.successorsincluded, 'false') = 'true' );
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 3005;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;
        RETURN 0;
    END fCheckEquivalentDiff;

    /**
    *
    */
    FUNCTION fCheckConsolidatesDiff (
        avorschriftid IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN NUMBER AS
        l_target_key         VARCHAR2(64);
        l_tar_vorschriftid   NUMBER := 0;
        l_relationtype       VARCHAR2(50);
        l_count              NUMBER := 0;
        l_getex_v_key        VARCHAR2(50);
        loop_cnt             NUMBER := 0;
    BEGIN
    -- 1. Forward check
        FOR cur IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                tv_key.vorschriftid,
                vr.targetid,
                vr.relationtype   relationtype,
                tv.vorschriftid   AS tar_vorschriftid
            FROM
                mv_getex_vorschrift_relation   vr
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv ON ( tv.regindexid = vr.targetid )
                JOIN t_vorschrift                   tv_key ON ( tv_key.regindexid = vr.v_id )
            WHERE
                tv_key.vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vr.relationtype = 'IS_CONSOLIDATED_IN'
            ORDER BY
                tv.vorschriftid,
                vr.relationtype
        ) LOOP
            l_tar_vorschriftid := cur.tar_vorschriftid;
            l_target_key := cur.targetid;
            SELECT
                COUNT(*)
            INTO l_count
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift
            WHERE
                vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND nachfolger_vorschriftid = l_tar_vorschriftid
                AND beziehung_art = 200;
            IF ( l_count = 0 ) THEN
                RETURN 1;
            END IF;
        END LOOP;

    -- 2. Reverse check: RegIndex to Getex
        FOR curs IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid,
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
            FROM
                t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            WHERE
                vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = avorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 200
        ) LOOP
            SELECT
                regindexid
