            */
 
            -- ============================================================
            -- Higher Series Aggregation
            -- ============================================================
            higher_series_aggregated AS (
                SELECT 
                    fb.vorschriftid as base_vorschrift_id,
                    LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                        '<span class="higher-series-indicator" title="Höhere Serie verfügbar">' ||
                        '<i class="fa fa-level-up" style="color: #2196F3; margin-right: 5px;"></i></span>' ||
                        '<a href="f?p=' || p_app_id || ':25:' || p_app_session || '::' || p_debug || ':RP,25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:' || fb.alternative_vorschriftid || '" target="_blank">' ||
                        CASE 
                            WHEN NVL(vd_alt.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum, 0) = 20 AND vd_alt.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                            THEN vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer || '_' || TO_CHAR(vd_alt.dokumentendatum, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                            ELSE vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer
                        END ||
                        '</a>' ||
                        ' <span class="rule-number-tag" style="font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; background-color: #f5f5f5; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; margin-left: 4px; white-space: nowrap;">(Regel: ' || fb.regelnummer || ')</span>'
                    , ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer) AS higher_series_html
                FROM filtered_base fb
                INNER JOIN vorschrift_details vd_alt ON vd_alt.vorschriftid = fb.alternative_vorschriftid
                -- INNER JOIN vorschrift_details vd_main ON vd_main.vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid
                WHERE fb.HOEHERE_SERIE_MOEGLICH = 1  -- ONLY higher series!
                AND fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL
                -- Only applies if Publisher is UNECE
                -- AND vd_main.publisher = 'UNECE'
                AND vd_alt.publisher = 'UNECE'
                GROUP BY fb.vorschriftid
            ),
 
 
            
 
 
 
 
 
            
            rule_criticality AS (
                SELECT 
                    fb.sucheid,
                    fb.meilenstein,
                    fb.landid,
                    CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL 
                         THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid 
                         ELSE fb.vorschriftid END as specific_vorschrift_id,
                    CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT TO_CHAR(fb.regelnummer),'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.regelnummer))>500 
                         THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT TO_CHAR(fb.regelnummer),'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.regelnummer),1,500)||'...' 
                         ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT TO_CHAR(fb.regelnummer),'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.regelnummer) 
                    END AS regelnummer_list,
                    CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mat.KRITIKALITAET IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(mat.KRITIKALITAET) ELSE NULL END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY mat.KRITIKALITAET))>500 
                         THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mat.KRITIKALITAET IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(mat.KRITIKALITAET) ELSE NULL END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY mat.KRITIKALITAET),1,500)||'...' 
                         ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mat.KRITIKALITAET IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(mat.KRITIKALITAET) ELSE NULL END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY mat.KRITIKALITAET) 
                    END AS kritikalitaet_von_regelnummer,
                    CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mat.AUSGABE_TEXT IS NOT NULL THEN mat.AUSGABE_TEXT ELSE NULL END,'<br>') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY mat.AUSGABE_TEXT))>500 
                         THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mat.AUSGABE_TEXT IS NOT NULL THEN mat.AUSGABE_TEXT ELSE NULL END,'<br>') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY mat.AUSGABE_TEXT),1,500)||'...' 
                         ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mat.AUSGABE_TEXT IS NOT NULL THEN mat.AUSGABE_TEXT ELSE NULL END,'<br>') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY mat.AUSGABE_TEXT) 
                    END AS ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer,
                    MAX(mat.KRITIKALITAET) as max_kritikalitaet
                FROM filtered_base fb
                LEFT JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER p ON fb.regelnummer = p.nummer
                LEFT JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER_REF_AUSGABE pra ON p.MS_PARAMETERID = pra.MS_PARAMETERID
                LEFT JOIN T_MS_AUSGABE_TEXT mat ON pra.MS_AUSGABE_TEXTID = mat.MS_AUSGABE_TEXTID
                GROUP BY fb.sucheid, fb.meilenstein, fb.landid,
                        CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL 
                             THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid 
                             ELSE fb.vorschriftid END
            ),
            country_coverage AS (
                SELECT p_card_num as card_number, COUNT(DISTINCT landid) as total_countries
                FROM t_ms_suche_split 
                WHERE card_number = p_card_num 
                AND (benutzerid = p_benutzerid 
                     OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_benutzer_ref_rolle brr 
                                WHERE brr.benutzerid = p_benutzerid 
                                AND brr.rolleid = 1001))
            ),
            /*
            bewertung_data AS (
                SELECT 
                    bew.sucheid,
                    bew.meilenstein,
                    bew.card_number,
                    bew.vorschriftid,
                    CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nicht bewertet' THEN '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='ja' THEN '<span class="et-ja" style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-check"></i> ja</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nein' THEN '<span class="et-nein" style="color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-times"></i> nein</span>' ELSE '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VERWENDUNG))>500 
                         THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nicht bewertet' THEN '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='ja' THEN '<span class="et-ja" style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-check"></i> ja</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nein' THEN '<span class="et-nein" style="color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-times"></i> nein</span>' ELSE '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VERWENDUNG),1,500)||'...' 
                         ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nicht bewertet' THEN '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='ja' THEN '<span class="et-ja" style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-check"></i> ja</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nein' THEN '<span class="et-nein" style="color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-times"></i> nein</span>' ELSE '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VERWENDUNG) 
                    END AS ET_VERWENDUNG,
                    CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT))>500 
                         THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT),1,500)||'...' 
                         ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT) 
                    END AS ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,
                    CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_KOMMENTAR,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_KOMMENTAR))>500 
                         THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_KOMMENTAR,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_KOMMENTAR),1,500)||'...' 
                         ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_KOMMENTAR,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_KOMMENTAR) 
                    END AS ET_KOMMENTAR,
                    CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG!='nicht bewertet' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_evaluated
                FROM T_MS_BEWERTUNG bew
                INNER JOIN filtered_base fb ON (
                    bew.SUCHEID = fb.sucheid 
                    AND bew.MEILENSTEIN = fb.meilenstein 
                    AND bew.CARD_NUMBER = fb.card_number 
                    AND bew.VORSCHRIFTID = CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL 
                                                THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid 
                                                ELSE fb.vorschriftid END 
                    AND (bew.BENUTZERID = p_benutzerid 
                         OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_benutzer_ref_rolle brr 
                                    WHERE brr.benutzerid = p_benutzerid 
                                    AND brr.rolleid = 1001))
                )
                GROUP BY bew.sucheid, bew.meilenstein, bew.card_number, bew.vorschriftid
            ),
            */
 
           bewertung_data AS (
            SELECT 
                bew.sucheid,
                bew.meilenstein,
                bew.card_number,
                bew.vorschriftid,
                CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nicht bewertet' THEN '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='ja' THEN '<span class="et-ja" style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-check"></i> ja</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nein' THEN '<span class="et-nein" style="color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-times"></i> nein</span>' ELSE '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VERWENDUNG))>500 
                     THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nicht bewertet' THEN '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='ja' THEN '<span class="et-ja" style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-check"></i> ja</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nein' THEN '<span class="et-nein" style="color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-times"></i> nein</span>' ELSE '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VERWENDUNG),1,500)||'...' 
                     ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nicht bewertet' THEN '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='ja' THEN '<span class="et-ja" style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-check"></i> ja</span>' WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG='nein' THEN '<span class="et-nein" style="color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-times"></i> nein</span>' ELSE '<span class="et-nicht-bewertet" style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' END,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VERWENDUNG) 
                END AS ET_VERWENDUNG,
                CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT))>500 
                     THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT),1,500)||'...' 
                     ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT) 
                END AS ET_VORSCHLAG_VORSCHRIFT,
                CASE WHEN LENGTH(LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_KOMMENTAR,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_KOMMENTAR))>500 
                     THEN SUBSTR(LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_KOMMENTAR,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_KOMMENTAR),1,500)||'...' 
                     ELSE LISTAGG(DISTINCT bew.ET_KOMMENTAR,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY bew.ET_KOMMENTAR) 
                END AS ET_KOMMENTAR,
                
                -- Flag: Is there ANY evaluation that is not 'nicht bewertet'?
                CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG != 'nicht bewertet' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_evaluated,
                
                -- Flag: Is there ANY 'ja' evaluation?
                MAX(CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG = 'ja' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ja,
                
                -- Flag: Is there ANY 'nein' evaluation?
                MAX(CASE WHEN bew.ET_VERWENDUNG = 'nein' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_nein
                
            FROM T_MS_BEWERTUNG bew
            INNER JOIN filtered_base fb ON (
                bew.SUCHEID = fb.sucheid 
                AND bew.MEILENSTEIN = fb.meilenstein 
                AND bew.CARD_NUMBER = fb.card_number 
                AND bew.VORSCHRIFTID = CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL 
                                            THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid 
                                            ELSE fb.vorschriftid END 
                AND (bew.BENUTZERID = p_benutzerid 
                     OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_benutzer_ref_rolle brr 
                                WHERE brr.benutzerid = p_benutzerid 
                                AND brr.rolleid = 1001))
            )
            GROUP BY bew.sucheid, bew.meilenstein, bew.card_number, bew.vorschriftid
            ),
            cross_reference_check AS (
                SELECT DISTINCT bew.vorschriftid, 1 as is_selected_elsewhere
                FROM T_MS_BEWERTUNG bew
                INNER JOIN T_MS_SUCHE_SPLIT split ON (
                    bew.sucheid = split.sucheid 
                    AND bew.meilenstein = split.meilenstein 
                    AND bew.card_number = split.card_number
                )
                WHERE bew.sucheid = p_search_selection 
                AND bew.meilenstein = p_milestone_selection 
                AND (bew.benutzerid = p_benutzerid 
                     OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_benutzer_ref_rolle brr 
                                WHERE brr.benutzerid = p_benutzerid 
                                AND brr.rolleid = 1001)) 
                AND bew.ET_VERWENDUNG = 'ja' 
                AND bew.card_number != p_card_num 
                AND bew.vorschriftid IN (
                    SELECT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL 
                               THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid 
                               ELSE fb.vorschriftid END 
                    FROM filtered_base fb
                )
            )
 
            -- Main SELECT statement
            SELECT
                1 AS checkbox,
                -- '<a href="'||apex_util.prepare_url(p_url=>'f?p='||p_app_id||':466:'||p_app_session||':::466:'||'P466_SEARCH_SELECTION,P466_MILESTONE_SELECTION,P466_CARD_NUM,P466_SINGLE_REG_ID:'||p_search_selection||','||p_milestone_selection||','||p_card_num||','||fb.vorschriftid)||'" title="Bewertung bearbeiten" class="single-edit-link">'||'<span class="fa fa-external-link" style="font-size: 16px; color: #007bff;"></span>'||'</a>' AS row_edit_link,
                
                -- ROW_EDIT_LINK with checkmark
                '<a href="'||apex_util.prepare_url(p_url=>'f?p='||p_app_id||':466:'||p_app_session||':::466:'||'P466_SEARCH_SELECTION,P466_MILESTONE_SELECTION,P466_CARD_NUM,P466_SINGLE_REG_ID:'||p_search_selection||','||p_milestone_selection||','||p_card_num||','||fb.vorschriftid)||'" title="Bewertung bearbeiten" class="single-edit-link">'||'<span class="fa fa-external-link" style="font-size: 16px; color: #007bff;"></span>'||'</a>'||
                CASE 
 
                    -- GREEN CHECKMARK: Priority 1 - ANY 'ja'
 
                    WHEN MAX(bd.has_ja) = 1 THEN 
                        '<div style="margin-top: 8px; text-align: center;"><span class="fa fa-check-circle checkmark-icon" style="color: #27ae60; font-size: 14px;" title="Diese Vorschrift wurde bereits bewertet!"></span></div>'
                    -- RED X: Priority 2 - ANY 'nein' (but no 'ja')
                    WHEN MAX(bd.has_nein) = 1 THEN 
                        '<div style="margin-top: 8px; text-align: center;"><span class="fa fa-times-circle" style="color: #e74c3c; font-size: 14px;" title="keine Vorschrift aus der Zeile wird verwendet"></span></div>'
                    -- NO ICON: All are 'nicht bewertet' or no evaluation
                    ELSE '' 
                END AS row_edit_link,
                fb.card_number,
                fb.vorschriftid AS specific_reg_id,
                fb.vorschriftid,
                CASE WHEN length(listagg(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(fb.alternative_vorschriftid) ELSE '-' END,', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.alternative_vorschriftid))>500 THEN substr(listagg(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(fb.alternative_vorschriftid) ELSE '-' END,', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.alternative_vorschriftid),1,500)||'...' ELSE listagg(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(fb.alternative_vorschriftid) ELSE '-' END,', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.alternative_vorschriftid) END AS alternative_vorschriftid,
                CASE WHEN max(fb.manueller_eintrag)=10 THEN '<a href="'||apex_util.prepare_url(p_url=>'f?p='||p_app_id||':465:'||p_app_session||':::465:'||'P465_CARD_NUM,P465_MODE,P465_SEARCH_SELECTION,P465_MILESTONE_SELECTION,P465_LANDIDS,P465_SPECIFIC_REG_ID:'||fb.card_number||',EDIT,'||fb.sucheid||','||fb.meilenstein||','||listagg(DISTINCT fb.landid,';') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer)||','||fb.vorschriftid)||'" title="Bearbeiten (Manueller Eintrag)" class="edit-link"><span class="fa fa-pencil edit-icon" style="font-size: 16px; color: #333;"></span></a>' ELSE '<span class="fa fa-pencil" style="color: #ccc; font-size: 16px;" title="Automatischer Eintrag - Bearbeiten nicht möglich"></span>' END AS edit_action,
                CASE WHEN max(fb.manueller_eintrag)=10 THEN '<a href="javascript:confirmDeleteCard('||fb.card_number||', '||fb.vorschriftid||')" title="Manueller Eintrag - Löschen ist möglich" class="delete-link"><span class="fa fa-trash delete-icon" style="color: #bb0a31; font-size: 16px;"></span></a>' ELSE '<span class="fa fa-trash" style="color: #ccc; font-size: 16px;" title="Automatischer Eintrag - Löschen nicht möglich"></span>' END AS delete_action,
                CASE WHEN max(fb.manueller_eintrag)=10 THEN '<span class="manual-entry-indicator" title="Manueller Eintrag"><i class="fa fa-user-plus" style="color: #bb0a31; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 5px;"></i><span>Manueller Eintrag</span></span>' ELSE '<span class="auto-entry-indicator" title="Automatischer Eintrag"><i class="fa fa-cog" style="color: #bb0a31; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 5px;"></i><span>Automatischer Eintrag</span></span>' END AS manueller_eintrag,
                CASE WHEN length(listagg(DISTINCT fb.landnummer,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer))>500 THEN substr(listagg(DISTINCT fb.landnummer,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer),1,500)||'...' ELSE listagg(DISTINCT fb.landnummer,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer) END AS b_nummer_liste,
                CASE WHEN length(listagg(DISTINCT fb.landid,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer))>500 THEN substr(listagg(DISTINCT fb.landid,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer),1,500)||'...' ELSE listagg(DISTINCT fb.landid,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer) END AS landids,
                CASE WHEN length(listagg(DISTINCT fb.landbezeichnung,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer))>500 THEN substr(listagg(DISTINCT fb.landbezeichnung,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer),1,500)||'...' ELSE listagg(DISTINCT fb.landbezeichnung,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.landnummer) END AS land_namen_liste,
                CASE WHEN count(DISTINCT fb.landid)<cc.total_countries THEN '<span class="fa fa-exclamation-triangle warning-icon" style="color: #ff6600; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px;" title="Nicht alle Themengebiete gelten in allen Ländern!"></span> ' ELSE '' END||CASE WHEN length(listagg(DISTINCT fb.themabezeichnung,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.themabezeichnung))>500 THEN substr(listagg(DISTINCT fb.themabezeichnung,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.themabezeichnung),1,500)||'...' ELSE listagg(DISTINCT fb.themabezeichnung,'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY fb.themabezeichnung) END AS themabezeichnung,
                -- ============================================
                -- VORSCHRIFTENNUMMER Column 
                -- ============================================
                
                /*
                -- CASE WHEN count(DISTINCT fb.landid)<cc.total_countries THEN '<span class="fa fa-exclamation-triangle warning-icon" style="color: #ff6600; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px;" title="Diese Vorschrift gilt nicht für alle Länder in dieser Karte!"></span> ' ELSE '' END||
                -- -- Checkmark BEFORE main regulation ONLY if NO alternative exists
                -- CASE 
                --     WHEN max(nvl(bd.is_evaluated,0)) = 1 
                --          AND NOT EXISTS (
                --              SELECT 1 FROM filtered_base fb2 
                --              WHERE fb2.vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid 
                --              AND fb2.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL
                --          )
                --     THEN '<span class="fa fa-check-circle checkmark-icon" style="color: #27ae60; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px;" title="Diese Vorschrift wurde bereits bewertet!"></span> ' 
                --     ELSE '' 
                -- END||
                -- '<a href="f?p='||p_app_id||':25:'||p_app_session||'::'||p_debug||':RP,25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:'||fb.vorschriftid||'" target="_blank">'||
                -- max(CASE WHEN nvl(vd_main.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum,0)=20 AND vd_main.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                --          THEN coalesce(vd_main.vorschrift_nummer,fb.vorschriftnummer)||'_'||to_char(vd_main.dokumentendatum,'DD.MM.YYYY') 
                --          ELSE coalesce(vd_main.vorschrift_nummer,fb.vorschriftnummer) 
                --     END)||
                -- '</a>'||
                -- -- Checkmark AFTER main regulation if it was selected AND alternative exists
                -- CASE 
                --     WHEN EXISTS (
                --         SELECT 1 FROM filtered_base fb2 
                --         WHERE fb2.vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid 
                --         AND fb2.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL
                --     )
                --     AND max(bd.et_vorschlag_vorschrift) = max(CASE 
                --         WHEN nvl(vd_main.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum,0)=20 AND vd_main.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                --         THEN coalesce(vd_main.vorschrift_nummer,fb.vorschriftnummer)||'_'||to_char(vd_main.dokumentendatum,'DD.MM.YYYY') 
                --         ELSE coalesce(vd_main.vorschrift_nummer,fb.vorschriftnummer) 
                --     END)
                --     AND max(nvl(bd.is_evaluated,0)) = 1
                --     THEN ' <span class="fa fa-check-circle checkmark-icon" style="color: #27ae60; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 14px;" title="Diese Vorschrift wurde ausgewählt!"></span>' 
                --     ELSE '' 
                -- END||
                -- CASE WHEN max(nvl(crc.is_selected_elsewhere,0))=1 THEN ' <span class="fa fa-clipboard-list fam-check fam-is-success" style="margin-left: 5px;" title="Vorschrift wurde in einem anderen Markt schon ausgewählt"></span>' ELSE '' END||
                
                */
                -- VORSCHRIFTENNUMMER with Rule Number
                CASE WHEN count(DISTINCT fb.landid)<cc.total_countries THEN '<span class="fa fa-exclamation-triangle warning-icon" style="color: #ff6600; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px;" title="Diese Vorschrift gilt nicht für alle Länder in dieser Karte!"></span> ' ELSE '' END||
                '<a href="f?p='||p_app_id||':25:'||p_app_session||'::'||p_debug||':RP,25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:'||fb.vorschriftid||'" target="_blank">'||
                max(CASE WHEN nvl(vd_main.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum,0)=20 AND vd_main.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                         THEN coalesce(vd_main.vorschrift_nummer,fb.vorschriftnummer)||'_'||to_char(vd_main.dokumentendatum,'DD.MM.YYYY') 
                         ELSE coalesce(vd_main.vorschrift_nummer,fb.vorschriftnummer) 
                    END)||
                '</a>'||
                -- RULE NUMBER HERE
                CASE 
                    WHEN max(rc.regelnummer_list) IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN ' <span style="color: #666; font-size: 11px; font-style: italic; background-color: #f5f5f5; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 3px; margin-left: 5px;">(Regel: ' || max(rc.regelnummer_list) || ')</span>'
                    ELSE ''
                END ||
                CASE WHEN max(nvl(crc.is_selected_elsewhere,0))=1 THEN ' <span class="fa fa-clipboard-list fam-check fam-is-success" style="margin-left: 5px;" title="Vorschrift wurde in einem anderen Markt schon ausgewählt"></span>' ELSE '' END||
                CASE WHEN max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0)>max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) THEN ' <span class="fa fa-arrow-up" style="color: #fff; background-color: #e74c3c; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px;" title="Kritikalität gestiegen"></span>' WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0)<max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) THEN ' <span class="fa fa-arrow-down" style="color: #fff; background-color: #27ae60; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px;" title="Kritikalität gesunken"></span>' WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0)=max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) THEN ' <span class="fa fa-check-circle" style="color: #95a5a6; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: middle;" title="Kritikalität unverändert"></span>' ELSE ' <span class="fa fa-plus-circle" style="color: #27ae60; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: middle;" title="Neue Vorschrift"></span>' END ELSE '' END AS vorschriftennummer,
 
                max(rc.regelnummer_list) AS regelnummer,
 
                -- ============================================================
                -- ALTERNATIVE_VORSCHRIFTENNUMMER - Priority Order
                -- ============================================================
                CASE 
                    -- Warning Icon (if not all countries covered)
                    -- WHEN count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.landid END) > 0 
                    --      AND count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.landid END) < cc.total_countries 
                    -- THEN '<span class="fa fa-exclamation-triangle warning-icon" style="color: #ff6600; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px;"></span> ' 
                    -- ELSE '' 
                    WHEN count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.landid END) > 0 
                         AND count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.landid END) < cc.total_countries 
                    THEN '<span class="fa fa-exclamation-triangle warning-icon" 
                               title="Achtung: Höhere Serie nicht für alle Länder verfügbar. ' ||
                               'Verfügbar für ' || 
                               count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.landid END) || 
                               ' von ' || cc.total_countries || ' Ländern." 
                               style="color: #ff6600; margin-right: 5px; font-size: 14px; cursor: help;"></span> ' 
                    ELSE '' 
 
 
                END ||
                CASE 
                    -- PRIORITY 1: Show Higher Series 
                    WHEN MAX(hsa.higher_series_html) IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN MAX(hsa.higher_series_html)
                    
                    -- PRIORITY 2: Show Successor
                    WHEN MAX(sfa.successor_with_rule) IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN MAX(sfa.successor_with_rule)
 
                    -- PRIORITY 2: Show ALL Successors (recursive)
                    -- WHEN MAX(sa.all_successors_html) IS NOT NULL 
                    -- THEN MAX(sa.all_successors_html)
                    
                    -- PRIORITY 3: Fallback to standard alternative logic
                    ELSE 
                        CASE WHEN length(listagg(DISTINCT CASE 
                            WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL AND vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer IS NOT NULL 
                            THEN CASE 
                                    WHEN nvl(vd_alt.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum,0)=20 AND vd_alt.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                                    THEN vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer||'_'||to_char(vd_alt.dokumentendatum,'DD.MM.YYYY') 
                                    ELSE vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer 
                                END 
                            ELSE NULL 
                        END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer)) > 500 
                        THEN substr(listagg(DISTINCT CASE 
                            WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL AND vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer IS NOT NULL 
                            THEN CASE 
                                    WHEN nvl(vd_alt.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum,0)=20 AND vd_alt.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                                    THEN vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer||'_'||to_char(vd_alt.dokumentendatum,'DD.MM.YYYY') 
                                    ELSE vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer 
                                END 
                            ELSE NULL 
                        END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer),1,500)||'...' 
                        ELSE listagg(DISTINCT CASE 
                            WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL AND vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer IS NOT NULL 
                            THEN CASE 
                                    WHEN nvl(vd_alt.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum,0)=20 AND vd_alt.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                                    THEN vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer||'_'||to_char(vd_alt.dokumentendatum,'DD.MM.YYYY') 
                                    ELSE vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer 
                                END 
                            ELSE NULL 
                        END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY vd_alt.vorschrift_nummer) 
                        END
                END AS alternative_vorschriftennummer,
                
                
                CASE WHEN length(listagg(DISTINCT nvl(vd_alt.publisher,vd_main.publisher),'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY nvl(vd_alt.publisher,vd_main.publisher)))>500 THEN substr(listagg(DISTINCT nvl(vd_alt.publisher,vd_main.publisher),'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY nvl(vd_alt.publisher,vd_main.publisher)),1,500)||'...' ELSE listagg(DISTINCT nvl(vd_alt.publisher,vd_main.publisher),'; ') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY nvl(vd_alt.publisher,vd_main.publisher)) END AS publisher,
                fb.sucheid AS search_id_hidden,
                fb.meilenstein AS milestone_hidden,
                p_landids AS landids_hidden,
                max(vd_main.rxswin) AS rxswin_relevant,
                max(nvl(ld_main.lrsa,ld_alt.lrsa)) AS lrsa,
                max(nvl(hd_main.homologationseigenschaften,hd_alt.homologationseigenschaften)) AS homologationseigenschaft,
                max(nvl(sd_main.nachfolger_vorschrift,sd_alt.nachfolger_vorschrift)) AS nachfolger_vorschrift,
                CASE WHEN listagg(DISTINCT rc.kritikalitaet_von_regelnummer,'; ') IS NOT NULL THEN listagg(DISTINCT rc.kritikalitaet_von_regelnummer,'; ')||CASE WHEN max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0)>max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) THEN ' <span class="fa fa-arrow-up" style="color: #fff; background-color: #e74c3c; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px;" title="Kritikalität gestiegen"></span>' WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0)<max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) THEN ' <span class="fa fa-arrow-down" style="color: #fff; background-color: #27ae60; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px;" title="Kritikalität gesunken"></span>' WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0)=max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) THEN ' <span class="fa fa-check-circle" style="color: #95a5a6; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: middle;" title="Kritikalität unverändert"></span>' ELSE '' END ELSE ' <span class="fa fa-plus-circle" style="color: #27ae60; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: middle;" title="Neue Vorschrift"></span>' END ELSE '-' END AS kritikalitaet_von_regelnummer,
                CASE WHEN listagg(DISTINCT rc.ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer,'<br>') IS NOT NULL THEN listagg(DISTINCT rc.ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer,'<br>')||CASE WHEN max(pmd.prev_ausgabe_text) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN replace(listagg(DISTINCT rc.ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer,'<br>'),'<br>',' | ')!=replace(max(pmd.prev_ausgabe_text),'<br>',' | ') THEN ' <span class="fa fa-edit" style="color: #fff; background-color: #f39c12; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px;" title="Ausgabe Text geändert"></span>' ELSE ' <span class="fa fa-check-circle" style="color: #95a5a6; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: middle;" title="Ausgabe Text unverändert"></span>' END ELSE ' <span class="fa fa-plus-circle" style="color: #27ae60; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: middle;" title="Neuer Ausgabe Text"></span>' END ELSE '-' END AS ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer,
                max(bd.et_verwendung) AS et_verwendung,
                max(bd.et_vorschlag_vorschrift) AS et_vorschlag_vorschrift,
                max(bd.et_kommentar) AS et_kommentar,
                CASE WHEN fsc.is_first_search = 1 THEN '-' ELSE CASE WHEN max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet))||CASE WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0)>max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) THEN ' <span class="fa fa-arrow-up" style="color: #fff; background-color: #e74c3c; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px; width: 16px; height: 16px;" title="Kritikalität gestiegen"></span>' WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0)<max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) THEN ' <span class="fa fa-arrow-down" style="color: #fff; background-color: #27ae60; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px; width: 16px; height: 16px;" title="Kritikalität gesunken"></span>' ELSE ' <span class="fa fa-check-circle" style="color: #95a5a6; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: middle;" title="Kritikalität unverändert"></span>' END ELSE '-' END END AS "Kritikalität (M-1)",
                CASE WHEN fsc.is_first_search = 1 THEN '-' ELSE CASE WHEN max(pmd.prev_et_verwendung) IS NOT NULL THEN CASE max(pmd.prev_et_verwendung) WHEN 'nicht bewertet' THEN '<span style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' WHEN 'ja' THEN '<span style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-check"></i> ja</span>' WHEN 'nein' THEN '<span style="color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-times"></i> nein</span>' ELSE '<span style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' END ELSE '-' END END AS "ET Verwendung (M-1)",
                CASE WHEN fsc.is_first_search = 1 THEN '-' ELSE nvl(max(pmd.prev_et_kommentar),'-') END AS "ET Kommentar (M-1)",
                CASE WHEN fsc.is_first_search = 1 THEN '-' ELSE CASE WHEN max(pmd.prev_data_status)='no-prev-data' OR max(pmd.prev_data_status) IS NULL THEN '<span style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;">Neu hinzugefügt</span>' WHEN max(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet)!=NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0) THEN '<span style="color: #f39c12; font-weight: bold;">Kritikalität geändert</span>' WHEN max(pmd.prev_et_verwendung)!=nvl(max(bd.et_verwendung),'nicht bewertet') THEN '<span style="color: #3498db; font-weight: bold;">Bewertung geändert</span>' ELSE '<span style="color: #95a5a6;">Keine Änderung</span>' END END AS "Änderung zu M-1",
                CASE WHEN p_postprozess_id IS NULL OR fsc.is_first_search = 1 THEN '-' 
                     ELSE CASE WHEN max(psd.prev_search_kritikalitaet) IS NOT NULL THEN 
                          to_char(max(psd.prev_search_kritikalitaet))||
                          CASE WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0) > max(psd.prev_search_kritikalitaet) THEN 
                               ' <span class="fa fa-arrow-up" style="color: #fff; background-color: #e74c3c; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px; width: 16px; height: 16px;" title="Kritikalität gestiegen"></span>' 
                               WHEN NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0) < max(psd.prev_search_kritikalitaet) THEN 
                               ' <span class="fa fa-arrow-down" style="color: #fff; background-color: #27ae60; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-left: 5px; font-size: 12px; padding: 3px; width: 16px; height: 16px;" title="Kritikalität gesunken"></span>' 
                               ELSE ' <span class="fa fa-check-circle" style="color: #95a5a6; font-size: 14px; vertical-align: middle;" title="Kritikalität unverändert"></span>' 
                          END 
                          ELSE '-' 
                     END 
                END AS "Kritikalität (Vorherige Suche)",
                CASE WHEN p_postprozess_id IS NULL OR fsc.is_first_search = 1 THEN '-' 
                     ELSE CASE WHEN max(psd.prev_search_et_verwendung) IS NOT NULL THEN 
                          CASE max(psd.prev_search_et_verwendung) 
                               WHEN 'nicht bewertet' THEN '<span style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' 
                               WHEN 'ja' THEN '<span style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-check"></i> ja</span>' 
                               WHEN 'nein' THEN '<span style="color: #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;"><i class="fa fa-times"></i> nein</span>' 
                               ELSE '<span style="color: #666; font-style: italic;">nicht bewertet</span>' 
                          END 
                          ELSE '-' 
                     END 
                END AS "ET Verwendung (Vorherige Suche)",
                CASE WHEN p_postprozess_id IS NULL OR fsc.is_first_search = 1 THEN '-' 
                     ELSE nvl(max(psd.prev_search_et_kommentar),'-') 
                END AS "ET Kommentar (Vorherige Suche)",
                CASE WHEN p_postprozess_id IS NULL OR fsc.is_first_search = 1 THEN '-' 
                     ELSE CASE WHEN max(psd.prev_search_data_status) = 'no-prev-data' OR max(psd.prev_search_data_status) IS NULL THEN 
                          '<span style="color: #27ae60; font-weight: bold;">Neu hinzugefügt</span>' 
                          WHEN max(psd.prev_search_kritikalitaet) != NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0) THEN 
                          '<span style="color: #f39c12; font-weight: bold;">Kritikalität geändert</span>' 
                          WHEN max(psd.prev_search_et_verwendung) != nvl(max(bd.et_verwendung),'nicht bewertet') THEN 
                          '<span style="color: #3498db; font-weight: bold;">Bewertung geändert</span>' 
                          ELSE '<span style="color: #95a5a6;">Keine Änderung</span>' 
                     END 
                END AS "Änderung zu Vorheriger Suche",
                CASE 
                    WHEN MAX(bd.is_evaluated) = 1 
                    THEN '<span class="fa fa-ban" style="color: #e74c3c;" title="Massenupdate blockiert - Bereits bewertet"></span>'
                    WHEN EXISTS(
                        SELECT 1 FROM t_ms_suchergebniss ms_dup1 
                        WHERE ms_dup1.vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid 
                        AND ms_dup1.sucheid = fb.sucheid 
                        AND ms_dup1.meilenstein = fb.meilenstein 
                        AND ms_dup1.manueller_eintrag = 10 
                        AND EXISTS(
                            SELECT 1 FROM t_ms_suchergebniss ms_dup2 
                            WHERE ms_dup2.vorschriftid = ms_dup1.vorschriftid 
                            AND ms_dup2.sucheid = ms_dup1.sucheid 
                            AND ms_dup2.meilenstein = ms_dup1.meilenstein 
                            AND ms_dup2.landid = ms_dup1.landid 
                            AND ms_dup2.manueller_eintrag != 10
                        )
                    ) 
                    THEN '<span class="fa fa-ban" style="color: #e74c3c;" title="Massenupdate blockiert - Meilensteinvergleich Fehler"></span>'
                    ELSE '<span class="fa fa-check" style="color: #28a745;" title="Massenupdate möglich"></span>' 
                END AS "Massenupdate Status",
                CASE 
                    WHEN MAX(fb.AUSGABE_DER_VORSCHRIFT_BEI_REPORT_BAUREIHE) = 1 THEN 'Ja' 
                    ELSE 'Nein' 
                END AS report_baureihe,
                CASE 
                    WHEN MAX(hsa.higher_series_html) IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN MAX(hsa.higher_series_html)
                    ELSE NULL
                END AS hoehere_serie,
 
                /*
                CASE 
                    WHEN MAX(hsa.higher_series_html) IS NOT NULL THEN
                        -- Show regel numbers from higher series
                        LISTAGG(DISTINCT fb.regelnummer, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fb.regelnummer)
                    WHEN MAX(sa.all_successors_html) IS NOT NULL THEN
                        -- Show regel numbers from successors
                        LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                            CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL 
                                 THEN TO_CHAR(fb.regelnummer) 
                                 ELSE NULL 
                            END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fb.regelnummer)
                    ELSE 
                        NULL
                END AS regel_alternative
 
                */
 
                CASE 
                    WHEN MAX(hsa.higher_series_html) IS NOT NULL THEN
                        -- Show regel numbers from higher series
                        LISTAGG(DISTINCT fb.regelnummer, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fb.regelnummer)
                    WHEN MAX(sfa.successor_with_rule) IS NOT NULL THEN
                        -- Show regel numbers from successors
                        LISTAGG(DISTINCT 
                            CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL 
                                 THEN TO_CHAR(fb.regelnummer) 
                                 ELSE NULL 
                            END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fb.regelnummer)
                    ELSE 
                        NULL
                END AS regel_alternative
 
 
 
 
            FROM filtered_base fb
            CROSS JOIN country_coverage cc
            CROSS JOIN first_search_check fsc
            LEFT JOIN vorschrift_details vd_main ON vd_main.vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid
            LEFT JOIN vorschrift_details vd_alt ON vd_alt.vorschriftid = fb.alternative_vorschriftid
            LEFT JOIN lrsa_data ld_main ON ld_main.vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid
            LEFT JOIN lrsa_data ld_alt ON ld_alt.vorschriftid = fb.alternative_vorschriftid
            LEFT JOIN homolog_data hd_main ON hd_main.vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid
            LEFT JOIN homolog_data hd_alt ON hd_alt.vorschriftid = fb.alternative_vorschriftid
            LEFT JOIN successor_data sd_main ON sd_main.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid
            LEFT JOIN successor_data sd_alt ON sd_alt.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = fb.alternative_vorschriftid
           
            LEFT JOIN successor_for_alternative sfa ON sfa.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = fb.vorschriftid
            -- LEFT JOIN successor_aggregated sa ON sa.base_vorschrift_id = fb.vorschriftid
 
 
            LEFT JOIN higher_series_aggregated hsa ON hsa.base_vorschrift_id = fb.vorschriftid
            
            LEFT JOIN rule_criticality rc ON (rc.sucheid = fb.sucheid AND rc.meilenstein = fb.meilenstein AND rc.landid = fb.landid AND rc.specific_vorschrift_id = CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid ELSE fb.vorschriftid END)
            LEFT JOIN bewertung_data bd ON (bd.sucheid = fb.sucheid AND bd.meilenstein = fb.meilenstein AND bd.card_number = fb.card_number AND bd.vorschriftid = CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid ELSE fb.vorschriftid END)
            LEFT JOIN cross_reference_check crc ON crc.vorschriftid = CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid ELSE fb.vorschriftid END
            LEFT JOIN previous_milestone_data pmd ON (pmd.sucheid = fb.sucheid AND pmd.landid = fb.landid AND pmd.vorschriftid = CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid ELSE fb.vorschriftid END)
            LEFT JOIN previous_search_data psd ON (psd.landid = fb.landid 
            -- AND psd.card_number = fb.card_number 
            AND psd.vorschriftid = CASE WHEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid IS NOT NULL THEN fb.alternative_vorschriftid ELSE fb.vorschriftid END)
            WHERE (p_publisher_filter IS NULL OR NVL(vd_alt.publisher, vd_main.publisher) IN (SELECT TRIM(column_value) FROM TABLE(apex_string.split(p_publisher_filter, ':')))) 
            AND (p_show_only_unprocessed = 'N' OR (p_show_only_unprocessed = 'Y' AND NVL(bd.is_evaluated, 0) = 0))
            -- -- Hide Higher Series rows from main output if they are UNECE
            -- AND NOT (NVL(fb.HOEHERE_SERIE_MOEGLICH, 0) = 1 AND vd_main.publisher = 'UNECE')
 
            -- Hide Higher Series rows from main output if ALTERNATIVE is UNECE
            AND NOT (NVL(fb.HOEHERE_SERIE_MOEGLICH, 0) = 1 AND vd_alt.publisher = 'UNECE')
 
            GROUP BY fb.vorschriftid, fb.manueller_eintrag, fb.sucheid, fb.meilenstein, fb.vorschriftnummer, fb.card_number, cc.total_countries, fsc.is_first_search
            HAVING (p_criticality_filter = 'ALL' 
                OR (p_criticality_filter = 'CHANGED' AND MAX(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0) != MAX(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet)) 
                OR (p_criticality_filter = 'INCREASED' AND MAX(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0) > MAX(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet)) 
                OR (p_criticality_filter = 'DECREASED' AND MAX(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(MAX(rc.max_kritikalitaet), 0) < MAX(pmd.prev_kritikalitaet)))
            ORDER BY MAX(fb.manueller_eintrag) DESC, LISTAGG(DISTINCT fb.landnummer, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fb.landnummer), LISTAGG(DISTINCT fb.themabezeichnung, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fb.themabezeichnung)
           
 
        )  
        
        LOOP
            PIPE ROW (t_regulation_row(
                rec.checkbox,
                rec.row_edit_link,
                rec.card_number,
                rec.specific_reg_id,
                rec.vorschriftid,
                rec.alternative_vorschriftid,
                rec.edit_action,
                rec.delete_action,
                rec.manueller_eintrag,
                rec.b_nummer_liste,
                rec.landids,
                rec.land_namen_liste,
                rec.themabezeichnung,
                rec.vorschriftennummer,
                rec.regelnummer,
                rec.alternative_vorschriftennummer,
                rec.publisher,
                rec.search_id_hidden,
                rec.milestone_hidden,
                rec.landids_hidden,
                rec.rxswin_relevant,
                rec.lrsa,
                rec.homologationseigenschaft,
                rec.nachfolger_vorschrift,
                rec.kritikalitaet_von_regelnummer,
                rec.ausgabe_text_von_regelnummer,
                rec.et_verwendung,
                rec.et_vorschlag_vorschrift,
                rec.et_kommentar,
                rec."Kritikalität (M-1)",
                rec."ET Verwendung (M-1)",
                rec."ET Kommentar (M-1)",
                rec."Änderung zu M-1",
                rec."Kritikalität (Vorherige Suche)",
                rec."ET Verwendung (Vorherige Suche)",
                rec."ET Kommentar (Vorherige Suche)",
                rec."Änderung zu Vorheriger Suche",
                rec."Massenupdate Status",
                rec.report_baureihe,
                rec.hoehere_serie,
                rec.regel_alternative
            ));
        END LOOP;
        
        RETURN;
    EXCEPTION
        WHEN OTHERS THEN
            apex_debug.error('Error in get_regulations_data: ' || SQLERRM);
            RAISE;
    END get_regulations_data;
 
 
 /*
 
 
    FUNCTION get_all_successors(
        p_vorschriftid IN NUMBER,
        p_app_id IN NUMBER,
        p_app_session IN VARCHAR2,
        p_debug IN VARCHAR2,
        p_search_selection IN NUMBER,
        p_milestone_selection IN NUMBER
    ) RETURN CLOB AS
        l_result CLOB;
        l_count NUMBER := 0;
        l_regelnummer NUMBER;
        l_kritikalitaet NUMBER;
    BEGIN
        apex_json.initialize_clob_output;
        apex_json.open_array;
        
        -- Get ONLY successors that exist in T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS (current search)
        FOR rec IN (
            SELECT 
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid as successor_id,
                CASE 
                    WHEN NVL(vd.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum, 0) = 20 AND nv.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN nv.vorschrift_nummer || '_' || TO_CHAR(nv.dokumentendatum, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                    ELSE nv.vorschrift_nummer
                END as successor_nummer,
                LEVEL as successor_level,
                ms.regelnummer,
                MAX(NVL(mat.KRITIKALITAET, 0)) as kritikalitaet
            FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
            INNER JOIN t_vorschrift nv ON nv.vorschriftid = vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
            LEFT JOIN t_publisher vd ON nv.publisherid = vd.publisherid
            -- JOIN to T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS to filter only successors in current search
            INNER JOIN t_ms_suchergebniss ms ON ms.vorschriftid = vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
                AND ms.sucheid = p_search_selection
                AND ms.meilenstein = p_milestone_selection
            LEFT JOIN t_ms_parameter p ON ms.regelnummer = p.nummer
            LEFT JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER_REF_AUSGABE pra ON p.MS_PARAMETERID = pra.MS_PARAMETERID
            LEFT JOIN T_MS_AUSGABE_TEXT mat ON pra.MS_AUSGABE_TEXTID = mat.MS_AUSGABE_TEXTID
            WHERE vrv.beziehung_art = 10
            START WITH vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = p_vorschriftid
            CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
                AND vrv.beziehung_art = 10
                AND LEVEL <= 10
            GROUP BY 
                vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
                nv.vorschrift_nummer,
                vd.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum,
                nv.dokumentendatum,
                LEVEL,
                ms.regelnummer
            ORDER BY LEVEL, nv.vorschrift_nummer
        ) LOOP
            
            -- Add to JSON
            apex_json.open_object;
            apex_json.write('level', rec.successor_level);
            apex_json.write('vorschriftid', rec.successor_id);
            apex_json.write('vorschrift_nummer', rec.successor_nummer);
            apex_json.write('regelnummer', rec.regelnummer);
            apex_json.write('kritikalitaet', rec.kritikalitaet);
            apex_json.write('link', '<a href="f?p=' || p_app_id || ':25:' || p_app_session || 
                                   '::' || p_debug || ':RP,25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:' || 
                                   rec.successor_id || '" target="_blank">' || 
                                   rec.successor_nummer || '</a>');
            apex_json.close_object;
            
            l_count := l_count + 1;
        END LOOP;
        
        apex_json.close_array;
        l_result := apex_json.get_clob_output;
        apex_json.free_output;
        
        apex_debug.info('get_all_successors: Found %s successors (from T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS) for Vorschrift %s', l_count, p_vorschriftid);
        
        IF l_result IS NULL OR DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(l_result) = 0 THEN
            l_result := '[]';
        END IF;
        
        RETURN l_result;
        
    EXCEPTION
        WHEN OTHERS THEN
            apex_debug.error('Error in get_all_successors for Vorschrift %s: %s', p_vorschriftid, SQLERRM);
            apex_json.free_output;
            RETURN '[]';
    END get_all_successors;
 
 */
 
FUNCTION get_all_successors(
    p_vorschriftid IN NUMBER,
    p_app_id IN NUMBER,
    p_app_session IN VARCHAR2,
    p_debug IN VARCHAR2,
    p_search_selection IN NUMBER,
    p_milestone_selection IN NUMBER
) RETURN CLOB AS
    l_result CLOB;
    l_count NUMBER := 0;
BEGIN
    -- Add logging at the start
    apex_debug.info('get_all_successors START: VorschriftID=%s, Search=%s, Milestone=%s', 
                    p_vorschriftid, p_search_selection, p_milestone_selection);
    
    apex_json.initialize_clob_output;
    apex_json.open_array;
    
    -- Get ONLY successors that exist in T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS (current search)
    FOR rec IN (
        SELECT 
            vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid as successor_id,
            CASE 
                WHEN NVL(vd.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum, 0) = 20 AND nv.dokumentendatum IS NOT NULL 
                THEN nv.vorschrift_nummer || '_' || TO_CHAR(nv.dokumentendatum, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
                ELSE nv.vorschrift_nummer
            END as successor_nummer,
            LEVEL as successor_level,
            ms.regelnummer,
            MAX(NVL(mat.KRITIKALITAET, 0)) as kritikalitaet
        FROM t_vorschrift_ref_vorschrift vrv
        INNER JOIN t_vorschrift nv ON nv.vorschriftid = vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
        LEFT JOIN t_publisher vd ON nv.publisherid = vd.publisherid
        -- JOIN to T_MS_SUCHERGEBNISS to filter only successors in current search
        INNER JOIN t_ms_suchergebniss ms ON ms.vorschriftid = vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid
            AND ms.sucheid = p_search_selection
            AND ms.meilenstein = p_milestone_selection
        LEFT JOIN t_ms_parameter p ON ms.regelnummer = p.nummer
        LEFT JOIN T_MS_PARAMETER_REF_AUSGABE pra ON p.MS_PARAMETERID = pra.MS_PARAMETERID
        LEFT JOIN T_MS_AUSGABE_TEXT mat ON pra.MS_AUSGABE_TEXTID = mat.MS_AUSGABE_TEXTID
        WHERE vrv.beziehung_art = 10
        -- FILTER ONLY UN-R (UNECE)
        -- AND nv.publisher = 'UNECE'
        START WITH vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid = p_vorschriftid
        CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid = vrv.vorgaenger_vorschriftid
            AND vrv.beziehung_art = 10
            AND LEVEL <= 10
        GROUP BY 
            vrv.nachfolger_vorschriftid,
            nv.vorschrift_nummer,
            vd.anzeige_mit_dokumentendatum,
            nv.dokumentendatum,
            LEVEL,
            ms.regelnummer
        ORDER BY LEVEL, nv.vorschrift_nummer
    ) LOOP
        
        apex_json.open_object;
        apex_json.write('level', rec.successor_level);
        apex_json.write('vorschriftid', rec.successor_id);
        apex_json.write('vorschrift_nummer', rec.successor_nummer);
        apex_json.write('regelnummer', rec.regelnummer);
        apex_json.write('kritikalitaet', rec.kritikalitaet);
        apex_json.write('link', '<a href="f?p=' || p_app_id || ':25:' || p_app_session || 
                               '::' || p_debug || ':RP,25:P25_VORSCHRIFTID:' || 
                               rec.successor_id || '" target="_blank">' || 
                               rec.successor_nummer || '</a>');
        apex_json.close_object;
        
        l_count := l_count + 1;
    END LOOP;
    
    apex_json.close_array;
    l_result := apex_json.get_clob_output;
    apex_json.free_output;
    
    apex_debug.info('get_all_successors SUCCESS: Found %s successors', l_count);
    
    IF l_result IS NULL OR DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(l_result) = 0 THEN
        l_result := '[]';
    END IF;
    
    RETURN l_result;
    
EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        apex_debug.error('get_all_successors EXCEPTION for VorschriftID %s: %s', 
                        p_vorschriftid, SQLERRM);
        apex_debug.error('Error Stack: %s', DBMS_UTILITY.FORMAT_ERROR_STACK);
        apex_debug.error('Error Backtrace: %s', DBMS_UTILITY.FORMAT_ERROR_BACKTRACE);
        
        -- Clean up JSON output if error occurs mid-stream
        BEGIN
            apex_json.free_output;
        EXCEPTION
            WHEN OTHERS THEN NULL;
        END;
        
        -- Return empty array instead of crashing
        RETURN '[]';
END get_all_successors;
    
END PCK_RI_VORSCHRIFT_461REPORT6;
/

    function convert_text_query( p_enduser_query in varchar2 ) return varchar2; 
 
end pck_ri_vorschrift_oracle_text_pkg;

    /*
    
    FUNCTION convert_text_query(p_enduser_query IN VARCHAR2) RETURN VARCHAR2 IS
        l_tokens       apex_t_varchar2 := apex_t_varchar2();
        c_xml CONSTANT VARCHAR2(32767) := '<query><textquery><progression>' || 
                                            '<seq>#NORMAL#</seq>' || 
                                            '<seq>#FUZZY#</seq>' || 
                                          '</progression></textquery></query>'; 
        l_textquery    VARCHAR2(32767);
        PROCEDURE tokenize IS
            c_len CONSTANT PLS_INTEGER := LENGTH(p_enduser_query);
            l_pos PLS_INTEGER := 1;
            l_char VARCHAR2(1 CHAR);
            l_quoted BOOLEAN := FALSE;
            l_token  VARCHAR2(32767);
        BEGIN
            WHILE l_pos <= c_len LOOP
                l_char := SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, l_pos, 1);
                IF l_char = '"' THEN
                    IF SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, l_pos + 1) = '"' THEN
                         l_token := l_token || l_char;
                         l_pos := l_pos + 2;
                         CONTINUE;
                    END IF;
                    l_token := TRIM(BOTH FROM l_token);
                    IF l_token IS NOT NULL THEN
                        IF l_quoted THEN
                            apex_string.push(l_tokens, l_token);
                        ELSE
                            l_tokens := l_tokens MULTISET UNION apex_string.split(l_token, ' ');
                        END IF;
                        l_token := '';
                    END IF;
                    l_quoted := NOT l_quoted;
                ELSE
                    l_token := l_token || l_char;
                END IF;
                l_pos := l_pos + 1;
            END LOOP;
            l_token := TRIM(BOTH FROM l_token);
            IF l_token IS NOT NULL THEN
                l_tokens := l_tokens MULTISET UNION (apex_string.split(l_token, ' '));
            END IF;
        END tokenize;
        FUNCTION generate_query(p_feature IN VARCHAR2) RETURN VARCHAR2 IS 
            l_query       VARCHAR2(32767); 
            l_clean_token VARCHAR2(32767); 
            l_not         BOOLEAN;
        BEGIN 
            FOR i IN 1..l_tokens.COUNT LOOP 
                l_clean_token := LOWER(REGEXP_REPLACE(l_tokens(i), '[<>{}/()*%&!$?.:,;\+#]', '')); 
                l_not := FALSE;
                IF LTRIM(RTRIM(l_clean_token)) IS NOT NULL THEN 
                    l_not := l_clean_token LIKE '-%' AND l_clean_token NOT LIKE '-';
                    IF l_query IS NOT NULL AND NOT l_not THEN
                        l_query := l_query || ' AND '; 
                    END IF; 
                    IF l_not THEN
                        l_query := l_query || 'NOT ';
                        l_clean_token := SUBSTR(l_clean_token, 2);
                    END IF;
                    IF p_feature = 'FUZZY' THEN
                        IF l_clean_token LIKE '%"%' THEN
                            l_query := l_query || 'FUZZY("' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM l_clean_token) || '", 50, 500) ';
                        ELSE
                            l_query := l_query || 'FUZZY({' || l_clean_token || '}, 50, 500) ';
                        END IF;
                    ELSE
                        IF l_clean_token LIKE '%"%' THEN
                            l_query := l_query || '"' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM l_clean_token) || '"';
                        ELSE
                            l_query := l_query || '{' || l_clean_token || '}';
                        END IF;
                    END IF;
                END IF; 
            END LOOP; 
            RETURN LTRIM(RTRIM(l_query));  
        END generate_query; 
    BEGIN 
        IF SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, 1, 8) = 'ORATEXT:' THEN 
            RETURN SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, 9); 
        ELSE  
            l_textquery := c_xml; 
            
            IF SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, 1, 1) = '"' AND SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, -1) = '"' THEN
                l_textquery := REPLACE(l_textquery, '#NORMAL#', '"' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM p_enduser_query) || '"');
                l_textquery := REPLACE(l_textquery, '#FUZZY#', 'FUZZY("' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM p_enduser_query) || '", 50, 500)');
            ELSE
                tokenize;
                l_textquery := REPLACE(l_textquery, '#NORMAL#', generate_query('NORMAL'));
                l_textquery := REPLACE(l_textquery, '#FUZZY#', generate_query('FUZZY'));
            END IF;
            
            apex_debug.info('#### Oracle TEXT Query is: %s', l_textquery);
            RETURN l_textquery; 
        END IF; 
    END convert_text_query;

    */


    /*
    
    FUNCTION convert_text_query(p_enduser_query IN VARCHAR2) RETURN VARCHAR2 IS
    l_tokens       apex_t_varchar2 := apex_t_varchar2();
    c_xml CONSTANT VARCHAR2(32767) := '<query><textquery><progression>' || 
                                        '<seq>#NORMAL#</seq>' || 
                                        '<seq>#FUZZY#</seq>' || 
                                      '</progression></textquery></query>'; 
    l_textquery    VARCHAR2(32767);
    
    PROCEDURE tokenize IS
        c_len CONSTANT PLS_INTEGER := LENGTH(p_enduser_query);

    FUNCTION generate_query(p_feature IN VARCHAR2) RETURN VARCHAR2 IS 
        l_query       VARCHAR2(32767);

        l_not         BOOLEAN;
    BEGIN 
        FOR i IN 1..l_tokens.COUNT LOOP 
            -- FIXED: Only remove truly problematic characters, keep hyphens and slashes
            l_clean_token := LOWER(REGEXP_REPLACE(l_tokens(i), '[<>{}()*%&!$?.:,;\+#]', '')); 
            l_not := FALSE;

                        l_query := l_query || 'FUZZY("' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM l_clean_token) || '", 50, 500) ';

FUNCTION convert_text_query(p_enduser_query IN VARCHAR2) RETURN VARCHAR2 IS
    l_tokens       apex_t_varchar2 := apex_t_varchar2();
    c_xml CONSTANT VARCHAR2(32767) := '<query><textquery><progression>' || 
                                        '<seq>#NORMAL#</seq>' || 
                                        '<seq>#FUZZY#</seq>' || 
                                      '</progression></textquery></query>'; 
    l_textquery    VARCHAR2(32767);
    
    PROCEDURE tokenize IS
        c_len CONSTANT PLS_INTEGER := LENGTH(p_enduser_query);
        l_pos PLS_INTEGER := 1;
        l_char VARCHAR2(1 CHAR);
        l_quoted BOOLEAN := FALSE;
        l_token  VARCHAR2(32767);
    BEGIN
        WHILE l_pos <= c_len LOOP
            l_char := SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, l_pos, 1);
            IF l_char = '"' THEN
                IF SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, l_pos + 1) = '"' THEN
                     l_token := l_token || l_char;
                     l_pos := l_pos + 2;
                     CONTINUE;
                END IF;
                l_token := TRIM(BOTH FROM l_token);
                IF l_token IS NOT NULL THEN
                    IF l_quoted THEN
                        apex_string.push(l_tokens, l_token);
                    ELSE
                        l_tokens := l_tokens MULTISET UNION apex_string.split(l_token, ' ');
                    END IF;
                    l_token := '';
                END IF;
                l_quoted := NOT l_quoted;
            ELSE
                l_token := l_token || l_char;
            END IF;
            l_pos := l_pos + 1;
        END LOOP;
        l_token := TRIM(BOTH FROM l_token);
        IF l_token IS NOT NULL THEN
            l_tokens := l_tokens MULTISET UNION (apex_string.split(l_token, ' '));
        END IF;
    END tokenize;
    
    FUNCTION generate_query(p_feature IN VARCHAR2) RETURN VARCHAR2 IS 
        l_query       VARCHAR2(32767); 
        l_clean_token VARCHAR2(32767); 
        l_not         BOOLEAN;
        l_is_technical_standard BOOLEAN := FALSE;
    BEGIN 
        IF l_tokens.COUNT = 2 AND 
           (UPPER(l_tokens(1)) IN ('UN', 'GB', 'ISO', 'DIN', 'ECE', 'FMVSS') AND 
            UPPER(l_tokens(2)) IN ('R', 'T')) THEN
            l_is_technical_standard := TRUE;
        END IF;
        
        IF l_is_technical_standard THEN
            IF p_feature = 'FUZZY' THEN
                l_query := 'FUZZY({' || LOWER(l_tokens(1)) || LOWER(l_tokens(2)) || '}, 50, 500) OR ' ||
                          'FUZZY({' || LOWER(l_tokens(1)) || '-' || LOWER(l_tokens(2)) || '}, 50, 500) OR ' ||
                          'FUZZY({' || LOWER(l_tokens(1)) || '/' || LOWER(l_tokens(2)) || '}, 50, 500)';
            ELSE
                l_query := '{' || LOWER(l_tokens(1)) || LOWER(l_tokens(2)) || '} OR ' ||
                          '{' || LOWER(l_tokens(1)) || '-' || LOWER(l_tokens(2)) || '} OR ' ||
                          '{' || LOWER(l_tokens(1)) || '/' || LOWER(l_tokens(2)) || '}';
            END IF;
            RETURN l_query;
        END IF;
        
        FOR i IN 1..l_tokens.COUNT LOOP 
            l_clean_token := LOWER(REGEXP_REPLACE(l_tokens(i), '[<>{}()*%&!$?.:,;\+#]', '')); 
            l_not := FALSE;
            IF LTRIM(RTRIM(l_clean_token)) IS NOT NULL THEN 
                l_not := l_clean_token LIKE '-%' AND l_clean_token NOT LIKE '-';
                IF l_query IS NOT NULL AND NOT l_not THEN
                    IF l_tokens.COUNT > 3 THEN
                        l_query := l_query || ' OR '; 
                    ELSE
                        l_query := l_query || ' AND ';
                    END IF;
                END IF; 
                IF l_not THEN
                    l_query := l_query || 'NOT ';
                    l_clean_token := SUBSTR(l_clean_token, 2);
                END IF;
                IF p_feature = 'FUZZY' THEN
                    IF l_clean_token LIKE '%"%' THEN
                        l_query := l_query || 'FUZZY("' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM l_clean_token) || '", 50, 500) ';
                    ELSE
                        l_query := l_query || 'FUZZY({' || l_clean_token || '}, 50, 500) ';
                    END IF;
                ELSE
                    IF l_clean_token LIKE '%"%' THEN
                        l_query := l_query || '"' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM l_clean_token) || '"';
                    ELSE
                        l_query := l_query || '{' || l_clean_token || '}';
                    END IF;
                END IF;
            END IF; 
        END LOOP; 
        RETURN LTRIM(RTRIM(l_query));  
    END generate_query; 
BEGIN 
    IF SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, 1, 8) = 'ORATEXT:' THEN 
        RETURN SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, 9); 
    ELSE  
        l_textquery := c_xml; 
        
        IF SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, 1, 1) = '"' AND SUBSTR(p_enduser_query, -1) = '"' THEN
            l_textquery := REPLACE(l_textquery, '#NORMAL#', '"' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM p_enduser_query) || '"');
            l_textquery := REPLACE(l_textquery, '#FUZZY#', 'FUZZY("' || TRIM(BOTH '"' FROM p_enduser_query) || '", 50, 500)');
        ELSE
            tokenize;
            l_textquery := REPLACE(l_textquery, '#NORMAL#', generate_query('NORMAL'));
            l_textquery := REPLACE(l_textquery, '#FUZZY#', generate_query('FUZZY'));
        END IF;
        
        apex_debug.info('#### Oracle TEXT Query is: %s', l_textquery);
        RETURN l_textquery; 
    END IF; 
END convert_text_query;









    
end pck_ri_vorschrift_oracle_text_pkg;
/













create or replace PACKAGE xlsx_builder_pkg
   AUTHID CURRENT_USER
IS
   /**********************************************
   **
   ** Author: Anton Scheffer
   ** Date: 19-02-2011
   ** Website: http://technology.amis.nl/blog
   ** See also: http://technology.amis.nl/blog/?p=10995
   **
   ** Changelog:
   **   Date: 21-02-2011
   **     Added Aligment, horizontal, vertical, wrapText
   **   Date: 06-03-2011
   **     Added Comments, MergeCells, fixed bug for dependency on NLS-settings
   **   Date: 16-03-2011
   **     Added bold and italic fonts
   **   Date: 22-03-2011
   **     Fixed issue with timezone's set to a region(name) instead of a offset
   **   Date: 08-04-2011
   **     Fixed issue with XML-escaping from text
   **   Date: 27-05-2011
   **     Added MIT-license
   **   Date: 11-08-2011
   **     Fixed NLS-issue with column width
   **   Date: 29-09-2011
   **     Added font color
   **   Date: 16-10-2011
   **     fixed bug in add_string
   **   Date: 26-04-2012
   **     Fixed set_autofilter (only one autofilter per sheet, added _xlnm._FilterDatabase)
   **     Added list_validation = drop-down
   **   Date: 27-08-2013
   **     Added freeze_pane
   **   Date: 01-03-2014 (MK)
   **     Changed new_sheet to function returning sheet id
   **   Date: 22-03-2014 (MK)
   **     Added function to convert Oracle Number Format to Excel Format
   **   Date: 07-04-2014 (MK)
   **     Removed references to UTL_FILE
   **     query2sheet is now function returning BLOB
   **     changed date handling to be based on 01-01-1900
   **   Date: 08-04-2014 (MK)
   **     internal function for date to excel serial conversion added
   **   Date: 01-12-2014 (AMEI)
   **     Some Naming-conventions (and renaming of elements accordingly), new FUNCTION get_sheet_id
   **     Triggered by: @SEE AMEI, 20141129 Bugfix:
   **     For concatenation operations (in particular where record fields are involved) added a lot of TO_CHAR (...)
   **     to make sure correct explicit conversion (mayby not all caught where necessary)
   **     To make this easier to recognize, inducted some naming conventions and renamed some elements.
   **   Date: 26-04-2017 (MP)
   **     Added new function "query2sheet2" which is faster.
   **     For dates used following logic:
   **       - if trunc([column])=[column], then outputed cell value is formatted to format YYYYMMDD;
   **       - otherwise, outputted cell value is formatted to format YYYYMMDDTHH24MISS;
   ******************************************************************************
   ******************************************************************************
   Copyright (C) 2011, 2012 by Anton Scheffer

   Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
   of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal
   in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights

   The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in
